subject: Quick poll: Voter's Bill of Rights?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=mAlTRGAGC+BovD484kVO5oHu7UPc/w3Xab441+DST2SFNWcBEblddlrqV0uq/W6juUvkljJNyC5zpcV8BMGIRoCJof3gxz/iQY1b76GXzVw=]
You are invited to join our one-click issue response poll.
For data integrity purposes, please do not complete this survey if your email address is not dpwillis67@gmail.com .
Several states, including California, have passed a "Voters Bill of Rights" to protect everyone's ability to be heard in an election.
Activists around the country have been calling for a national version in response to the voter suppression bills that have swept through state legislatures over the last few years and seem to keep coming.
Team: We're looking to hear from our supporters about this proposed idea. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Team: Do you think we need a national "Voters Bill of Rights"?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.everyaction.com/WI7XQsH6D0Kn6HzC8Tsadw2?am=15.00&contactdata=mAlTRGAGC+BovD484kVO5oHu7UPc/w3Xab441+DST2SFNWcBEblddlrqV0uq/W6juUvkljJNyC5zpcV8BMGIRoCJof3gxz/iQY1b76GXzVw=] NO [https://secure.everyaction.com/WI7XQsH6D0Kn6HzC8Tsadw2?am=15.00&contactdata=mAlTRGAGC+BovD484kVO5oHu7UPc/w3Xab441+DST2SFNWcBEblddlrqV0uq/W6juUvkljJNyC5zpcV8BMGIRoCJof3gxz/iQY1b76GXzVw=]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=mAlTRGAGC+BovD484kVO5oHu7UPc/w3Xab441+DST2SFNWcBEblddlrqV0uq/W6juUvkljJNyC5zpcV8BMGIRoCJof3gxz/iQY1b76GXzVw=]

name: Lesley Davis
subject: ⚡ We’re Starting to Win the Culture Back
body:
** Maybe We’re Not Losing the Culture — Maybe We’re Starting to Win It Back
------------------------------------------------------------

For a long time, it felt like the left owned the culture in America. Faith was mocked, tradition sidelined, and if you dared to talk about God or morality in a public setting, you were dismissed as backward or out of touch.

But something is changing. And it’s not just in politics. It’s in the culture — the part we were told we lost for good.

Case in point: American Idol’s recent “night of worship.” On Easter Sunday, one of the biggest shows in pop culture history opened with a song praising Jesus, featured multiple worship performances, and even had Carrie Underwood singing about her faith in front of millions. The whole night felt more like church than a talent competition — and it wasn’t niche or corny. It was beautiful. It was bold. And it struck a nerve.

This is what cultural realignment looks like.

** The Leftward Drift Has Hit a Wall 🚧
------------------------------------------------------------

For years, American culture marched steadily leftward. Entertainment, academia, big business — all seemed captured by progressive ideology. Christian values were relegated to the sidelines. Traditional families were sneered at. The faith that built this country was treated as a private eccentricity, best kept quiet in polite society.

But that top-down pressure never fully reflected the values of everyday Americans. And now, after years of being told to keep quiet, people are finding their voices again. It’s not just political. It’s cultural. It’s spiritual. And it’s long overdue.

What we saw on American Idol wasn’t just entertainment. It was a signal. Americans are hungry for more than the moral confusion that has dominated the culture for too long. They’re tired of being told that faith doesn’t belong in the public square.

That night wasn’t angry or combative — it was joyful, reverent, and real. And it reminded people that worship isn’t just for Sunday mornings or private Facebook groups. It belongs right where people are — even on prime-time television.

This is why the cultural shift matters. We’re not just defending against bad ideas anymore. We’re creating good ones. We’re building culture again — and it’s resonating.

** The Realignment Is Bigger Than Politics 🗳️
------------------------------------------------------------

Some people think this “realignment” is just about politics — about voters moving from left to right, or coalitions reshuffling. But that’s only part of the story. What we’re seeing is something deeper: a rediscovery of the values that sustain a nation.

Hard work. Family. Faith. Community. Patriotism. These aren’t relics of the past. They’re foundations. And for too long, they’ve been treated as obstacles to progress rather than anchors in a storm.

Now, regular people — not celebrities or politicians — are reclaiming them. They’re starting classical schools. They’re homeschooling in massive numbers. They’re launching small businesses rooted in faith. They’re sharing scripture on TikTok and filling stadiums to worship. And yes, they’re watching American Idol with tears in their eyes because it’s finally speaking to something deeper than celebrity.

** Young People Are Leaning In 🙋♂️
------------------------------------------------------------
Here’s something the media doesn’t want to admit: this isn’t just an old-person movement. A surprising number of young Americans — especially young men — are waking up to the emptiness of modern culture and looking for something more meaningful. They’re turning to faith. They’re embracing tradition. We’ve seen videos where hundreds or thousands of students at college campuses across the country are saying they can’t do it alone and are being baptized in any body of water they can find.

For years, we were told the next generation would be more liberal, more secular, more “progressive.” But that forecast is starting to look more like wishful thinking than reality.

** This Is a Cultural Moment — Let’s Not Miss It ⏳
------------------------------------------------------------
So what do we do with all this?

We keep going.

We support artists and shows that aren’t afraid to honor faith and family. We build institutions — schools, media outlets, churches, businesses — that reflect our values. We raise our kids to love truth and beauty, not just chase likes and trends. And we stop assuming we’re losing the culture, because we’re not.

If anything, we’re starting to win it back.

No, this doesn’t mean we’ll win every battle. There’s still hostility. There’s still mockery. But there’s also a growing awareness — even among those outside our circles — that the old scripts aren’t working. People want more. And we have something to offer.

The Easter episode of American Idol didn’t solve everything. But it reminded us what’s possible. That the sacred still moves hearts. That truth still speaks. And that maybe — just maybe — the cultural tide is turning.

We’re not here to burn the culture down. We’re here to redeem it.

And that work is just getting started.

Let's keep going!

Please check out previous stories here (https://msadvocacygroup.substack.com) .

body:
Walk, Celebrate, and Help us grow a stronger, more vibrant Republican Party at the Cinco De Mayo Parade on May 9-10th! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3bc1e6eecc88/n41kepo7ku-12766916?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=41abf8ea0d&e=25844e23a8)
---
| |

|
# Cinco De Mayo Parade Walkers & Voter Registration Booth Volunteers Wanted
---
| [ ](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=efa6966fe2&e=25844e23a8)
---
| Help us show strong support for the Nebraska Republican Party by signing up to walk with us in the [Cinco De Mayo Parade](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=5a30e18f21&e=25844e23a8) or working a shift at the Voter Registration Booth at the [Cinco De Mayo Festival](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=385b14fb42&e=25844e23a8) in South Omaha on May 9th & 10th.

_**ALL**_ Republicans are welcome, whether you are a member of the Latino community or simply passionate about growing our party and expanding outreach, your support is needed and appreciated!
---
|
#### **Parade:**
* **Parade Date & Time: **Saturday, May 10th at 9:30 a.m.
* **Parade Route: **South 24th Street from D to Q in Omaha, Nebraska

---
| [Sign-Up to Walk in Parade](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=23ffa72695&e=25844e23a8 "Sign-Up to Walk in Parade")
---
|
#### **Voter Registration Booth:**
* **Friday, May 9th: **5:00 p.m. - 10:30 p.m.
* **Saturday, May 10th:** 10:30 a.m. - 10:30 p.m

---
| [Sign-Up to Staff the Booth](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=3fbe66387b&e=25844e23a8 "Sign-Up to Staff the Booth")
---
|
---
|
---
|
# What is the Latinos Coalition?
---
| [ ](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=fa29c5f2ca&e=25844e23a8)
---
| The Nebraska Republican Party Latinos Coalition is leading the charge to expand Latino voter outreach, build lasting relationships within our communities, and grow a stronger, more vibrant Republican Party across Nebraska. We are committed to championing conservative values, creating new opportunities for engagement, and ensuring that every Nebraskan has a voice in shaping the future of our state.

Whether you are Latino or a supporter of this effort, we invite everyone who shares our mission to join our Latinos Coalition.
---
|
---
| [Join the Latinos Coalition](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=8875a088f2&e=25844e23a8 "Join the Latinos Coalition")
---
|
---
|
# Goals of the Latinos Coalition:
---
| The Nebraska Republican Party Latinos Coalition is working on the ground to connect with Latino voters, build relationships across Nebraska neighborhoods, and grow a Republican Party that’s rooted in hard work, strong families, and traditional family values.
---
| [ ](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=48bac19d16&e=25844e23a8)
---
|
---
|
# Latinos Coalition Fights For:
---
| [ ](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=a0023de92c&e=25844e23a8)
---
| **_FAMILY VALUES:_ **Upholding traditional family values, religious freedom, and recognizing the sanctity of innocent human life. **_PROMOTING HISPANIC BUSINESS:_** Investing in and empowering community leaders who will champion conservative values within communities and ensure business owners have the full authority to live out the American dream here in Nebraska. **_CHAMPIONING ECONOMIC FREEDOM:_** Promoting the free enterprise system that is free of big government control to ensure that every American can reach their full potential in competitive commerce.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=8563af8872&e=25844e23a8)
---
| Questions about the sign-up form, walking in the parade, or staffing the Voter Registration/Latinos Coalition Recruitment Booth at the Cinco De Mayo Festival? Contact Joe Hagerty the Political Director of the Nebraska Republican Party.
---
| [Contact Joe](mailto:political@ne.gop?subject=Cinco%20De%20Mayo%20Parade%2FFestival%20Inquiry&body=Hi%20Joe%2C "Contact Joe")
---
| **Joe Hagerty**

political@ne.gop**

name: Red State Insider

body:
That’s why I’m partnering with Senate Republicans to get YOUR opinion on this issue with a nationwide poll.

Friend,

This is what happens when woke Democrat politicians put ideology over fairness.

**[FIRST:](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt3j84mepa7alh52nsnrnouebi56bnrj14s38428_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpim4o74clh2bs)** President Trump issued an executive order _**[BANNING](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zorlghc56k9hp6fp2f6qsegb9qi26isqfq3o4tjg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpim4o74clh2bs)**_ male athletes from competing in women's sports.

**[THEN:](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmmqskfd1l2uhku2dojsp65egaskf9abooediou0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpim4o74clh2bs)** Maine Governor Janet Mills defied the order, proudly _**[declaring her state would ignore the protection of women's athletics.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zib8ii2ldmsr7r830946ohtb6thr8grr4sq4g0u8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpim4o74clh2bs)**_

body:
We're on the brink of disaster. The Democrats are waging an all-out war on the America First agenda, and we're running out of time.

Friend - This is Senator Eric Schmitt. **
**I don't usually send emails like this, but the situation is dire. **
**We're on the brink of disaster. The Democrats are waging an all-out war on the America First agenda, and we're running out of time.**
**As a top ally of President Trump in the U.S. Senate, I'm fighting tooth and nail to defend our values, our freedom, and our way of life. **
**But the radical Left is pulling out all the stops to take us down.**
**They're amassing a war chest of millions to defeat us and silence patriots like you. They're using every dirty trick in the book to undermine President Trump's agenda and restore their grip on power.**
**If we don't act IMMEDIATELY, everything we have worked so hard for will be DESTROYED, and all hope will be LOST. The America First agenda will be dead in its tracks, and our country will be forever changed.**
**We can't let them win. We must act NOW to defend our agenda and our country. That's why I'm coming straight to you today with an urgent plea for help.**
**We need to raise the funds necessary to take on the radical Left and secure our victories once and for all. Trust me when I say that every single dollar counts when the stakes are this high.**
**That's why I'm sounding the alarm.

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Restoring hope in our country
body:
Have you read about President Biden’s Ambassador to the United Nations?

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zin8a3il54770p358vcfhufb78tlugfhp0phatko_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpim4o72cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Have you read about President Biden’s Ambassador to the United Nations? She is telling her fellow ambassadors from around the world that “white supremacy” is “weaved into [America’s] founding documents and principles.” Can you imagine being told that America’s glorious founding principle—the principle that “all men are created equal,” endowed by God with “unalienable rights”—embodies the idea of white supremacy? Can you imagine being told the same thing about our cherished **Constitution** , which is responsible for America becoming the freest, most prosperous nation in human history? That America’s United Nations Ambassador is promoting these lies is reprehensible. But even more reprehensible is the fact that so many K-12 and college students in America are being taught this same false narrative. Too many young Americans are not learning what makes America an exceptional nation and a beacon of liberty for the world. Instead, they learn that our great nation’s history is essentially a history of injustice—that America at its heart has **always** been racist and is undeserving of respect. Is it any wonder that so many younger Americans today feel an increasing attraction to so-called “critical race theory” and other ideas destructive of liberty? Is it any wonder that there is decreasing support among younger Americans for basic liberties that past generations have revered and taken for granted—liberties such as freedom of speech? It is easy to become discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope—we must fight back with the truth. **Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning.** In fact, we produced a free online course that helps do just that, titled **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope.”** And I’m asking for your help in promoting it to additional millions of Americans—especially younger Americans—and to expand our other critical outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide. You can help fund the promotion of this important course at this secure link: _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo809vtcblia6bne0hks2kreutpghoegvmmt1k70_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpim4o72cdh2bs)**_ [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuv8je31a12u0aopc22phhttl67kp4l8subi09ig_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpim4o72cdh2bs) Historian and Hillsdale professor Wilfred McClay teaches the course based on his published history of America. **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Our goal in producing and promoting this free online course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government.** This work is the surest means of defending liberty—which is why we make every online course available **free of charge** to any citizen wishing to learn. **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times_ ’ “1619 Project,” which seeks to inject the idea that America is essentially unjust into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Of course, producing an online course and making it available free of charge requires significant resources—and promoting the course nationwide, which is essential, costs even more. To date, more than 118,000 Americans have enrolled in **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** —but we must do more. Your support is critical to our success. As you may know, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student loans and grants. That’s why we can remain true to our mission on behalf of liberty, free of so many bureaucratic regulations that burden other colleges and universities. This independence also means that all of our work is entirely dependent on the support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. This is especially true of our national outreach efforts, including free online courses. **Can I count on you today to help fund the promotion of “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope” to millions of Americans nationwide and expand our other educational outreach efforts with a generous tax-deductible gift of $100 or more?** Please make your best tax-deductible gift using this secure link: _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrm99ktv6vjf4pqp7iae3gg64d2638bt5jgccbeo_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpim4o72cdh2bs)**_ We deeply appreciate your partnership in promoting the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among younger Americans—that is essential to preserving free government. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S.** For a gift of $100 or more, we’ll send you our online course, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,” in a handsome DVD box set. The course explores America’s history as a land of hope founded on high principles** and counters the far-Left’s false narrative about our country. Thank you so much for helping us promote intelligent patriotism—especially among younger Americans. _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6kni08ckj8omtnitqibnom3lha4926cpa8cajr8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpim4o72cdh2bs)**_
---

Pop Acta Media | American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Restoring hope in our country
body:
Have you read about President Biden’s Ambassador to the United Nations?

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5cf54h4hl2lgu335md383gb2v4qh9bk5e91mlq8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpimcpr6cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, Have you read about President Biden’s Ambassador to the United Nations? She is telling her fellow ambassadors from around the world that “white supremacy” is “weaved into [America’s] founding documents and principles.” Can you imagine being told that America’s glorious founding principle—the principle that “all men are created equal,” endowed by God with “unalienable rights”—embodies the idea of white supremacy? Can you imagine being told the same thing about our cherished **Constitution** , which is responsible for America becoming the freest, most prosperous nation in human history? That America’s United Nations Ambassador is promoting these lies is reprehensible. But even more reprehensible is the fact that so many K-12 and college students in America are being taught this same false narrative. Too many young Americans are not learning what makes America an exceptional nation and a beacon of liberty for the world. Instead, they learn that our great nation’s history is essentially a history of injustice—that America at its heart has **always** been racist and is undeserving of respect. Is it any wonder that so many younger Americans today feel an increasing attraction to so-called “critical race theory” and other ideas destructive of liberty? Is it any wonder that there is decreasing support among younger Americans for basic liberties that past generations have revered and taken for granted—liberties such as freedom of speech? subject: I don’t usually send messages like this, but this situation is DIRE!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schmitt for Senate
body:
We're on the brink of disaster. The Democrats are waging an all-out war on the America First agenda, and we're running out of time.

Friend - This is Senator Eric Schmitt. **
**I don't usually send emails like this, but the situation is dire. **
**We're on the brink of disaster. The Democrats are waging an all-out war on the America First agenda, and we're running out of time.**
**As a top ally of President Trump in the U.S. Senate, I'm fighting tooth and nail to defend our values, our freedom, and our way of life. **
**But the radical Left is pulling out all the stops to take us down.**
**They're amassing a war chest of millions to defeat us and silence patriots like you. They're using every dirty trick in the book to undermine President Trump's agenda and restore their grip on power.**
**If we don't act IMMEDIATELY, everything we have worked so hard for will be DESTROYED, and all hope will be LOST. The America First agenda will be dead in its tracks, and our country will be forever changed.**
**We can't let them win. We must act NOW to defend our agenda and our country. That's why I'm coming straight to you today with an urgent plea for help.**
**We need to raise the funds necessary to take on the radical Left and secure our victories once and for all. Trust me when I say that every single dollar counts when the stakes are this high.**
**That's why I'm sounding the alarm.
I'm asking you, Friend, to dig deep and give what you can. [Can you chip in $25, $10, or even just $5 RIGHT NOW to help reach our next upcoming fundraising goal and SAVE the America First agenda?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9d2vcrjvhu3inihv5kao6ngb094sn92nhl4i3ho_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpim6ob4clh2bs)[CHIP IN NOW | SAVE THE AMERICA FIRST AGENDA >>
](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zik4vfvqc4vr2r55gt0uh93aacb3tptt433u3d6o_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpim6ob4clh2bs)If we don't meet each and every one of our critical fundraising goals, the media will declare the America First agenda dead, and our momentum will be lost. We can't let that happen.
[Please, Friend, rush an emergency donation now to ensure we have the resources necessary to fight back against anything the Left throws our way.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5qmctn6vqtrp8k6ltootu4a7q4oc41btg2o5elo_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpim6ob4clh2bs)
Together, we can keep the MAGA momentum surging strong and ensure the SUCCESS of President Trump's agenda once and for all.
Thank you in advance,
Eric Schmitt [MAGA Senator from Missouri]| | |

name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: Restoring hope in our country
body:
Have you read about President Biden’s Ambassador to the United Nations?

This sponsored message from First Look News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z1icpu1g87vb67rpu01rvj42kdgigaahbsivqa7o_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpim6ob4cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Have you read about President Biden’s Ambassador to the United Nations? She is telling her fellow ambassadors from around the world that “white supremacy” is “weaved into [America’s] founding documents and principles.” Can you imagine being told that America’s glorious founding principle—the principle that “all men are created equal,” endowed by God with “unalienable rights”—embodies the idea of white supremacy? Can you imagine being told the same thing about our cherished **Constitution** , which is responsible for America becoming the freest, most prosperous nation in human history? That America’s United Nations Ambassador is promoting these lies is reprehensible. But even more reprehensible is the fact that so many K-12 and college students in America are being taught this same false narrative. Too many young Americans are not learning what makes America an exceptional nation and a beacon of liberty for the world. Instead, they learn that our great nation’s history is essentially a history of injustice—that America at its heart has **always** been racist and is undeserving of respect. Is it any wonder that so many younger Americans today feel an increasing attraction to so-called “critical race theory” and other ideas destructive of liberty? Is it any wonder that there is decreasing support among younger Americans for basic liberties that past generations have revered and taken for granted—liberties such as freedom of speech? It is easy to become discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope—we must fight back with the truth. **Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning.** In fact, we produced a free online course that helps do just that, titled **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope.”** And I’m asking for your help in promoting it to additional millions of Americans—especially younger Americans—and to expand our other critical outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide. You can help fund the promotion of this important course at this secure link: _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zlcob0o2a8tfg6g93eovnjb0lmfltukkd5fguu7o_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpim6ob4cjh2bs)**_ [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zl9dshivp44ngbsibeo805cmu3cp8q5u5dfgsns8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpim6ob4cjh2bs) Historian and Hillsdale professor Wilfred McClay teaches the course based on his published history of America. **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Our goal in producing and promoting this free online course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government.** This work is the surest means of defending liberty—which is why we make every online course available **free of charge** to any citizen wishing to learn. **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times_ ’ “1619 Project,” which seeks to inject the idea that America is essentially unjust into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Of course, producing an online course and making it available free of charge requires significant resources—and promoting the course nationwide, which is essential, costs even more. To date, more than 118,000 Americans have enrolled in **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** —but we must do more. Your support is critical to our success. As you may know, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student loans and grants. That’s why we can remain true to our mission on behalf of liberty, free of so many bureaucratic regulations that burden other colleges and universities. This independence also means that all of our work is entirely dependent on the support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. This is especially true of our national outreach efforts, including free online courses. **Can I count on you today to help fund the promotion of “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope” to millions of Americans nationwide and expand our other educational outreach efforts with a generous tax-deductible gift of $100 or more?** Please make your best tax-deductible gift using this secure link: _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2znjr0dt89409k2b5c8f05ttlnsfm1b6a8gqcn818_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpim6ob4cjh2bs)**_ We deeply appreciate your partnership in promoting the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among younger Americans—that is essential to preserving free government. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S.** For a gift of $100 or more, we’ll send you our online course, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,” in a handsome DVD box set. The course explores America’s history as a land of hope founded on high principles** and counters the far-Left’s false narrative about our country. Thank you so much for helping us promote intelligent patriotism—especially among younger Americans. _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zlset5ofmtfpg3i5ackg2es7hukpr4mtrtbif0i0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpim6ob4cjh2bs)**_
---

Pop Acta Media | First Look News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zdoomkv76qp4v6us2mlugt4lpc76f9b6bdl6g15g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkcqb4tjhe6rrfdljkeqjetjnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp31cpgeaoj3c8gq48bi4bh28pr1cdj6aor1chie49fg)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z87femippc731gmiuuvhioervs8r3icjk5bf29a8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpim6ob4cjh2bs)_

name: Riley Gaines
subject: I need you to take a stand, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
That’s why I’m partnering with Senate Republicans to get YOUR opinion on this issue with a nationwide poll.

Friend,

This is what happens when woke Democrat politicians put ideology over fairness.

**[FIRST:](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zviv9i5mts9km1is0jbi2fkbsvs8d2fkf54p8ae0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpim6ob4clh2bs)** President Trump issued an executive order _**[BANNING](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7nt0tmqt9g2kibq1f8kvh63hpdr7p7ke5vca4v0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpim6ob4clh2bs)**_ male athletes from competing in women's sports.

**[THEN:](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbi9q74qf4stcmtpof5o50jq8ebhqglnpd5ip620_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpim6ob4clh2bs)** Maine Governor Janet Mills defied the order, proudly _**[declaring her state would ignore the protection of women's athletics.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhtr11u3jdr64tk5nlbg5gdh9k4t390fsf704dt8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpim6ob4clh2bs)**_

**[NOW:](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlr59b97epdpd7u8pn96uvqbk7jn5l0gj8tl6380_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpim6ob4clh2bs)** The Department of Justice is _**[SUING](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqsluqt3iebv39m1cj16m37lnq7gvu7d44g2pi68_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpim6ob4clh2bs)**_ Maine for violating Title IX.

As a female athlete, I've lived this fight firsthand -- and I've had enough. We can't let radical ideologies destroy women's sports.

**[That's why I'm partnering with Senate Republicans to get YOUR opinion on this issue with a nationwide poll.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z472rf5il61m13hojph74e1tjp7b3ajqfm6519no_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpim6ob4clh2bs)**
**[OFFICIAL NRSC POLL](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdusj40gfkida4mdj9bh3utgkta9qpj8ei7ull78_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpim6ob4clh2bs)**

**[DO YOU AGREE MEN SHOULD NOT BE ABLE TO COMPETE IN WOMEN'S SPORTS?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl39jpf10h5hlrc538b0hvqgvcgvf1pu4ooo05to_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpim6ob4clh2bs)**

******************************************************[YES](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zomlb47vl38gvhq7p0t5to34k8b3cbfeg2i4mgc0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpim6ob4clh2bs)******************************************************

******************************************************[NO](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zssvchb056qqra17mv0q93agaloqao4f177goi1o_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpim6ob4clh2bs)******************************************************

******************************************************[TAKE THE POLL](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7qu8da873roakfa1ch7mqk3ugofa4gmn8tjmbto_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpim6ob4clh2bs)******************************************************
Democrats fighting to keep men in women's sports isn't some middle finger to President Trump like they think it is.

**[It 's a middle finger to little girls with dreams -- dreams of competing, of earning scholarships, and of building their futures through sport.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpong672e7tap93s298fe5r2eubqhvnav1llnb1o_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpim6ob4clh2bs)**

We need to protect fairness in women's sports, and it's clear your voice is needed now more than ever.

******************************************************[MAKE YOUR VOICE HEARD](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z18vs95mqqh6pf2vtptm6nirjb3m52cl8tpmbr80_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpim6ob4clh2bs)******************************************************

Thank you,

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2ir0fmt6l5sqddc0eiuj2j1vo8pgl2vf7ff64fg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpim6ob4clh2bs)
Riley Gaines

******************************************************[MAKE YOUR VOICE HEARD](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze6hipj11doaic1s759s2f7vjemk9g3e0ful8tbo_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpim6ob4clh2bs)******************************************************

name: Melissa Evans
subject: Washington treats my husband like redneck trash.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Evans for WV 50 MOUNTAINEER DRPRICHARD, WV 25555
body:
He was THROWN IN PRISON by Biden. Can you help?

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvernjurarg3h05tb0q82ctmpub5u7jvose3chso_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpimepj4cjh2bs)
---
Hi, this is Melissa Evans. That’s me and my husband, Derrick, at home with our four kids. If you donated to Derrick’s campaign recently, _**_thank you_**_ _**_._**_ Your support means the world to him. **The politicians in Washington D.C. hate him.** _They treat him like he's redneck trash_.
---
[**DONATE TO MY HUSBAND’S SENATE CAMPAIGN**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zefufhkuqhe6d3ek8mklulh7rusa7qkvbsprkkkg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpimepj4cjh2bs)
---
You see, many people __**THINK**__ they know Derrick’s story based on the headlines and newspapers. _“January 6th Insurrectionist.”_ _“Redneck from West Virginia.”_ The media is going to say what it wants. But I know the real Derrick, and _I want you to know him too_. Derrick was my college sweetheart. He was one of the few **pro-life conservatives** I met on campus—passionate, kind, and full of conviction.
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zr4vvg625k3uc9ge7gn8oh6ipqk4drcvjl9pqibo_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpimepj4cjh2bs)
---
When we got married, we lived a normal American life. We had kids running around. Derrick was working on homes, helping out at the family ranch, even volunteering at rehab facilities across West Virginia – __a state ripped apart by opioids and alcoholism__. On top of running for local office, he also helped coached D1 football. Beyond the wins and losses, he wanted to teach young men how to __be good fathers, American__ ____patriots, and strong leaders__. But that all changed in a blink of an eye. **The life Derrick created for our family was** **FLIPPED UPSIDE DOWN OVERNIGHT.** **A SWAT team of Biden's FBI agents****busted down our front door. ** The kids were screaming. Derrick had his hands up. **I was CONFUSED, living in a NIGHTMARE.** Then I remembered – _Derrick went to Washington DC on January 6th to PEACEFULLY contest a stolen election_. _That’s what this was all about_. The Biden Regime labeled him an “insurrectionist” and that was it. **My husband was going to prison.** We tried to fight back. We argued entrapment. We argued violation of free speech. Nothing worked. The courts REFUSED to hear it. **Derrick’s fate was SEALED. ** He would be spending his nights in a cold, dark prison cell. I would be laying in bed alone wondering how I'm going to take care of four kids by myself. Months later, when Derrick was released on good behavior, _the man I saw come home was different_. He always had an interest in politics, _but going to prison lit a fire inside of him I had never seen before_.
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zitrar0u0tfb23lksbnatlkn6muskak4qq1enbno_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpimepj4cjh2bs)
---
So when Derrick found out he was PARDONED by President Trump, and was now eligible to run for U.S. Senate, _that’s immediately what he decided to do_. **I support him 100%. ** _Do you?_
---
[**DONATE TO MY HUSBAND'S CAMPAIGN**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8a6fg22h839nts87mbukuskm9qjd2r86i1ojmgg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpimepj4cjh2bs)
---
This isn’t about “revenge” for Derrick. This is about justice. Justice for the **HUNDREDS** of Americans who were entrapped and imprisoned on Jan 6th. Justice for young girls like Laken Riley who were **MURDERED** by Joe Biden’s illegal aliens. Justice for our police officers, first responders, and military heroes who were **FIRED** over vaccine mandates. Justice for our coal miners and blue collar workers – right here in states like West Virginia – who’ve seen their livelihoods **SHIPPED** overseas. Now, I don’t know a whole lot about politics, but I know this: **Derrick’s running for Senate to look out for America's future – to look out for the people who have been IGNORED by the politicians for too long. ****He calls it the “Swamp”. ** Bottom line: _he needs your help to WIN_.
---
[**HELP MY HUSBAND WIN HIS CAMPAIGN**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zd0tcuthbvschasj8srdlmk6gqm3s0q76d3igup0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpimepj4cjh2bs)
---
Washington thinks Derrick is some low IQ redneck who belongs in jail. Even the Republicans. Fine, let them think that. Because while they sip martinis and discuss billion-dollar deals with megadonors, Derrick is out in the field talking to the people who matter most:**__Americans like YOU__**. Your support would mean so much to him. **I keep telling him he’s doing a great job, but nothing makes his day more than seeing[patriots like you chip into his campaign ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z868q3o88t9acscpg28daaqu62gphd8e16j3leb8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpimepj4cjh2bs)** **[$5, $10, $15, $20 at a time](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z437f6ds7vs1tje6bmd9ukknakk49o73ipbm09r0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpimepj4cjh2bs)[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znsikfk6m0qqhlmnumstnd33mjfln6180enfielg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpimepj4cjh2bs)[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z97hb7lbc6gohhk6lkbmkr8lahfovqlf6e3ebrbg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpimepj4cjh2bs).** Every dollar you donate helps him: **→** Hire additional staff to knock on doors (if only for a few hours). → Get on TV and radio and tell his story (WITHOUT the fake news media spin). → Send out campaign mail, brochures, yard signs, T-shirts (you name it)! **** **All of these things are CRITICAL for running a successful ground campaign – and[ __Derrick is relying on conservatives like YOU to help fund it__](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5u8al22rd895kp878gdlik0ui99a78de4vftato_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpimepj4cjh2bs) ________________.** _**Will you help my husband win his Senate campaign by rushing over $25 or more?**_
---
[**DONATE TO DERRICK'S CAMPAIGN NOW**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5j1ie3l86rpb813vtdfi9ljimttsqlovpvbr0mo_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpimepj4cjh2bs)
---
_Sincerely,_ _Melissa Evans_ _Wife of Derrick Evans_ _** **_ P.S Derrick was just telling me how much his supporters mean to him – that’s why I decided to write you this email to [** ****__ask if you can chip in $25 or more to his campaign__**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2agm49fg1rakphsei1ajctmhu986ob8oietck48_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpimepj4cjh2bs) ________[____](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zn0rq9lk4h4l9opvpq69hvldqnji16h76nin23to_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpimepj4cjh2bs)[____](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvl74shvrau4nrf8qp9hjqbje7jg7hkfcevs66d0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpimepj4cjh2bs)____. _** **_ P.P.S. Despite all of the hard times Derrick went through as one of Biden’s political prisoners, he still has his sense of humor. Look at what he wanted us to be for Halloween!
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4saikigg8ei7qi92ib716kbh8u6aa155q9ptk20_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cpimepj4cjh2bs)

Let me explain why:

As House Majority Leader, I've seen firsthand how just a few bucks from Conservatives nationwide can help win close elections. That's what helped President Trump win every swing state, keep the House in Republican control, and establish a strong Senate Majority.

I've ALSO seen how Hollywood Elites, Silicon Valley billionaires, and megadonors have bankrolled the Democrats to victory.

I'm counting on you to help me turn the tide.

name: Rep. Mike Soboleski
subject: Pushing Back Against a Radical Agenda
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://eqbp6ugbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hZ6UGCZNmQGq7uMgvB2MdRkCUgrrDTapTBZfYNBYBMJIZhL1kPUiAsK-s3h13hKgRV_LtOXUvYLGGJDjd9RREuNjew-opsRMxU8zffgVmDj1sQpzzt75MrFGYwn_uEBzYQ_nmm7M8rZwN5mMIuHcbI-fvLh5GOsd&c=YJ6FMtYhMpxnPYK-8SrFYvfWIYalGARFiIXvENwb4UwmHRFv6MgMSg==&ch=ZjaVBOfhFXrUdcda0_ww1ik8Bv_KnT7votRsJ0ZAFGBxzRlo5j_-PQ==)
---
---
| |
---
Peter,
Conservatives fighting on your behalf in the Maine Legislature are committed to pushing bold legislation to enforce immigration laws, roll back radical green energy mandates, and restore fairness to our human rights policies.
From cracking down on Title IX overreach to demanding state compliance with federal ICE detainers, we're laser-focused on reversing years of unchecked progressive policies.
Democratic leaders across the country are reeling from their worst poll numbers in over two decades -- take it from me -- the momentum is real, and it's shifting fast.
Mike Soboleski Rep. Mike Soboleski Proudly Serving House District 73
---
|
---
|
---
GOP lawmaker pushes bill that would require Maine to comply with ICE
AUGUSTA (WGME) -- A Republican lawmaker in Maine has introduced a [bill ](https://eqbp6ugbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hZ6UGCZNmQGq7uMgvB2MdRkCUgrrDTapTBZfYNBYBMJIZhL1kPUiApaI68huEBMR8ODzo05Tr1CvlyDWi3nbsH9SjAevwJvtpJgujnd0a0z7K7773EqIuizNnssZT_MNUCaxlXaz0piTDLwpVp-D_0QSC7cdohVgOcB8aH0r8qHXDciAkip9ar-0KMYzkwGebrQgl-cxlIYz34qzgP9TarzAlxk8JvBEerQrjmFt01uPtV-B5U2n7Q==&c=YJ6FMtYhMpxnPYK-8SrFYvfWIYalGARFiIXvENwb4UwmHRFv6MgMSg==&ch=ZjaVBOfhFXrUdcda0_ww1ik8Bv_KnT7votRsJ0ZAFGBxzRlo5j_-PQ==)that would require state and local agencies to cooperate with federal immigration enforcement efforts.
Rep. Mike Soboleski (R-Phillips) is sponsoring the legislation, which would ban the state from refusing to assist U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement. The proposal comes during a broader federal crackdown on immigration enforcement under the Trump administration -- a movement Soboleski says the state should support.
"What it says is, don't interfere with ICE when they're here doing their job," Soboleski said. [https://wgme.com/news/local/gop-lawmaker-pushes-bill-that-would-require-maine-to-comply-with-ice](https://eqbp6ugbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hZ6UGCZNmQGq7uMgvB2MdRkCUgrrDTapTBZfYNBYBMJIZhL1kPUiApaI68huEBMR3z4kUDI_Y37ELCpFSFEFOn-3tQxhAZj7baoj-ndKfEX30yt2cMs2EdSHufQAicD7AG48m1768jw0-khAAAO9PDr9fdZ-STqPpL6cbwOsDqFXFkptyvHM6Iy65U_T7CHP9Hul5PU7rextVa_uQ6sodr4iHJr-yMG2IczTqNNVo0e8dsm32xfEJDRmZ-VxyHQN&c=YJ6FMtYhMpxnPYK-8SrFYvfWIYalGARFiIXvENwb4UwmHRFv6MgMSg==&ch=ZjaVBOfhFXrUdcda0_ww1ik8Bv_KnT7votRsJ0ZAFGBxzRlo5j_-PQ==)

---
|
---
Rep. Soboleski Organizes Joint GOP Letter to AG Pam Bondi Calling for Review of Maine's Green Energy Policies That Violate Executive Order
Rep. Mike Soboleski (R-Phillips) penned a letter to U.S. Attorney General (AG) Pam Bondi, signed by nearly every Republican in the Maine state legislature, calling for a review of they called the Maine's burdensome, costly and unfair "clean energy" policies.
At the top of Soboleski's list is the extremely controversial Net Energy Billing policy, intended to encourage renewable energy such as solar. The program grants credits on electric bills for homeowners with solar or other renewable energy sources, but forces other Mainers to subsidize those credits through substantial rate increases.
"This system disproportionately affects lower income residents who cannot afford to invest in solar panels or participate in community solar projects, effectively forcing them to subsidize wealthier individuals who can," the letter stated. [https://www.themainewire.com/2025/04/rep-soboleski-organizes-joint-gop-letter-to-ag-pam-bondi-calling-for-review-of-maines-green-energy-policies-that-violate-executive-order/](https://eqbp6ugbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hZ6UGCZNmQGq7uMgvB2MdRkCUgrrDTapTBZfYNBYBMJIZhL1kPUiApaI68huEBMRRPpofgmqHb0XoZ_lePU7kJXVlB34Wrx3tK8aTkaetFTlGdcjlz1GZJwhoeU2dZf8o7xumttdrOGDocUC03TledAlowwtUdj8Lc9CeXK0eiY8g1PaOW_Ijb3Lhl-HEfRtz3aIDwgGxUJkpFvzf5hmLMHZf9n6VI5IeOr3nNrd6D5XGdaC2DahNQBL9NN2Pgu3SRJ3Y4VHX3P1pj-omO6qYXK-P8MKXchbuJ40mkRL_4R2SLJP-NNu-QZvrf0Ut0FCfMW2OOb0V7f-LRzwaCSKx1iWJ5vhL-dFNk3jorl7LJY=&c=YJ6FMtYhMpxnPYK-8SrFYvfWIYalGARFiIXvENwb4UwmHRFv6MgMSg==&ch=ZjaVBOfhFXrUdcda0_ww1ik8Bv_KnT7votRsJ0ZAFGBxzRlo5j_-PQ==)

---
|
---
Republican lawmakers seek changes to Maine Human Rights Act in Title IX compliance effort Proposed amendments to the antidiscrimination law revolve around transgender student-athletes' right to compete in girls and women's sports.
AUGUSTA, Maine -- Republicans in the Maine Legislature are continuing to put pressure on Gov. Janet Mills and Democrats as the state faces potential legal action after the Trump administration found the Maine Department of Education and other entities to be in violation of Title IX.
The second bill is still in the Revisors Office and hasn't been issued a Legislative Document number yet. It's being sponsored by Rep. Mike Soboleski, R-Phillips, and would need approval before being sent to committee. Soboleski's bill seeks to remove the term "gender identity" from [the Maine Human Rights Act](https://eqbp6ugbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hZ6UGCZNmQGq7uMgvB2MdRkCUgrrDTapTBZfYNBYBMJIZhL1kPUiApaI68huEBMRPnJUphcF3fUxdbhRLmuasbl6Sgl22WJ-aT8qHLtC6hKXaB7NiL5-79dO8J3rRtjSpGtifP-I6vJb29riaFoGPOavXnVJ26hOxL4Zvy3LS5g6UYCCOJRzylLWyMadNJAYZKIYOrb88j-Z4g1UFiagEUhcjGWpE8bD&c=YJ6FMtYhMpxnPYK-8SrFYvfWIYalGARFiIXvENwb4UwmHRFv6MgMSg==&ch=ZjaVBOfhFXrUdcda0_ww1ik8Bv_KnT7votRsJ0ZAFGBxzRlo5j_-PQ==).
"Every time that I've had a discussion with either a school board or anybody that's in authority. It goes back to the Maine Human Rights Act. Every piece of legislation that we brought forward, the argument's always the Maine Human Rights Act," Soboleski said. "So taking the term 'gender identity' out of the Maine Human Rights Act puts an end to it all."
[https://www.wmtw.com/article/bill-remove-gender-identity-maine-human-rights-act/64354378](https://eqbp6ugbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hZ6UGCZNmQGq7uMgvB2MdRkCUgrrDTapTBZfYNBYBMJIZhL1kPUiApaI68huEBMRD0-FByYQ4pxZpJ0NnbePztaSTN7pnUA6wGEFnPlHfTgjOxcvKEFsA5gUGZL82lGe8yg-Uu2ss9JjwBxzUPFB6XPnSk2oZvKXq08dZVCImnuwS3TMSEus3RLnHdjVhXjqJzzhrPIZAEeZd9H3lni_InqyT1obbtWcH5ruA8mys_SvbzwtOsKhPQ==&c=YJ6FMtYhMpxnPYK-8SrFYvfWIYalGARFiIXvENwb4UwmHRFv6MgMSg==&ch=ZjaVBOfhFXrUdcda0_ww1ik8Bv_KnT7votRsJ0ZAFGBxzRlo5j_-PQ==)

| |
---
| Democratic Leaders Get Worst Polling Result in Over Two Decades New polling carried out by Gallup from April 1 to 14 showed that confidence in Democratic congressional leadership has hit an all-time low since the organization has surveyed voters on the issue going back to 2001.
Just 25 percent of respondents expressed confidence in Democratic congressional leadership, down 9 points from the previous historic low of 34 percent set in 2023. The confidence level is also significantly below [Democrats](https://eqbp6ugbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hZ6UGCZNmQGq7uMgvB2MdRkCUgrrDTapTBZfYNBYBMJIZhL1kPUiApaI68huEBMRy4SMcFbfIu_ASe09Tq9P1FPo4D-mx0BRIjfcF3PU-uCuEv1p1IqHnZn21kjFveS4XfN3Fa4togjfdipRkz36d9N-UGxCTxgNmXyoMM0vnjUR6rcf50z8BQ==&c=YJ6FMtYhMpxnPYK-8SrFYvfWIYalGARFiIXvENwb4UwmHRFv6MgMSg==&ch=ZjaVBOfhFXrUdcda0_ww1ik8Bv_KnT7votRsJ0ZAFGBxzRlo5j_-PQ==)' historic average, which has been about 45 percent since 2001.
https://www.newsweek.com/democratic-leaders-get-worst-polling-result-over-two-decades-2061763

clean_body: | | | | | == | | Peter, Conservatives fighting on your behalf in the Maine Legislature are committed to pushing bold legislation to enforce immigration laws, roll back radical green energy mandates, and restore fairness to our human rights policies. From cracking down on Title IX overreach to demanding state compliance with federal ICE detainers, we're laser-focused on reversing years of unchecked progressive policies. Democratic leaders across the country are reeling from their worst poll numbers in over two decades -- take it from me -- the momentum is real, and it's shifting fast. Mike Soboleski Rep. Mike Soboleski Proudly Serving House District 73 | | GOP lawmaker pushes bill that would require Maine to comply with ICE AUGUSTA (WGME) -- A Republican lawmaker in Maine has introduced a would require state and local agencies to cooperate with federal immigration enforcement efforts. Rep. Mike Soboleski (R-Phillips) is sponsoring the legislation, which would ban the state from refusing to assist U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement. The proposal comes during a broader federal crackdown on immigration enforcement under the Trump administration -- a movement Soboleski says the state should support. "What it says is, don't interfere with ICE when they're here doing their job," Soboleski said. == | Rep. Soboleski Organizes Joint GOP Letter to AG Pam Bondi Calling for Review of Maine's Green Energy Policies That Violate Executive Order Rep. Mike Soboleski (R-Phillips) penned a letter to U.S. Attorney General (AG) Pam Bondi, signed by nearly every Republican in the Maine state legislature, calling for a review of they called the Maine's burdensome, costly and unfair "clean energy" policies. At the top of Soboleski's list is the extremely controversial Net Energy Billing policy, intended to encourage renewable energy such as solar. The program grants credits on electric bills for homeowners with solar or other renewable energy sources, but forces other Mainers to subsidize those credits through substantial rate increases. "This system disproportionately affects lower income residents who cannot afford to invest in solar panels or participate in community solar projects, effectively forcing them to subsidize wealthier individuals who can," the letter stated. == | Republican lawmakers seek changes to Maine Human Rights Act in Title IX compliance effort Proposed amendments to the antidiscrimination law revolve around transgender student-athletes' right to compete in girls and women's sports. AUGUSTA, Maine -- Republicans in the Maine Legislature are continuing to put pressure on Gov. Janet Mills and Democrats as the state faces potential legal action after the Trump administration found the Maine Department of Education and other entities to be in violation of Title IX. The second bill is still in the Revisors Office and hasn't been issued a Legislative Document number yet. It's being sponsored by Rep. Mike Soboleski, R-Phillips, and would need approval before being sent to committee. Soboleski's bill seeks to remove the term "gender identity" from ==. "Every time that I've had a discussion with either a school board or anybody that's in authority. It goes back to the Maine Human Rights Act. Every piece of legislation that we brought forward, the argument's always the Maine Human Rights Act," Soboleski said. "So taking the term 'gender identity' out of the Maine Human Rights Act puts an end to it all." == | | | Democratic Leaders Get Worst Polling Result in Over Two Decades New polling carried out by Gallup from April 1 to 14 showed that confidence in Democratic congressional leadership has hit an all-time low since the organization has surveyed voters on the issue going back to 2001. Just 25 percent of respondents expressed confidence in Democratic congressional leadership, down 9 points from the previous historic low of 34 percent set in 2023. The confidence level is also significantly below ==' historic average, which has been about 45 percent since 2001. | | | | == | | | | == | == ---|--- == | == ---|--- == | == ---|--- | | | | Maine Issues & Action PAC | PO Box 603 | Augusta, ME 04332 US | | | | | | |

As House Majority Leader, I've seen firsthand how just a few bucks from Conservatives nationwide can help win close elections. That's what helped President Trump win every swing state, keep the House in Republican control, and establish a strong Senate Majority.

I've ALSO seen how Hollywood Elites, Silicon Valley billionaires, and megadonors have bankrolled the Democrats to victory.

So when I looked at the latest FEC reports, I got a chilling feeling of what's about to come:

- The Democrats just raised _$37+ MILLION_
- They're _+1_ on the Midterm generic ballot
- Cook Political Report predicts a _Democrat House Majority_ in 2026

I'm counting on you to help me turn the tide.

body:

| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21460/6374453/a8620237716a79588e5186f47f5a344182246702/334828c011750e276fa007289585f1385b3eed2b)

---
| | |
---
| | Hey there, Meet the Tomahawk that’s a cut above the rest - a tool that perfectly merges rugged durability, slick design, and multi-purpose functionality. Please, allow us to introduce [the Steel River Tomahawk. ](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21460/6374453/7704c1e36e38cbf5631158c010f31a42b47f10d4/334828c011750e276fa007289585f1385b3eed2b) But be warned, this isn't your run-of-the-mill tool - it's a workhorse wrapped in sleek sophistication, ready to accompany you on your most exciting adventures. Crafted from top-notch forged steel, this tomahawk isn't just built to last; it's built to conquer. Its 3.5” blade provides precision cutting, chopping, and hacking capabilities. It's finished with a sexy black coating, giving it a distinct, stealthy appeal. No more unnecessary exertion - whether you're felling small trees or splitting firewood, [the Steel River Tomahawk](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21460/6374453/7704c1e36e38cbf5631158c010f31a42b47f10d4/334828c011750e276fa007289585f1385b3eed2b) is designed to work with you, not against you. name: The Flyover
subject: Military Parade, Mud at Churchill, and a Nabisco Artist
body:
The [U.S. Army will hold a military parade](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2u2zAMBeCnsTcFsv6cDBq6ZEvXjgZNUrEKKTYUJoHfvnAv7hPckSBwcL7z5zbdIJf8uP-GylHSOj348ywswm2quWSBtm_QgLi-CASXV8NlMtp4pb3SbiLIZZ9cTzExG7Y9x2F0wXo7WNsvES_gQxqDg4BAHBIQog4OB5ecM9jneKRpr92gtbfD6UIzsIWZNeA40tw5zZRlbae_a37Iwqns65vbCdfal7iIbM_O_urMtTNX2A7A8TqOJhkLd-Yq7VU3Ba3u6lulvlhqzk0Wgl2Z5JEGg2dEcpyI0FzmBBbTOZlR-75F2j65lPwMY-f0vUIu_0vIj5Z7R_MvAAD__8akhIA) in the nation’s capital on June 14 as part of its 250th birthday celebration—an event that also coincides with President Trump’s 79th birthday.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuszAUhZ_GbEHG18Y_g4dfiujQJkOXjMj4XsJtTYiMCeLtK_oKnc_ROZ--26W7eI78uF_9RC4Pc_egbYmUM6Vu4sjZp_3pk0eaVvQ5jGsKY6ekMidpTlJ36DnunS7QDUSKoCBXWV2DgQqgGJ0GpRGgxzD8q4Kta7SgmqHuB9TGky3YHWvSSF1JaaAqG-w9ge9J-mAt9kJLQs5zKr9mfuSRhrjPL0plmKciujHn5yLgv1CtUO22bWUMaczp-8iFaj_f7PV6FqqFj5tp3i9HD9qVUcDZ6kaoeln7SsD5YC6Sw-fGMfJSW6HlffIcf4_yn-y8nPoJAAD__03GdfM) | |
# Sunday, May 4, 2025

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1904, the United States officially took control of [the Panama Canal project](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGOqzAQgOHTmC5oGNuQFC6enkSXbVfaBg32EGZlbOQ4Qbn9KnuF7X99xf95na4kUdLtgzZ2dclT4uMeuVYu0yZRKpXXToUCb49A1a-P4tcJAe0J7AnMFEjiazJNcAszsm7YdYPptdWd1s3qgjEzM1n0xhJif77M4QwXXrgHH1A34t4aWDAdgNVdewkzsaaZgfwwhFkZ4CA1l_Y7S6orL_GVn1xan7cmurXW_a70P4WjwvE4jnYuUikl8fROFI57JM8Kx_-UKJ6-cuKmuLAfEqPc-0EZuG0k8Resf7rwdPgTAAD__2lvcig) in what became known as “Acquisition Day.” After buying out the failed French effort, the U.S. began work on the long-troubled canal, which finally opened to shipping in August 1914. ## DOJ Reaches Settlement in Babbitt Case
The U.S. Justice Department has reached [a settlement in principle with the family of Ashli Babbitt](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2q3DAQRp9G7rSMJP_sFioCwd0N6VKasTRrz0W2jDTexW8fNq-Q-oOPc86fr-kLOfG-_MKNvDzztNO7JhKhMm2cWLBcBxaMtJ0RJaxnCetkwXYaOg3tFJHTNbVN9E8iS64hb4a2d50zzjWrv9MQwEBHPXUtzBGHYO53Y9wDYL7D0LD_vEEHrQHonLk94ozkcCbAMAxxVi1QZMnl9p15l5We6covKreQtyb5VeSoyv1QdlR2xDl8DG5L_szKjr9zYuFQlR1j_taFMKxUNS6FaKNd9FF4D3wk0pVEEumE73qy6Lnkc1lFP3HjdCk7VsnlUm7kqNxPY00Lj74fmuLj8eaUuPaDamHZkNM_NvmvoC9v_wYAAP__zDqLog), who was killed in the House Speaker's lobby at the U.S. Capitol on Jan. 6, 2021. Babbitt's family filed the lawsuit in early 2024, seeking $30 million for her death. Financial details of the settlement weren't revealed. The lawsuit—filed on behalf of Babbitt’s estate and her husband—[alleged that U.S. Capitol Police Lt. Michael Byrd](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2uozAQhZ_GdI6MfwIULrahy7ZborE9hIkMRmZIlLdfcV_htufonE_6_j2mB1Cm7fkXVvQ8l2nDz5GRGeu0UiaG-t2hQsL1TMBxOWtcJq20k8pJZacElL-TbZKfETWaBn3b2btxpjWmWTz2brCt1Ua7vg-d6ztnhmjmMNxDSFE15K835ZRtlXKmvQ0pABoIqCB2XQrCKkzEpd5ehTZecM7f8sZ6i2Vtsl-Y90OYP0KPQo-84EI5X53QY8XnmYGpbEKPsZyVZQDmjIfQo9O9arWWr_NgiigT7lB5xY1lhJ24ZFmpsDzwWly50GNTfdo_lDMd905Y9VyBfmgN_0rf2-v_AQAA__822oX4) was negligent when he fired at Babbitt that day. An internal United States Capitol Police investigation cleared Byrd of any wrongdoing. [More than 1,500 people](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDuupDAQAE9jMiN_AL8JHGxC9jbdEDV2M_SOwchuBnH71ewVXlxSlVR_vqdvoET78zds6HnJ045XTciMZdooEUO5DygQcTsjcFjPEtbJKNNL1UvVTREo3VPXRL8gGrQNeu26wfZWW9us_sv2zgIsQYFxetDRgQsKv2Z4zMY-dEP-Y1O96rRSvdXtI86AFmZUEJyLs-gURuJc2r-Zdl5xSXd-Y2lD3prkV-ajCvtLmFGY8bqu9lXThwkzQmEKCYUZe23VoGwnzHhWyVlWZE4oL-JVLrBRumVe5JU32OWLUsIo41lof8oAB3FOslBmWfDIhauscDfFx-OilKgOTnTquQH9Dzf8o5Nvb_4FAAD__x2eigg) were criminally charged for participating in the January 6 events. Trump has granted clemency to many and commuted the sentences of several others who were imprisoned.
## Military Parade Set to Celebrate Army’s 250th
The [U.S. Army will hold a military parade](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2u2zAMBeCnsTcFsv6cDBq6ZEvXjgZNUrEKKTYUJoHfvnAv7hPckSBwcL7z5zbdIJf8uP-GylHSOj348ywswm2quWSBtm_QgLi-CASXV8NlMtp4pb3SbiLIZZ9cTzExG7Y9x2F0wXo7WNsvES_gQxqDg4BAHBIQog4OB5ecM9jneKRpr92gtbfD6UIzsIWZNeA40tw5zZRlbae_a37Iwqns65vbCdfal7iIbM_O_urMtTNX2A7A8TqOJhkLd-Yq7VU3Ba3u6lulvlhqzk0Wgl2Z5JEGg2dEcpyI0FzmBBbTOZlR-75F2j65lPwMY-f0vUIu_0vIj5Z7R_MvAAD__8akhIA) in the nation’s capital on June 14 as part of its 250th birthday celebration—an event that also coincides with President Trump’s 79th birthday. Plans call for about 6,600 soldiers, 150 vehicles, and 50 helicopters to follow a route from Arlington, Virginia, to the National Mall. [The parade will feature](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHO3CAQBOCnsTtOGMxPrqBI4-5Pm9Jaw_rYCIwFazt---gS5Qn-eqTRfPPzc_4ESrS9fkBGx2uZN7xaQmasc6ZEDPXeoULAfARgH4_q46ykMkIaIcc5AKV7HvvgVkSFukc32PFDGz1o3Uennlb54Zs3HqWRVj1BDWHV1uLyDKBNT-7dJo0cBymNHh7PsABqWFCCtzYs3SgxEJf6-FVo44hrusuJ9eFL7pOLzHvr9PdOTZ2arut6rOX3W_HOOzXtJRGTb52auB55F7E0Fv9t4h9OeEy4VGAUUPPdhDKSo1iocgxwi1i2UgV4phNFOPgWDetJHkXGvGBt4kTGClvrqwv7RSlR-7DdKF8ZKP2dyl_693TqTwAAAP__JPyUow) reenactors, demonstrations, and historical equipment spanning from the Revolutionary War through the Global War on Terror (Iraq, Afghanistan, and Syria), alongside active-duty troops and cadets from U.S. military academies. The event will require [involvement from several federal agencies](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2OnTAUBOCnMZ2vjn-4XgoXkSK6jdKlRP45wNkYjGyzV7x9RKI8wdYjjeabX-_Tu6NE-_LDbWjbnKcdXzVha1imjRI1V67DFRdxO6NrYT1LWCcJsufQc9BTdJSuSXfRzogSVYdWGP1UvRJKdasNchiM1zjLwQxPLWf_1gvv3zwowNmYjuzdBj1oAdAr8Riid6icR3DBmOiZBozUcnl8ZNrbinO68ieWR8hbl-za2lGZ-sbkyOTofLgFjyXfMZPjz5yoUahMjgYAeCs5H5U3t_-u_JaF9WzIP87tqPy_mP8j85BpDxRpX5gca8vlYmqkyNR3IYUWYKTsio3Hi1Ki-jRMw7I5Sn-ntS_9-WnlnwAAAP__MtaKzg), including those requiring security. The Army plans to have soldiers from each of its 10 divisions represented in the parade, according to a U.S. official.
## Ruth Buzzi, Sketch Comedy Actress, Dies at 88
Ruth Buzzi, who rose to fame as a comedy sketch player on _Rowan & Martin’s Laugh-In_, [died on Thursday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLuOq0AQRL8GMqxmnhBMcBNnvumGqKF7TK-Gh8aDLfvrV-wvbFgqqUrnfN2GG0qS9f4fFw4lbsPKr0fiUjgPiyQpmN87ZiReDsIyzUee5kGBsg3YBsxAKOk9mJpCZFasaw6tN05b3Wpdz8H17PsedDfFGI13Uz-S11E5bjvoyNUSzjWwYFoAq9tLTyOyxpEBJ-9prAwwSdny5XuTtcwc03t7cr5M21KnMJeyPyr9r1LXSl1xPwHO6gy5yJS4Utd8lLkZj89HGmKkpuuahMd9lrUBpFaxNlr1nrRVka0BB853ttXOxzoH2l-SkjycrwzcF5T0-13-JOwZ1E8AAAD__-MPfWY) at age 88. Buzzi was best known for playing the bitter, frumpy Gladys Ormphby during the show’s run from 1968 to 1973—a character famous for [whacking people over the head with her purse](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGO8yAQBOCnwR0RBjtOCoq_cZe_vdJazBLvHQYL1omcpz8lr3DNNCN9Gs3XbboBRUr3_7Ci5ZCnhM8akRnLtFIkhnJsUMDjunvgednLvExa6V6qXqpu8kDxmLrG24Co0TRo26E7m960xjSLVdBC15vBaWWubnDBh6DDxfnBGVDn0JB9a6pXXatUb9rT1TtAAw4VzMPgnegUeuJcTt-ZEi8Y4pEfWE5zXptoF-atCvNP6FHoMR1brvyuhB7fsNCj-oQWesTEWBgorZhY6LHsvEi3v14kPYKXMHPBWuWcV_QESXrCKoHl5SIhMBZZueQfFHpsivXbk2Kkeh5Ep-4rUPxM4j_9-LD6NwAA__-7IogE) when they annoyed her. She also had [several voice acting roles](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL3OozAQAJ8GOkf-hY_CxTXpvmuvRAu7xHsyGJklEXn6U-4VvnqkGWn-fI_fwJm3x29YKcpSxo1eRyYRquPKmQXqtUMFpPVEkDmddU6j1TYoHZT2IwLna_QtxoXIkmspmt53LjjjXJuiQ9MZDRhcp30Yhs5OHU64hOUL3IBfLcePTQftjdbBmduAE5CDiTTMfY9T4zUhS6m3v4U3SbTkqzyp3uaytjkmkf1o3K_G3ht736nsmT6osfdHycikErw2tcN1KKk8nUJqLishw6bqKUlN5_vNChahqhJVhQSSlDG97Xvt2xpxf3HOfHR94_VjBc7_2_KjYc9o_wUAAP__c-2A-A), including Suzie Kabloozie on _Sesame Street_ from 1993 to 2006, and Mama Bear on _The Berenstain Bears_.

Plans call for about 6,600 soldiers, 150 vehicles, and 50 helicopters to follow a route from Arlington, Virginia, to the National Mall. reenactors, demonstrations, and historical equipment spanning from the Revolutionary War through the Global War on Terror (Iraq, Afghanistan, and Syria), alongside active-duty troops and cadets from U.S. military academies. Ruth Buzzi, Sketch Comedy Actress, Dies at 88 Ruth Buzzi, who rose to fame as a comedy sketch player on Rowan & Martin’s Laugh-In, at age 88. Buzzi was best known for playing the bitter, frumpy Gladys Ormphby during the show’s run from 1968 to 1973—a character famous for when they annoyed her. body:
It’s your Vice President. Please keep this confidential memo between the two of us.

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/apBM/?__vbtrk=Mjg4MDc3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg4MDc3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

President Trump and I just capped off a LEGENDARY first 100 days in office.

_**Friend, allow me to set the stage for you:**_

**1.** It’s not just the 100-day mark, today happens to be our biggest deadline of the year – I’ve told President Trump I’m confident we can set a new record.

**2.** House Democrats have raised almost $40 MILLION to eliminate our MAGA majority – time to get TOUGH.

**3.** Reaching our goal of 1 million individual donors would give us a MASSIVE surge in momentum when we need it most.

So in celebration of the most powerful and successful start to a presidency in American history, I’m humbly asking you to chip in just $15.

**[DONOR FILE](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/apBM/?__vbtrk=Mjg4MDc3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg4MDc3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
**CONTRIBUTION STATUS: $0
DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT**

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW>>](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/apBM/?__vbtrk=Mjg4MDc3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg4MDc3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**

**If you can’t afford it though, PLEASE DO NOT WORRY!**

President Trump and I have been beyond grateful for your support throughout this incredible journey.

**[But even just a small sacrifice of $15 would go a long way towards Making America GREAT Once Again.>>](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/apBA/?__vbtrk=Mjg4MDc3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg4MDc3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**

Thank you and may God bless you,

## Gov. Greg Abbott Signs School Choice Bill
Gov. Greg Abbott [signed Senate Bill 2 into law](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL-OgzAMh58mbEHOX8KQ4ZZsvfVGFEiASGlTEV8pb3-iPMItlmVZn_37fm7DzaecHsu3v0eL77kMj7jXHBHjNtRpLSVPa0lTHFPONS2PGCr6gQNXFBQFOQSf8jHIJtgRQs-aaFkntVBaat2stoOxD8FEwUAyEdQ8-VkGPfaqY1ob2SR7wkCBZAwYqFYF0UM0zJsA3khDJMSQsGwtrhHj29c5H-UVt3Yq9ybbFfFZifgi3BHu9n1vf6vHEvxxLhDuKpbtINydyQh3z5ITpulsz8uEO_gUQbj74OlSXtSPY0Gk1-ASQS8TNPudcGeEMH2nOEBHuGs2G557yjlV3REJy92n_HkQ_6f1ZflfAAAA___LHYmx) Saturday afternoon, launching a statewide school choice program that allows public funds to be used for private education, virtual learning, and homeschooling. [The program](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGOwyAQRU-DO6wBY-IUFNu4y7ZbWhjGBomYCCZxcvuVvUfYZqqneXr_5zbdbExxW7_tHQ29lzxtuNeERFim6kLOyYUcHc4xpRrXDX0lO0mQPYeeg5q8jekzqcabGfxVNGjERemu10rrJphFd37Ri5aDA2GtWrRzCDN6BxblIJpojmfQgxICBPRt77sr4CDs4MEOamAK0EfKpaWAhG9bl_TJLyyty_cmmUD0qKz7YnJkctz3vT0hKnF-btjmsjI5Hg4mRzhPx-R4MvyvkL_y0wUsla8FV27nORPxo7YyOTbF-MceU4pVX5iC9W5jOt30v8VeRv4GAAD__5hMgEc) will be capped at $1 billion over the first two years, supporting approximately 100,000 students. Eligible students can receive up to $10,500 annually through education savings accounts (ESAs), while students with disabilities may receive an additional $30,000. Homeschooling families will be eligible for up to $2,000, though the exact implementation details are still being finalized. [Senate Bill 2](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAQgOGnwVui4wAHDwztwJYurdRuFoaLfRIxkUGJ8_ZV-gqdf-kb_u_zeA6ceZ0_wpVc2y9lXOlRM7VG21jjUkqOS-FIE-dceV4p1RZGBDQHMAfQYwqcn6PukpsgDbIjJ0-6V6bXfd8tjkipQQ0WT1NEK-WUzEQ6hCEhhahsx-6FgQEtJUgwR5PUAGRlsAmC1VZooMStbMe2UKM91Et-ljttx1iuXXZLa7cq1JtAL9BnmrnGsL6iQP_1I9A32ptA__mOAj0ngV4hSgvYbS7dHpwz1_4kNMzXwPmPbf-bcXf4GwAA___YgnDk) passed the Texas Senate 19-12 and the House 86-61 after years of legislative resistance. The law takes effect Sept. 1, 2025. The program is set to launch in the 2026–27 school year.
## Starbase Becomes Official Texas City
Elon Musk’s SpaceX launch site in South Texas is now [officially the City of Starbase](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOozAQhJ8GOtDa2A4ULq5Jl2uvRGt7CZYWG2FfSN7-F3mFv5qRRprRfP8e8wMjx_T8ixvZ-l7ynOgsTLXSMRe_5sx-zdGTi8wlPhOFUnGWIHUHugM1B4z8mVUbrIMwiZasuCkzaKOMaVe7kAJjBiQSzhsfAk7aKeFg8ZOYxtBGe5WBBiUECNC9DsMENAocA-CoxkYBhVjz0deVKr2xLPzJLzp6n7eW7VrrXprhTyPvjbyf59kn568XV97Ie_GRkqfL7fjVk9jnjbpS8XBYqNvz_p-xxpw6OQ7d4RNKUFKo9rBhPyNzLObWKHhuGPm7W39H62XlTwAAAP__Ca5_cg) following a Saturday vote by local residents, most of them SpaceX employees. The incorporation passed 212 to six, and SpaceX employee Bobby Peden was elected mayor. Starbase, near the U.S.-Mexico border, is the hub for SpaceX’s Starship program, supporting NASA and Defense Department missions. With city status, SpaceX [aims to streamline operations](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2uozAQxfGnMZ3R-AMHChfb0GXbLZGxJ2G0Bkd4EsjbXyWvcPuj35H-_67TNVCm7f43rOj5vJVpw6NmZMZ9qnEpJcelUMSZcq503zBVDpMG3UnoJNgpBcrvyTbJz5AG1aBXF-tM56xzzeIxDWCVsWk2MERwzsTeWaeiNSbMyTXkPxh0YJUCBV3bJTMA9ir0CUJve2EBE3HZW16Q8Qz1lt_lhXsby9pkvzA_qjB_hB6FHo_jaG_lvIRnZdo-E6FHzBiZyib0WDnsc6gov5LEXDa5Put_WR8h4ikj8bvZfXoclDNVdxEW7mug_H3j3zV6ef0TAAD__683fJo) and gain more control over closures of nearby Boca Chica Beach and State Park. [Critics argue](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOtCAUhZ8GO8wVgcGC4m_s5m-3NAiXkSzKRO6O49tvnFfY7iQn-U7O93Wf7i7ltD3-uxUtvWOZNjxqRiLcp-qXUrJfSvI4p5xremwYKrlJgFAcFAc5BZfyOckm2BnC0DVou5vUvdJS62axg9RBRaNRiTlGg300fpa9dlqBkmZokr1goEB2HXSgWhX6AdB0zgRwRhomAUOisre0IOHb1ZjP8sK99WVtsl2InpX1_5gYmRiP42j9XK8XV8_EeEUmRsxl4-tP_a68kttnV5F_aNwnOvmrEDIxNrsNzyPlnKq-MQmP1aX8GaK_6XlZ8RsAAP__YIp6gw) the move hands too much power to Musk and reduces public oversight. Local environmental groups and county officials say beach access decisions should remain under county control.
## Texas Couple Guilty in $14M Medicare Scam
A Harlingen couple pleaded [guilty to defrauding Medicare](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHSoyAURp8GO5wLAaMFxTZ22XZL5wauys5VHMCYvP1O9hX-_ptvzjl_HtMDI8d9-Y0bufqe07TTVZhqpTwVv6bEfk3R0zMyl7jsFErFSYO2EqwEMwWM_JlME9wTwqAacupuupvtTNc1qyMaEO9PGJS-aSDVW--Nsh2AMTMOponuewYWjFKgwLY23AagXmEfAHvTCwMUYk25rStVemOZ-ZNelFuftobdWutRxO2X0KPQ43Vd7d-z1OipXdJL6PEsmGQJ9S30eGShxxXzV5l26dN5MMnljFw_cju5xi0yx7TLkJgxy41C9JhJzhnPIItfaaMmu3Bc32Hp7sLAsmHk_zT1Zw1fTv8LAAD__0S_iMc) out of $14 million through their company, Southwest Medical Homepatient, which falsely billed for wheelchair parts and repairs never provided. Jeremiah and Maria Luisa Yzaguirre admitted in federal court to submitting inflated claims—including claims totaling more than $736,000 for a single beneficiary—by alleging dozens of fictitious part replacements. Investigators found the couple [used the funds to buy](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGS3CAQRL8GZagGBOwqIHCi7Jw6VM2K0TIuJLYAnU7-eteeP8F596vu9-tj_kBOvD9_4ka-fa153umsiVqjMtcl5pyWmHmhB6dU-blTqA1nDdpKsBLMHJDTNZsu-AeEUXXk1c24wTrjXBf9Oo7aADkLNCwPExQtKjyG8ebMaoLFjv0bBhaMUqDA9jYMI9Bd4T0A3s1dGKDALZe-RWr0hXVNV_6k0i9565KPrb2qGH4IPQk9nefZb1fFHfeWd87vkNDT-5XQU81Hi_IbIvSEpfGSSOjpNxXaGKPcsDDKdHBFef3B58Gl0L-CXAseQWoYwDjt-ld8dcWH18kpcXU3YeC5IafvWe3_ZH56_TcAAP__J1SK5g) cryptocurrency, luxury goods, and pop culture collectibles, including a prop from the 1986 film _Short Circuit_ and high-end LEGO sets. They will be sentenced on Aug. 4 and face up to 10 years in federal prison and $250,000 in fines.

Our weekend host, Amy Hess, has today’s national news ready for you. Click on your favorite platform below to listen or watch—and let us know what you think! | | Gov. Greg Abbott Signs School Choice Bill Gov. Greg Abbott Saturday afternoon, launching a statewide school choice program that allows public funds to be used for private education, virtual learning, and homeschooling. will be capped at $1 billion over the first two years, supporting approximately 100,000 students. Eligible students can receive up to $10,500 annually through education savings accounts (ESAs), while students with disabilities may receive an additional $30,000. Homeschooling families will be eligible for up to $2,000, though the exact implementation details are still being finalized. passed the Texas Senate 19-12 and the House 86-61 after years of legislative resistance. The law takes effect Sept. 1, 2025. The program is set to launch in the 2026–27 school year. Starbase Becomes Official Texas City Elon Musk’s SpaceX launch site in South Texas is now following a Saturday vote by local residents, most of them SpaceX employees. The incorporation passed 212 to six, and SpaceX employee Bobby Peden was elected mayor. Starbase, near the U.S.-Mexico border, is the hub for SpaceX’s Starship program, supporting NASA and Defense Department missions. With city status, SpaceX and gain more control over closures of nearby Boca Chica Beach and State Park. the move hands too much power to Musk and reduces public oversight. Local environmental groups and county officials say beach access decisions should remain under county control. Texas Couple Guilty in $14M Medicare Scam A Harlingen couple pleaded out of $14 million through their company, Southwest Medical Homepatient, which falsely billed for wheelchair parts and repairs never provided. Jeremiah and Maria Luisa Yzaguirre admitted in federal court to submitting inflated claims—including claims totaling more than $736,000 for a single beneficiary—by alleging dozens of fictitious part replacements. Investigators found the couple cryptocurrency, luxury goods, and pop culture collectibles, including a prop from the 1986 film Short Circuit and high-end LEGO sets. They will be sentenced on Aug. 4 and face up to 10 years in federal prison and $250,000 in fines. name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Inviting you to join my Steering Committee
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
I’m putting together a small Steering Committee to help shape the education platform we’re building.

[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-0pKEw)Hey Peter,
I've been spending a lot of time thinking about the state of education in America - and I keep coming back to this:
Most kids can't read or do math at grade level. They're being taught to feel ashamed of our country instead of proud of it. Woke propaganda is rampant. Classrooms are chaotic. Phones are everywhere. And our best teachers are being passed over, underpaid, and burned out.
The current system punishes excellence and promotes mediocrity. That's not just wrong - it's detrimental. The failure of our education system threatens the survival of our country in a competitive global economy.
[That's why I'm running for Governor of Ohio. Not to tinker around the edges, but to overhaul the system completely.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-0SUCMx3H_g)
Take a peek at my plan:
* Merit-based pay for teachers
* School choice for every family
* Pass a basic civics exam to graduate
* Get the cell phones out of classrooms
* Bring back the presidential fitness test
* Prioritize math, reading, & writing proficiency
* Celebrate excellence over victimhood

** _I 'm putting together a small Steering Committee to help shape the education platform we're building._** It's not a vanity title - I want real input from people who care, who are paying attention, and who want better for the next generation.
[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-1BA9Q6hYkzfcpMnFtA)[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)[If that's you, I'd love for you to be part of it.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-8lRPhpF0zw)
[The first step is simple: take a couple of minutes to complete this short survey.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-5kHvgw) It'll help me understand what matters most to you - and guide where we go next.[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
### [OFFICIAL STEERING COMMITTEE](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
[Begin the education survey ->
](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-rQ)I appreciate you being in this fight with me. We're going to turn this ship around and make Ohio a model for the rest of the country.
**- Vivek**Candidate for Governor of Ohio| | |

Columbus, OH 43201
