name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Surprising solution to Philly sheriff woes
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

Stay up to date on all of this and more when you[ subscribe to our daily email list ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f55a2f3c28&e=b7b3eddce2)and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[Radnor school board violates policy with vote to return controversial books to the library](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3428953c69&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Beth Ann Rosica_
In January, a parent in the Radnor Township School District (RTSD) challenged three books in the high school library due to explicit images, and a superintendent-appointed committee voted five to one to remove the books.

That should be the end of the story since both the parent and the superintendent followed the district policy; however, the all-Democratic school board chose to violate its existing policy and return the duly removed library books at their April meeting.

**Why It Matters**. When asked if the district had a comment about overruling the ad hoc committee’s decision, the Director of Communications parroted the superintendent’s email.

“During this month’s business meeting, the Board of Directors held a thoughtful, deliberative discussion (which you can [watch here](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=5884166d30&e=b7b3eddce2)) and voted to return the graphic novels to the high school library.”

Regardless of the deliberative discussion, the school board violated its own policy by voting to return the books to the library. The current policy does not have a provision to overrule the ad hoc committee’s decision, but the board members did it anyway.

**Quotable**. Why is the school board fighting this hard to include a book of dubious educational value that no one even reads? Superintendent Kenneth Bachelor confirmed that “Gender Queer has been in the library for six years and has never been checked out by a student except to be challenged.”

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=efe4eb266e&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Ben Mannes: The Philadelphia sheriff’s office needs a state takeover](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=46a1157766&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Ben Mannes_
From John Green’s federal conviction to Jewell Williams’s harassment scandals, straight through to Rochelle Bilal’s ongoing ethical implosions, the Philadelphia sheriff’s office has been a corruption factory for over 40 years. And the corruption is not incidental, it is systemic.

The office’s problems aren’t isolated, they are institutional. Checks and balances? They’ve failed. And federal agencies like the FBI, the U.S. Attorney, and the state Attorney General have shown no urgency to act, even when someone shot up a school using a gun sold by deputies under Bilal’s command. Meanwhile, waste, corruption, and mismanagement continues to go unchecked.

Now, Philadelphia City Council wants to disband the sheriff’s office altogether. That sounds bold — until you realize they plan to absorb its civil law enforcement duties to completely remove the constitutionally required independence of the office.

**Why It Matters**. City Council’s move to disband the sheriff’s office entirely feels like long-overdue reform, but deeper analysis shows it would subject essential civil law enforcement functions — such as property foreclosures, tax lien enforcement, and judicial sale processes — to a Council that has proven itself prone to corruption and political interference.

City Council has a long-documented history of abusing “councilmanic privilege” to block developments, hoard city-owned properties, and manipulate zoning rules. Councilmembers have even declared foreclosures and tax enforcement “racist” in broad terms, rather than addressing abuses case-by-case — signaling their willingness to politicize civil enforcement based on electoral priorities rather than the rule of law. If Council assumes control over these functions, it risks worsening neighborhood blight, deepening political patronage, and undermining public trust even further. **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c70fb3d117&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
# **3\. Lightning Round**

* **[Paul Davis: Murder by fire](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4578ffca83&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Thom Nickels: Hollywood mourns a pope they never really understood](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3ba3d19c0d&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Christine Flowers: What comes next for the Church?](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=1ce68bfbf5&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Gambescia + Bolno: The good, the ugly, and the bad of bureaucracies](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=57a3581d40&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Stu Bykofsky: Dems embarrass themselves with judicial endorsement](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c1773c80a6&e=b7b3eddce2)**

| Author John Allen reveals the shocking truths from his new bestselling book that's rocking Pennsylvania politics and making waves nationwide. You won't want to miss this exclusive interview.
---
|
---
|
# **5\. What we're reading**
Back in 2022, [we warned Pennsylvanians](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=1e49d6db6c&e=b7b3eddce2) that then-Lt. Gov. John Fetterman just might not be fit to hold office following the serious stroke that his campaign and friends in the media did their best to downplay. In his lone debate before the election, his mental [problems were clear](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=2ffff155dc&e=b7b3eddce2). But Democrats rallied behind the man and dismissed complaints from Republicans as merely partisan, or even “ableist.”

Yet in the latest “now it can be told” style article in the mainstream press, [Ben Terris of _New York_ magazine acknowledges](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=1380a2c88c&e=b7b3eddce2) that there may be some problems with this guy after all. Do tell! It’s strange how he was fine and capable when he was repeating progressive talking points, yet damaged and out of control when he takes more moderate positions. Just like Biden’s senility, it wasn’t an issue for the left until they wanted to replace him with someone even more progressive.****

Stay up to date on all of this and more when you get the best of Broad + Liberty delivered straight to your inbox. | | 1. By Beth Ann Rosica In January, a parent in the Radnor Township School District (RTSD) challenged three books in the high school library due to explicit images, and a superintendent-appointed committee voted five to one to remove the books. That should be the end of the story since both the parent and the superintendent followed the district policy; however, the all-Democratic school board chose to violate its existing policy and return the duly removed library books at their April meeting. Why It Matters. When asked if the district had a comment about overruling the ad hoc committee’s decision, the Director of Communications parroted the superintendent’s email. “During this month’s business meeting, the Board of Directors held a thoughtful, deliberative discussion (which you can ) and voted to return the graphic novels to the high school library.” Regardless of the deliberative discussion, the school board violated its own policy by voting to return the books to the library. The current policy does not have a provision to overrule the ad hoc committee’s decision, but the board members did it anyway. Quotable. Why is the school board fighting this hard to include a book of dubious educational value that no one even reads? Superintendent Kenneth Bachelor confirmed that “Gender Queer has been in the library for six years and has never been checked out by a student except to be challenged.” | | 2. By Ben Mannes From John Green’s federal conviction to Jewell Williams’s harassment scandals, straight through to Rochelle Bilal’s ongoing ethical implosions, the Philadelphia sheriff’s office has been a corruption factory for over 40 years. And the corruption is not incidental, it is systemic. The office’s problems aren’t isolated, they are institutional. Checks and balances? They’ve failed. And federal agencies like the FBI, the U.S. Attorney, and the state Attorney General have shown no urgency to act, even when someone shot up a school using a gun sold by deputies under Bilal’s command. Meanwhile, waste, corruption, and mismanagement continues to go unchecked. Now, Philadelphia City Council wants to disband the sheriff’s office altogether. name: Elise Stefanik
subject: We have an emergency on our hands
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
I had no choice but to take drastic action.
| **_EMERGENCY CORRESPONDENCE FROM THE HOUSE GOP LEADERSHIP CHAIR_**
---
Fellow Republican,
---
I don’t say this lightly, but we have a full-blow emergency on our hands.
---
**Right after we reached our end-of-month goal, I got word that the Democrats are expected to haul in MILLIONS OF DOLLARS more than we anticipated!**
---
_If we don’t act quickly, they’re going to cement a significant financial advantage over us!_
---
**So, I had no choice but to take drastic action by securing an emergency _24-HOUR DEADLINE EXTENSION_ on our 500% MATCH offer so we can continue our grassroots surge for another day. **
---
Nothing strikes fear into the hearts of Far Left radicals like millions of America First patriots rallying to defend our House majority.
---
These America Last extremists can’t win a free and fair election. Massively outspending us is the Democrats _only_ path to victory in the midterms!
---
Look, if we face them on anything close to a level playing field financially, they won’t stand a chance.
---
_But if we fall behind, they will FLIP the House, DESTROY all the progress we’ve made, IMPEACH the President, and bring America back to the days of Joe Biden and Kamala Harris._
---
_It would be the end of America as we know it._
---
[**So please, if (and only if) you’re in the position to do so, I ask that you make a grassroots contribution of ANY amount before 11:59 P.M. to take advantage of this emergency 24-hour extension – and I’ll ensure it goes _FIVE TIMES AS FAR_. **](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=227ef2cd9d454b01b7113aa0b2147d3a&_e=bkqIR-PgxoFxmbrvcuqH0zBbSGAWEAw0QUgCk9g1OEgY03B3x_vVkzIuqiVGMEQ7UfoY616ZU7r4QEGNWaWj38t0CZWsW-8d59jYqEXZklEB9fr-iESFMBmTdxnngGgR_u4RlV35Xp4iJgGy7Fv5L7D3EfShNVudzU-6vConqQu9sb-AckvEbGty5mvmMTa8YhiHF5i1lcZIwiGFp3sQK2VRiOHvYaVLUu82jb_Tb4KtyXjzp5UAwpU3GH0y0qJxTsdpy7KozYzPUp1qWCiEaUHyFx8JrhdtgvegWU_O2qaHUoVuVaouxijWQO18YVcFv3tzW3PLuupvM1__B5wpC5vACyY3M0T0eb99XzcVm3I%3D)

## Early Christian Mystical Spirituality ~ The Imaginative Conservative
How could a small “heretical Jewish sect” of little consequence convert the vast pagan empire of Rome, created and sustained by the greatest military power the world has ever known, and in such a short time? In the early Church, once a person heard the good news and expressed belief in Christ, baptism followed almost [...] [Read more](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/8qt1efFc8jw6ytXdWQpZClUJg1eAuKRcqPC3W9mXNpQrMG3EYXEFQT6Seu47A1MuV6JawxmUt-W2i0Cg1YQkbR9KKuyaaxn5pdqmT4dcRUGjMegsBChUz5na2_Plu3s_lb3oSWgDc-Z9GL7Ej_A93bymM-C4Lxx0VPnZ117-tPIMnf1OprqvXv-ommjEzyJ9fviVOFuyq30Jx0prmTxr-U35Xub8rIpDs-9TZzvuDVetaHEQ0jV1bHcPoc57MULoUvM-JH5vuyFiop-XYp8pHqd4w79LT7ur47oytpyVRafQGvRE30WXoJCDOHU5Qc9jcZMavYvsMxR3hyF0Nz04YjQZZCG1yrIypwgc/PPSN9V6B-FrAnutlcvhFuGIQ_q9KFf2n/8)

## My TCW week in review – is the Tory beast dead or just rebirthed?
WE HAVE been predicting it for a long time. Laura Perrins made her warning in October 2017 when Theresa May announced her race audits. A party that conserves nothing and uses the State as its ideological enforcement arm deserves to die. Far from renouncing May’s identity politics and state interventionism, Boris Johnson made matters worse. He doubled down on Net Zero, opened our post-Brexit borders to [...] [Read more](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/uO3VCUKXK3T9O4wyJRRhh1O4RLrEvgLUDSyekyfhPCkUPHzgTQbSiF90Anylpa0PVtfEZJE-kp3F2gsjG0Se3LP8o7gY84fEWK1cKKBvUNO9Dlhxf8G8kkOl91IpQyMQe-5TSEnniBP6kyOTtt4WVro_c1y2fS9n8TiD9g3PLq9pT_9_TDXtdMhYd4g2WSChQ3O4SFXR-MJULcSEwY6a3QylBRz5j71VVdAkg_RQ-PDQba1uHkjVxfWVpap9OWQxxRPM0BoakTWdZ-0yzizhaIuSXhZOfzhM9quJNHOaFLZuwIh3MwbhqYRxpdBjvDnD9K3GeDdf9SqecY_YRSCags_6EhvF6IY/kKmvkOgchw7IE_GMsAVOEIZwJ8BghftQ/8)

| |
## ‘Tragedy of the Commons’ – the blueprint for controlling the selfish masses
IN AN ARTICLE I wrote recently on the hidden agendas and political origins of climate change, I argued that 1968 could rightly be considered to be the zeitgeist for elite-led arguments around ‘over-population’. The Club of Rome for example, considered by John Coleman to be the driving force behind the UN/WEF drive around sustainability, came into being that year. [...] [Read more](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/P39BsmYlKZDjXb4Re_8161MnttdoCml_REE6jw6-QZHDTv_xcYjHrsrgESdgE4cQXRVrIK1hZpxNM3_FB4mjQOiYdheSCzR78M50Njja2LfQjhowAkTziGdyIyxry-fDT7ohdKncjhgTJkRMfWqGxbKJwRo0s6ptIzZq1Q6KEgVsoR31P3CG08aAbjl70t0_h5VskBkb_bnn2bsHFaWyFCBgDKcbzjl3-eJsJFQeAYLvVKyLXScWp7DqSp1GdomVyIkg-op_XvBkCwi7KWpPmIAuiIUCM1U0ZhrTdogKvI1wPFGel4i_7gaszz8LIheMVaVVz9IbmcNb_rwoZ6_OcpFNZoQLLMxoKRDazFEsIXQ/VNLnFW4QF47PCoWtp-XxJ47RNI5RbN6X/8)

## The quiet revival of English churchgoing
IT IS a common assumption that churches will continue their inexorable decline with each generation being less religious than the previous. This may not be as true as many would like to believe. Continuous Decline Since 1858, a high point in the mid-Victorian era, Christian adherence in Britain has been in near-constant decline. The short [...] [Read more](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/zqHZdXQfjTo-Vlp6BMNUr4OxgbCb3RrXwNxky3_vaoi03_vi355fKxYR5BO2QhhcgDs5_YDLbB-_v5oGJ7IG82na7r0-K0We73sMAlco7rex3152TuTaQ_viEgEgK4hVAIekodt2uANdm9hgyXbsyyO8lKbNonyr3Jo68Vs5CdSE5XG0HKsVru13d1-CtRluTHp8Vdb602SdYb1f0s2ZsV6C-8-N6mRuys_FcoNO9GsJwagFZZKey4fv27tSwKd2Q6-hedj1lI6kOY8P2OaADPMAEAXHhwzOEauxOzDz3we8JWznsyzy5LI0fC2NDvXBkA/WSFN2IUU2JRXSOn_TjibL33DS5XQSkNe/8)

## Daniel Peterson-English, victim of Mad Dan’s lockdown brutality, has died
TWO YEARS ago, we reported the terrible treatment of Daniel Peterson-English at the hands of what Paul Collits described as the ‘military police of Danistan’ (named after Premier of Australia, Daniel Andrews), who excelled themselves through their thuggery during the worst days of covid lockdowns. body:
Here's the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter for Sunday, May 4th, 2025. | | |

1️⃣ **_Iowa:_ Democrat wins special election and makes history 🎉 **
This week, Democrat Angelina Ramirez won a special election for an Iowa House seat representing Cedar Rapids. [She made history as the first Latina elected to the Iowa Legislature → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMSosKAEGOsMUmxdAGqpPGNggSvS556pSpcS2JOBAUXE55ey10OQSP1kfUVsiiL3mGkhpgaVYExx60f5Dzskwcn7QY5oeEbnOp0ZrDchgPEQYl2o-8t0wYF10EDgy6SsrO0QwQjUoeFC3EJbBNrlCaXge8f31hdF5c50-NUcsnukPNHbhwJL6TsCregQAmieKV_IzUPJDPaAOU8JrnWnVjljBrT6XnshpXZTXA9nqzvs2RjGHoYVouSgR0sXGGTU-JADM8T5oB3yirV2IxdW_Qlu7aiRK_qbo3rNubIEYd74op43osYAR0x5VCz7q86nGuwWMFYcldViytpNvau0jbrh_uQI1b5-qGr8Qe4VGqLtlb5gFJJu1lrhrmms7c-9OYQX-6tWb1NiIdIGGGi4FIEKg4xc-zPk4kCnSLYWDdU0lH8ptrUdXdqZDb773BvlmeMu1oVL8zl5GK0Pd1op0d9GDAMjS3oT1_yXDeuiSIEyDLcFHpu8GefigvGNGAo1zRhe5qsKj3ze3zoicPJgCFg-xdPoo9uMl1ouDUeY8BHhmXnCxrTY65b7jY_LAm-gyFudNuqm_iRjhrL3FJz8aJeavV2zNeW7RjnhVVfQqXyF08XZ5xekYs32OXsEEu1srpMnqYsJ7Y_oILJDVzIUO4WswZjNTn9yyAOTSr1SOHi0i/4g7/QyU5MFCgTV6m6OJigZ1iGg/h1/h001.utukv3Sqp9FAYz3SoL4HteNMYRS01gCHTzqn-_TV9_0)
2️⃣ **_Democracy Update:_ Trump attacks ActBlue **
Trump and his cronies are ruthlessly attacking ActBlue, the grassroots fundraising platform for the DLCC and other Democratic and progressive organizations. [This is a direct assault on free and fair elections and a blatant attempt to obstruct grassroots organizing → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoc5lroAYgnBM-pxs59wzI1QQhPgR5KwdxkNhrjU6fkcqacGzzIyWJ3eAN1i91YxQNJpMVngRxFjtTyNaOHXZeq4MjORves7dAm8O7XxvShcjxQj3o74f1h8Kh0Ensbl099a8f--zg8aI_I33tQay9o8cN9mqDlvqYFN2EM-GbgTxe8COGS-hl4zRI7zZegfNZR1LP7KlRFVJ-LX0HlI_f3evnHoBce0Hcm1Ublx_kLNRbKBncGgt1Yk-fSf8qM3zAJS-YHLXLUjdz2budL0bLZQ4-qPgngmPLwZL7zF6U1FdGL8mvVIfJHI2VrOC2tKnjN-6yFXwr4Nt74GPxgNHJ3XETpGd2W-5tluyeDIa1hcmBtghZAOXbV2TOZyXOnuMKwjEACVPQAntEpcmZi4cMdVmretrSMqL5UgVNLxgFGIQNr1JRdjA5iqkrRTs0HpzUO3dKW5jVcSTs5xjaZdYDdGgFZlYksWj9p3NOt9cXH5r9iFiU95ebpdZCL9v1cpkW7zev2k2B3deEw9ASWRLQcCVJQhrKfnKVpCMldlyt7fkis0l9LbR-HIoPJXDNW-s7lUe3ZhykAQZrFUlPyOMgrc/4g7/QyU5MFCgTV6m6OJigZ1iGg/h2/h001.No7qVD7f8VDm54hiUH3Kfnbi2XpMRWeTwZ1acJLXqB0)
👀 **_Watch:_ DLCC Launches Ad Highlighting 100 Days of State Democratic Wins **
This year alone, Democrats have won five majority-deciding special elections, flipped two seats Trump won by double digits, and defended Wisconsin’s liberal Supreme Court majority. [Check out the full video here → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW5urRMpuKreY0_4KS0xJ1pBrW9onqmjYxFA325rWLVO0lId7yji0dGBJwc2_Tcd7x4deLWPvPKOiumaSvZkXBp0viVUN39G9yxn5jBf40RahTeXZR2b19JzWwcGT3n6TltHL4Uhsyj1Pt7vwRktjiIEsJYkss97ty7Xp_8Ji37LQuHxcSiCUqdRhzO68d3PAUoNQ62BP7MKzDHSczl0OonekvkITBgVwwmzCNtio1ZsEBO7jtVrFMbDlEqbWozzWWzofPUjEC5tUE2z2g9Ukhk5kHN7heLhG3BNFon_PxxkGGZQ1HgoB-KuYbn5ibZ0jkKaZkRXqz_dH_dICWLQbkxZPt5G2GuMFF1k-OdE_xCyK3v-FFicO88bIQUl1EeoIL0Yf9jkCiltQH_6ortETJCF9pttn05rpg5F09bbjM6YktOnwIwN4b8hUOqt7yMlrnwtA9Ff8VI1pENvUKVPE6KTEUzT6WlqO0wAUWeuKeohgdbkTWtkAWLqfL4gju4yF_Ps-fp7g0RjgYSg15w_cFgt0pW90BdWM7OeQki3fVFY67rTwc6XerOVJbmETY_eQrgnjXXsp_YmSAqz6Xyjf53c/4g7/QyU5MFCgTV6m6OJigZ1iGg/h3/h001.sLHqraCZ71uk7oomka4DtwQzK74L3Q_yXrN8SWZBUS4)

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: I get interesting invitations
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Zombie maps with constituents
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2278%2E135344%2EKF2yqW)

One of the best parts of being a new Senator is that I get lots of interesting invitations.
Last week, I got invited to learn how to play the new zombie maps on Call of Duty Black Ops 6 after a day of meeting in Port Huron.
[**Watch the video. It was a lot of fun:**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/3725?t=2&akid=2278%2E135344%2EKF2yqW)
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/3725?t=3&akid=2278%2E135344%2EKF2yqW)
If you have a good idea to show me what your community is into, reach out to us by replying to this email.
\- Elissa
* * *

👋🏻 **Wait, before you click away!** 🇺🇸
United States Senators often keep on fundraising after their election ends, but Elissa doesn't want to keep bombarding your inbox with fundraising requests.
What we will do is send you good, timely content - like this message. Stuff you might open without dread.
But she does hope you may consider making a small, monthly recurring contribution. Even just $5 or $10 - so we don't have to send those mass fundraising emails while Elissa is focused on her work as a Senator.
[**Make a recurring contribution to Elissa Slotkin's campaign here.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1960?c0=ebs-em-may25.1ew0E2&refcode=em250504-1&t=4&akid=2278%2E135344%2EKF2yqW)

**“He ain’t a genius, he an idiot”.**
Jasmine Crockett just hissed at Elon Musk and received national applause.
Since joining President Trump's team, Elon Musk has been under attack EVERY DAY.
Delusional Democrats like Jasmine Crockett have been publicly calling for domestic terrorist attacks and launching smear campaigns against Elon, with **NO REPURCUSSIONS.**

name: Ruben Gallego for Senate
subject: They may get away with it, but they won't be able to hide it.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Watch this short clip of Ruben on Chris Hayes.
#

Republicans are doing everything they can to cut Medicaid in order to give tax cuts to Elon Musk and other billionaires.
Will they get away with it? We have to do everything in our power to make sure they don't.
Will they be able to hide it if they do? Absolutely not. If Medicaid is cut, people will see ERs and hospitals shut down and it will end up impacting families catastrophically.
[**Watch this short clip of Ruben on Chris Hayes.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/3232?t=1&akid=3851%2E734936%2EITGI8_)
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/3232?t=2&akid=3851%2E734936%2EITGI8_)
Thank you,
Team Ruben

As a Latino, Iraq War Veteran from a working class background, Ruben Gallego's voice in the fight to stop Trump's tax cut bill is critical.
He's traveling around and working hard to share the impact of these cuts to families like his.
If you understand how important Ruben's voice can be in this fight, [**please make a contribution to his re-election campaign to help him keep traveling and fighting to stop this bill.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-may25.XT1Xme&refcode=em250504-1-90&t=3&akid=3851%2E734936%2EITGI8_)

Peter,

I refuse to believe this is true...

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107061535/543487045/-80226044?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.04_Ossoff-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_NO_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2QxMDRlNS1lYjI4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RP9gl7rpg9o8B1uVVZuMohtIqhCIicBTIN2Kq9r4n2E=) _Let me lay this out, clear as day:_

I am the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won in 2024.

And the President said he’ll back Marjorie Taylor Greene to challenge me.

This Senate race in Georgia will be the most competitive and most expensive in the nation.

If you’re outraged by what’s happening to our country — and you’re ready to fight –– [**_please split $10 between my re-election campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand today._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107061536/543487046/-80226044?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.04_Ossoff-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_NO_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2QxMDRlNS1lYjI4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RP9gl7rpg9o8B1uVVZuMohtIqhCIicBTIN2Kq9r4n2E=) | | [SPLIT A DONATION >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107061538/543487047/-80226044?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.04_Ossoff-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_NO_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2QxMDRlNS1lYjI4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RP9gl7rpg9o8B1uVVZuMohtIqhCIicBTIN2Kq9r4n2E=)

Otherwise, let me remind you why I ran for Senate — and why this moment is just as urgent.

Before I was elected, I led investigations of corruption and human rights abuses worldwide. We exposed wrongdoing in countries where criticizing the government is dangerous, where whistleblowers and witnesses will only meet in secret, where protest carries the risk of prosecution.

More and more, the atmosphere under Trump reminded me of those places where dissent was silenced by intimidation.

Trump’s rise wasn’t just a crisis. It was a warning.

I ran for Senate because I saw the danger in electing someone so profoundly unfit for the presidency and I wanted to confront the corruption that made his rise possible.

I also ran — years before the Dobbs decision — because it was already clear the GOP was coming for reproductive rights. I saw Georgia as the front line in that fight. With a six-week ban now in place here, and Republicans pushing for a national abortion ban, it still is.

**Now this President is staging a power grab unprecedented in our history. In his first 100 days:**
* He’s freed violent criminals who attacked the Capitol on his behalf.
* Purged independent watchdogs across government.
* Stacked key agencies with loyalists—and called on them to investigate his political opponents.
* Defied and threatened federal judges.
* Undermined the press.
* Handed sweeping, unaccountable power to the billionaire who spent $300 million to elect him.

Trump’s goal isn’t just revenge. He wants to use the government to crush the opposition. And now, Americans are living in fear of their own government.

This is not a drill and it’s not a bad dream. As citizens, it is the test of our lifetimes.

**In 2020, the pundits said flipping a Republican Senate seat in Georgia couldn’t be done. But we built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history—and we won. That victory won the Senate majority.**

Now we must win again. And we will win again.

Just like last time, I can’t do it alone.

So I’m asking:

[**_Please split a contribution between my re-election campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand today, of $10 or any amount that works for you._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107061542/543487048/-80226044?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.04_Ossoff-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_NO_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2QxMDRlNS1lYjI4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RP9gl7rpg9o8B1uVVZuMohtIqhCIicBTIN2Kq9r4n2E=)

The average online donation to our campaign is around $30. Many give less. Some give more.

All that matters is that lots and lots of people are contributing what they can to power our grassroots campaign. Please, contribute today.
| [CONTRIBUTE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107061546/543487050/-80226044?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.04_Ossoff-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_NO_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2QxMDRlNS1lYjI4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RP9gl7rpg9o8B1uVVZuMohtIqhCIicBTIN2Kq9r4n2E=)

Jon Ossoff

clean_body: = Let me lay this out, clear as day: I am the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won in 2024. And the President said he’ll back Marjorie Taylor Greene to challenge me. This Senate race in Georgia will be the most competitive and most expensive in the nation. If you’re outraged by what’s happening to our country — and you’re ready to fight –– = | | = Otherwise, let me remind you why I ran for Senate — and why this moment is just as urgent. Before I was elected, I led investigations of corruption and human rights abuses worldwide. We exposed wrongdoing in countries where criticizing the government is dangerous, where whistleblowers and witnesses will only meet in secret, where protest carries the risk of prosecution. More and more, the atmosphere under Trump reminded me of those places where dissent was silenced by intimidation. Trump’s rise wasn’t just a crisis. It was a warning. I ran for Senate because I saw the danger in electing someone so profoundly unfit for the presidency and I wanted to confront the corruption that made his rise possible. I also ran — years before the Dobbs decision — because it was already clear the GOP was coming for reproductive rights. I saw Georgia as the front line in that fight. With a six-week ban now in place here, and Republicans pushing for a national abortion ban, it still is. Now this President is staging a power grab unprecedented in our history. In his first 100 days: He’s freed violent criminals who attacked the Capitol on his behalf. Purged independent watchdogs across government. Stacked key agencies with loyalists—and called on them to investigate his political opponents. Defied and threatened federal judges. Undermined the press. Handed sweeping, unaccountable power to the billionaire who spent $300 million to elect him. Trump’s goal isn’t just revenge. He wants to use the government to crush the opposition. And now, Americans are living in fear of their own government. This is not a drill and it’s not a bad dream. As citizens, it is the test of our lifetimes. In 2020, the pundits said flipping a Republican Senate seat in Georgia couldn’t be done. But we built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history—and we won. That victory won the Senate majority. Now we must win again. And we will win again. Just like last time, I can’t do it alone. So I’m asking: = The average online donation to our campaign is around $30. Many give less. Some give more. All that matters is that lots and lots of people are contributing what they can to power our grassroots campaign. Please, contribute today. | = Thanks for being part of this team. As always, Jon Ossoff * = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I am truly honored to have won reelection, and I promise to continue the critical work toward bipartisan solutions for New Yorkers as we enter this new term. While we had many victories in New York this election season, our fight to retake control of the Senate is far from over. = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

## Green Energy Fixation Sends Spain Dark
VALENCIA, Spain—Two modern ills converged in Europe on Monday, literally one of the darkest days in decades. name: Chris Pappas
subject: The GOP is already targeting New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund
body:
We need to act NOW to prove we’re ready for this fight.

| **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107065249/543495899/-1807370656?amount=10&refcode=NDCAF_20250504_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTkyYmQxNS1mMDI4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A4XmTzdihI0sE77Ucszbxx4wsnUCOFVn00iM4u__Zkk=)** Friend,

I’ve been overwhelmed by all the support we’ve received since launching our Senate campaign. Longtime friends and new supporters have come together in a big way to build a strong foundation for our fight for New Hampshire.

Still, we know we have a long fight ahead. Donald Trump is already weighing in on our race. That’s right: **Donald Trump, the man attacking the livelihoods of Granite Staters with his irrational tariffs, thinks he can anoint the next Senator from New Hampshire.**

We’ve created an _**Emergency Trump Response Fund**_ and are setting a bold goal to raise $100,000 to ensure we’re ready to respond to any attacks that come our way.

It’s a test of strength and it sends a message — to the GOP, to national observers, and to the deep-pocketed donors trying to buy this seat — that we’re ready to compete and win.

**[We can only reach this fundraising goal with your support. Will you split $10 between our Emergency Trump Response Fund and New Dems? Every dollar makes a real difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107065251/543495902/-1807370656?amount=10&refcode=NDCAF_20250504_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTkyYmQxNS1mMDI4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A4XmTzdihI0sE77Ucszbxx4wsnUCOFVn00iM4u__Zkk=)**

**Let’s be clear:** Republicans are already targeting New Hampshire. We know they’ll be flooding the state with corporate money and building their infrastructure to flip this seat. **Donald Trump is trying to hand pick a Republican opponent to run against me.**

National Republicans know how much is at stake in the Granite State – _and so do we._

We can’t sit on the sidelines of this fight, not with our families’s futures in jeopardy and our democracy on the line. We _have_ to win.**Our state and country are depending on us.**

**[If you’re with me, will you split a $10 donation today between our campaign New Dems to help us reach our goal and show we’re ready to keep New Hampshire’s pivotal Senate seat blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107065256/543495905/-1807370656?amount=10&refcode=NDCAF_20250504_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTkyYmQxNS1mMDI4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A4XmTzdihI0sE77Ucszbxx4wsnUCOFVn00iM4u__Zkk=)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Chris Pappas and New Dems will go through immediately: | **[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107065261/543495916/-1807370656?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=NDCAF_20250504_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTkyYmQxNS1mMDI4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A4XmTzdihI0sE77Ucszbxx4wsnUCOFVn00iM4u__Zkk=)**

clean_body: We need to act NOW to prove we’re ready for this fight. | = Friend, I’ve been overwhelmed by all the support we’ve received since launching our Senate campaign. Longtime friends and new supporters have come together in a big way to build a strong foundation for our fight for New Hampshire. Still, we know we have a long fight ahead. Donald Trump is already weighing in on our race. That’s right: Donald Trump, the man attacking the livelihoods of Granite Staters with his irrational tariffs, thinks he can anoint the next Senator from New Hampshire. We’ve created an Emergency Trump Response Fund and are setting a bold goal to raise $100,000 to ensure we’re ready to respond to any attacks that come our way. It’s a test of strength and it sends a message — to the GOP, to national observers, and to the deep-pocketed donors trying to buy this seat — that we’re ready to compete and win. = Let’s be clear: Republicans are already targeting New Hampshire. We know they’ll be flooding the state with corporate money and building their infrastructure to flip this seat. Donald Trump is trying to hand pick a Republican opponent to run against me. National Republicans know how much is at stake in the Granite State – and so do we. We can’t sit on the sidelines of this fight, not with our families’s futures in jeopardy and our democracy on the line. We have to win.Our state and country are depending on us. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Chris Pappas and New Dems will go through immediately: | = = = = = With gratitude, Chris | | Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund www.newdemactionfund.com Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 910 17th St NW Suite 1050, Washington, DC 20006 In 2022, NewDems flipped more competitive seats from red-to-blue than any other ideological caucus. Megyn Kelly **[destroyed Stephen A Smith](https://substack.com/redirect/7701de67-3e33-406f-84cf-998d835b4315?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for defending the need for DEI in America during an explosive interview on his show last week.
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/7701de67-3e33-406f-84cf-998d835b4315?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/7701de67-3e33-406f-84cf-998d835b4315?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"My problem Megyn Kelly, is how do we ignor its existence to begin with? Where it originated from?" Smith asked of the beginnings of the DEI movement. "If this nation was exorcising fairness and truly looking for the best candidates and not engaging in favoritism that favored primarily white males, then there would have been no need for DEI,... That's what I believe folks who speak against DEI, specifically on the right, are missing."
Kelly cut straight to the point, "I don't think there's anything wrong with diversity. And if I were remaking America I would make sure we had it in all forms and all places,... But that's not what DEI is. DEI is mostly focussed on the 'E' the equity, which is just a joke. Equity means you have the right to end up in the same place irrespective of how much effort goes into it!"
**["That is not an American value,"](https://substack.com/redirect/7701de67-3e33-406f-84cf-998d835b4315?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** she continued. "That is not something I value or share in at all!"
Smith fired back, "When we talk about somebody being given a hand up, my God, doesn't that qualify Megyn Kelly?!"
Watch the full clash here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/7701de67-3e33-406f-84cf-998d835b4315?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# Sovereignty Upsets Journalism to Win 151st Kentucky Derby
[](https://substack.com/redirect/12be06fc-4508-45a3-a53e-5ba74be2e911?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
In a thrilling finish at Churchill Downs, **[Sovereignty surged past the favored Journalism](https://substack.com/redirect/f539136d-d539-4376-9a31-8ab843a819f2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to claim victory in the 151st Kentucky Derby on Saturday. The rain-soaked Louisville track, muddy from persistent showers, set the stage for an unpredictable race, but Sovereignty, ridden by Venezuelan jockey Junior Alvarado, mastered the slop to finish the 1 1/4-mile course in 2:02.31.
Out of 19 contenders, Journalism, at 3-1 odds, was expected to dominate, but the colt settled for second, continuing a seven-year streak where no post-time favorite has won the Derby. The last favorite to triumph was Justify in 2018. Baeza took third, rounding out the top three.
"Sovereignty just beat Journalism to win the Kentucky Derby. Welcome to America in 2025," conservative commentator Charlie Kirk wrote on X. Conservatives and Trump supporters regularly defend the right to "national sovereignty" during debates on illegal immigration, while journalism and the media is often associated with the left and the Washington D.C. swamp, for an interesting coincidence indicated by the race results.
For Alvarado, the win marked his first Kentucky Derby triumph, a career-defining moment. Trainer Bill Mott, who celebrated his second Derby victory, had previously won in 2019 via disqualification with Country House. "This one got there the right way," Mott said, savoring Sovereignty crossing the finish line first.
The Derby, dubbed "the most exciting two minutes in sports," drew 147,406 fans who braved the dreary conditions. The race's intensity stems from its unique challenges: many 3-year-old horses, unaccustomed to the distance or the massive crowd, face a steep test.
Sovereignty's $3.1 million purse, part of the $5 million prize, capped a historic day for owner Godolphin, cementing the colt's place in Derby lore.
* * *
# **Tom McClintock SHUTS DOWN Pramila Jayapal, makes her rethink her entire career**
California Republican Tom McClintock **[called out Democrats for being guilty of the very thing](https://substack.com/redirect/865df242-e1e6-4987-b147-2f0b84f6235c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** they accuse President Trump of doing: threatening democracy.
[Watch video](https://substack.com/redirect/865df242-e1e6-4987-b147-2f0b84f6235c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/865df242-e1e6-4987-b147-2f0b84f6235c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Democrat Pramila Jayapal bemoaned Trump's executive actions, likening them to that of "a king" and asking Republicans would they be permissive of this if it were a Democrat president instead.
"When we speak of threats to democracy, what greater threat can there be than one party trying to jail it's political opponent?!" McClintok fired back, calling the Democrats out directly for their crocodile tears after they themselves launched a 4 year siege of political persecution on Trump and his supporters.
Watch the tense clash here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/865df242-e1e6-4987-b147-2f0b84f6235c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

So what are you reading?
This is one of the most common questions I receive. Going forward, I'm excited to send out this weekly update on my favorite articles of the past week. These are the writers, activists, scholars, and yes even lawyers, I'm reading to improve my understanding of the human rights issues that impact us all. I encourage you to check them out, subscribe, and share their content as well! **Let 's Address This.**
**More than 130,000 activists have joined our movement at Let 's Address This. Punch in your email below and join us!**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..yEPuQqmbnLLGxUcl451-QOrO9m3yf7Enl466bg9rlgI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=162792064)
* [Salaam Bhatti](https://open.substack.com/users/150001674-salaam-bhatti?utm_source=mentions): We must continue to call Congress and tell them they cannot make any cuts to SNAP. This piece explains what's on the line, what to say, and includes a handy way to email.
A Paycheck Away
[Republicans Wants to Force Older People and Single Moms to "Work for Food". ](https://substack.com/redirect/1d5ad4a6-ea49-4655-a309-8deabc68b4f5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Imagine having three months to find a job before your basic needs are taken away. This reconciliation season, that's exactly what Republicans are trying to do...again...
[Read more](https://substack.com/redirect/1d5ad4a6-ea49-4655-a309-8deabc68b4f5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
4 days ago * 143 likes * 12 comments * Salaam Bhatti
* [Pari & Eve, MPH](https://open.substack.com/users/215799239-pari-and-eve-mph?utm_source=mentions): An important dive into the hidden cost of abortion bans, the lives it impacts, and the devastation it creates.

Repro Ready
[The Hidden Cost of Abortion Bans](https://substack.com/redirect/f598abbb-223f-4056-933d-a89ef2a88bc4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
This piece is co-written with poverty lawyer, Salaam Bhatti, creator of A Paycheck Away. Subscribe to his work to start your journey towards ending poverty by learning about issues, exploring solutions, and ways you can act...
[Read more](https://substack.com/redirect/f598abbb-223f-4056-933d-a89ef2a88bc4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
2 days ago * 6 likes * Pari & Eve, MPH and Salaam Bhatti
* [Lindsay Meyer-Harley](https://open.substack.com/users/2859723-lindsay-meyer-harley?utm_source=mentions): The first 100 days has been a wild ride without seatbelts, so here are concrete ways to stay informed and stay sane (mostly) along the way.

Still We Rise by Lindsay Meyer-Harley
[100 days in, it might as well be 1,000](https://substack.com/redirect/d4efb410-74cb-4b45-9c5b-3895c59b5862?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Ok, so it's bad, like bad bad, but we have each other right? right? It's complicated. The obvious answer is that we're a divided country and everyone is in their silos so what's the point of speaking up...
[Read more](https://substack.com/redirect/d4efb410-74cb-4b45-9c5b-3895c59b5862?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
3 days ago * 18 likes * 2 comments * Lindsay Meyer-Harley

Latino Lens by Sylvia Salazar
[Political Kintsugi: Picking Up the Pieces and Starting Again](https://substack.com/redirect/b67422e1-722b-490e-a27c-0949fb10a19e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Equal Entrance

clean_body: A recap of my favorite reads this week that I am excited to share with you | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Thank you for being an awesome subscriber! When possible, I hope you'll consider upgrading to a $6/mo or $50/year subscription! A recap of my favorite reads this week that I am excited to share with you | | | May 4 | | | | | | | | | | | | So what are you reading? This is one of the most common questions I receive. Going forward, I'm excited to send out this weekly update on my favorite articles of the past week. These are the writers, activists, scholars, and yes even lawyers, I'm reading to improve my understanding of the human rights issues that impact us all. I encourage you to check them out, subscribe, and share their content as well! Let 's Address This. More than 130,000 activists have joined our movement at Let 's Address This. Punch in your email below and join us! : We must continue to call Congress and tell them they cannot make any cuts to SNAP. This piece explains what's on the line, what to say, and includes a handy way to email. A Paycheck Away Imagine having three months to find a job before your basic needs are taken away. This reconciliation season, that's exactly what Republicans are trying to do...again... 4 days ago 143 likes 12 comments Salaam Bhatti : An important dive into the hidden cost of abortion bans, the lives it impacts, and the devastation it creates. Repro Ready This piece is co-written with poverty lawyer, Salaam Bhatti, creator of A Paycheck Away. Subscribe to his work to start your journey towards ending poverty by learning about issues, exploring solutions, and ways you can act... 2 days ago 6 likes Pari & Eve, MPH and Salaam Bhatti : The first 100 days has been a wild ride without seatbelts, so here are concrete ways to stay informed and stay sane (mostly) along the way. Still We Rise by Lindsay Meyer-Harley Ok, so it's bad, like bad bad, but we have each other right? right? It's complicated. The obvious answer is that we're a divided country and everyone is in their silos so what's the point of speaking up... 3 days ago 18 likes 2 comments Lindsay Meyer-Harley : Thinking through the chaos in our politics--not with false hope--but with a clear-eyed belief that we can rebuild, piece by piece, if we choose to act. Latino Lens by Sylvia Salazar Have you ever heard of Kintsugi? I'd never heard of it until I watched Ted Lasso... 4 days ago 17 likes 4 comments Sylvia S : A review of the Oscar winning documentary "No Other Land," in the back drop of it being cancelled and censored in screenings nationwide. Equal Entrance Last night, I watched No Other Land, a searing documentary co-directed by Palestinian activist Basel Adra and Israeli journalist Yuval Abraham. This Oscar-winning film holds a rare 100% score on Rotten Tomatoes -- a rating many Hollywood blockbusters would envy -- and yet, it's been effectively... 2 days ago 77 likes 10 comments Ayesha Noor Before you go. I am doing everything in my power to stave off fascism under this new administration. I cannot do it alone. Subscribe below and join the movement. | | ---|---|--- Quick Ask! I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.Become a paid subscriber and join the movement. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Qasim Rashid, Esq. 1552 South Route 59 #1333 Naperville, IL 60564 ? ?

My situation is in your hands, Peter. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. _Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so _please_ read this message to the end._ My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. **But right now I have a few _SERIOUS_ challenges:**
---
**I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session.** But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has been fundraising **_BIG TIME_** while I've been working hard in our capital. **Seriously,_a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response!_**
---
Now Spanberger has an _ENORMOUS_ fundraising advantage, Peter. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage. _If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission _will_ be cut short._ **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; _please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!_**
---
[ **DONATE TO SUPPORT WINSOME >>**](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/x8GNwGre8eJU4GZuh2G0hkZY4AjF-1SLf-QrEUMBmz4QgmT-Smjw92PhFZwnXaVrpHjsSGGdZfRv8weXgOzhn0pUFwpFb31RTOo7JLjFtJMeyGuVA8sS9iWGec6pj69VRpfq0b4PAiO3JA4T_465Nhidbig2_ABX2gyK9Ll59btTNbVwcS90sFgQ6svapi3vNaHBTwBInQZX7zfhwVUjhxvAhindfquZcKhnddj9X8Z0ESWrZkmRDWA7iG1oUtCExFZwQfXTV33QVf0pR03Bdv8bl4pZUQZpLq_XQP-VJt7JXTUhmXJjapNPNOWbF9tnACTFkGlHSlKWJD1ImrSDMVT539n-u_LhuEConF121oWvkYaGlh4W67EVXJ2S1y8y1mIfMZM4UPQ8bjZKYgbqMI2yoj31NgWhZwCva6ddsaK1FcDq6Cvl0sbj4BYFdiTOSs8t68FRBN4tWtey5YNE63aEz96WgwSarbbVU-FE4HZuGiy_hZxntO1eCuZEPVa1851RStoflZ0bAZSoVh61lxFjorHKElJqhQ/-SDBN0ZU-tHYZUwASzjLRkwZbmvwuHIa/8)

Without your support, we will fall even _further_ behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism!I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. clean_body: | | | | | | | My situation is in your hands, Peter. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so please read this message to the end. My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. But right now I have a few SERIOUS challenges: I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has been fundraising BIG TIME while I've been working hard in our capital. Seriously,a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response! Now Spanberger has an ENORMOUS fundraising advantage, Peter. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage. If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission will be cut short. Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign! Without your support, we will fall even further behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism!I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. And Peter, I know we will win if we hold strong and fight this battle together. "I’m not asking you to cut a big check, all I’m asking is that you send in a few dollars to help support me and my team in this crucial battle!" If you can't afford to keep fighting for the future of our Commonwealth, our children, and our nation, "please keep me and my team in your prayers and add your endorsement today:" I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving! Ever Forward,Lt. Governor Winsome Sears Immigrant Marine First black female Lt. Governor of VA | I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. I broke records as the first black female Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, but my mission isn't over yet! It's going to take all of us conservatives working together to win. | | |

Friend, André Carson is one of the few members of Congress who consistently stands up for Palestinians’ human rights. He’s leading legislation to reinstate humanitarian aid funding to UNRWA, the UN aid group serving Palestinians. This is vitally important, especially as the Israeli government continues a two-month blockade of _any_ items from entering Gaza. Together we’re pushing back against Trump’s attacks on all of our communities, and standing up for the sacredness of all life. **But now Congressman André Carson is facing a challenger in the Democratic primary election, who’s trying to get funding from AIPAC** —the Islamophobic, anti-Palestinian group that spent over $100 million in elections last year. Most of AIPAC’s money comes from far-right billionaire donors, who keep interfering in Democratic elections. [**Will you split a donation between André Carson’s campaign and my campaign today? Congressman André Carson and I are part of a small group of Muslims serving in Congress, and together with our colleague Ilhan Omar we held the first-ever Congressional Iftar dinner to celebrate Ramadan alongside our colleagues of all faiths. We started during Trump’s term and have continued each year since.
We’re showing our colleagues in Congress that Muslims are human beings, and we’re showing Muslim Americans and other marginalized people that they belong here—in this country and in our government.
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJREqIUuf25JNBdGqqF31DVwXtnzx8yL9nrQOFuV0Cs2khI_anKeEKMksrEKdeO-9Tuljw5uqdC7rRrr-yotDIwH3xk6ue_lC4BNOvRZvDJUJVQSTXl5blzdUV_ImjaJGp18jfWIW-G51yGAWVzEovyfTcw9WoAEze-1dHNsiyiHg-9b8-STzFkP_Gi8PTjUmnpnC4zi9s_wb0vGUwi7Cr0nz4tnTGL874yGLtfGwTmpsofmf12rMu5Jm92vmoR7P3nho8hqiOJioJn3AB7xv9CFnG44F8si-QjAjFT-u-WPgaHmlJdN-FBh0ExAKS2Zv1MYCQ0EPn1m1bB1yrNPva0ezoiqCKSmuF68U1-uKeYKUWHkER3rIpc3itzU7RA7yRsh2PbM8sAI9rbSE2UGVnJ1OvvwlrtI6lGugWKQfR97RkG7m8gjVHYHMPzd2AP2UUgFbzYooch6vC9Q4RDtWQ7IG1c0TU44F6f-cryRm5AqI/4g7/_F272dntQYWN8shsWiGSAw/h8/h001.TfIWO2kvVFFGNhEam5b-R77ahxDaaGsqj8aXXq9Lba0)
Our presence and leadership matters more than ever, with anti-Muslim hate and violence growing in the United States. André Carson also created the first-ever interfaith space in Congress, as we fight for our neighbors of all faiths and backgrounds.
We’re holding immigrant rights’ workshops for our communities in coalition with local grassroots groups. Neither of us are afraid to stand up and demand the immediate release of detained students, and we will continue pushing our government to respect the constitutional rights that are meant to protect every U.S. resident.

clean_body: We don’t take money from AIPAC and we’re not afraid to stand up for everyone’s rights. | | | Friend, André Carson is one of the few members of Congress who consistently stands up for Palestinians’ human rights. He’s leading legislation to reinstate humanitarian aid funding to UNRWA, the UN aid group serving Palestinians. This is vitally important, especially as the Israeli government continues a two-month blockade of any items from entering Gaza. Together we’re pushing back against Trump’s attacks on all of our communities, and standing up for the sacredness of all life. But now Congressman André Carson is facing a challenger in the Democratic primary election, who’s trying to get funding from AIPAC —the Islamophobic, anti-Palestinian group that spent over $100 million in elections last year. Most of AIPAC’s money comes from far-right billionaire donors, who keep interfering in Democratic elections. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Andre Carson and Rashida Tlaib. | | | | | | | | | | Congressman André Carson and I are part of a small group of Muslims serving in Congress, and together with our colleague Ilhan Omar we held the first-ever Congressional Iftar dinner to celebrate Ramadan alongside our colleagues of all faiths. We started during Trump’s term and have continued each year since. We’re showing our colleagues in Congress that Muslims are human beings, and we’re showing Muslim Americans and other marginalized people that they belong here—in this country and in our government. Our presence and leadership matters more than ever, with anti-Muslim hate and violence growing in the United States. André Carson also created the first-ever interfaith space in Congress, as we fight for our neighbors of all faiths and backgrounds. We’re holding immigrant rights’ workshops for our communities in coalition with local grassroots groups. Neither of us are afraid to stand up and demand the immediate release of detained students, and we will continue pushing our government to respect the constitutional rights that are meant to protect every U.S. resident. Together we’re also fighting for affordable housing and healthcare, paid family leave, immigrants’ rights, public transportation and education, expanded Social Security benefits, and a government for the people rather than billionaires. Thank you for your support. It’s an honor to fight for you in Congress. Stay tuned for more on my latest policies, including bills co-sponsored by Congressman Carson, which mark the 50th anniversary of the end of the Vietnam War and address the multi-generational harms from the United States’ atrocities. We’ll keep holding our government accountable, and fighting for a better country and world where we can all thrive. With you in this fight, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Sat, May 3, 2025 Subject: AIPAC is the biggest source of Republican money interfering in Democratic primary elections. To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Congressman André Carson is among the few members of Congress who consistently stands up for Palestinians’ human rights, and who doesn’t take money from AIPAC. Right now he’s leading legislation to reinstate humanitarian aid funding to UNRWA, the UN group serving Palestinians. This is especially urgent as Israel’s government continues its two-month blockade, preventing any items from entering Gaza, even as thousands of aid trucks line up outside. But now André Carson has a new Democratic primary opponent, who has boasted about meeting with and seeking funding from AIPAC. During last year’s election cycle, the Islamophobic, anti-Palestinian group spent over $100 million to support lawmakers who’ll keep aiding Israel’s war crimes. Primarily funded by right-wing billionaires, AIPAC is the biggest source of Republican money interfering in Democratic primary elections. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Andre Carson and Rashida Tlaib. | | | | | | | | | While serving Indiana’s 7th congressional district, Congressman André Carson has gotten 24 bills signed into law and brought back over one billion dollars to his district. Now he’s holding rallies and workshops in his district to resist Trump’s attacks, and we’re both working with local grassroots groups to share “know your rights” information with our immigrant neighbors. Congressman Carson is also one of four Muslims now serving in Congress, including me. He and I fought Trump’s first Muslim ban, and we’ve both led legislation to lift up Muslim Americans, a community that has felt unseen for far too long. As hate crimes and other attacks against Muslim Americans are on the rise, our leadership is needed more than ever. Our presence in Congress challenges the narrative of who deserves to have a voice in our government. It sends a message to Muslim Americans and other marginalized people: You belong. Each year we hold Congressional Iftar dinners to celebrate Ramadan at the Capitol with colleagues. And last year André established Congress’ first-ever interfaith space for staff and interns, saying it “encourages interfaith engagement—a key tenant to achieving a more peaceful, understanding community.” We know that all life is precious, and we will continue fighting for a world where all people can thrive with dignity and peace. Thank you so much for your support. Grassroots donations help ensure progressive candidates have a chance against billionaires’ ever-increasing spending in our elections. In solidarity, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gwenmay2025? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gwenmay2025?]
Friends-
Can you believe this s#*t? This past Tuesday marked the 100th day of Trump 2.0 and let’s do a quick re-cap of some of the greatest hits, shall we?
1. Illegal deportation of U.S. born children
2. The proposed gutting of Medicaid and Medicare
3. A head spinning domestic policy focused on insane tariffs which will destroy the economy
4. The proposed annexation of Canada, Greenland and of course the Panama Canal
5. Elon Musk's DOGE using a chain saw to gut the federal workforce and upending decades of established precedent.
6. And
7. The
8. List
9. Goes
10. On and On
But you know what, Gwen was born for such a time and across the country, we are seeing people standing up and push back. No one wants a piece of the flaming dumpster fire that Donald Trump 2.0 is trying to grift.
That’s why we need you today – this week marked the 100th day – and we have many many more to go before next November but the check on his attempts at unbridled power start right now.
Can we count on your support? Will you pitch in at least $10 to help us refortify the blue wall here in Wisconsin? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gwenmay2025]

Together, #WeRepresent!

Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92.

In today’s society, we rely too heavily upon a dependable source of power. When disaster strikes, and power is removed from our lives - it causes complete and total chaos for all who were not smart enough to prepare for it. We don’t want that to be you - **and you shouldn’t either.** Now listen, I’m not saying go out and spend your life savings on freeze-dried food, batteries, cases of water and an underground bunker.. But I do think everyone should have these items.
---
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21459/6374453/6c34fc5d5275e309b8ba76815043aa68f02944bf/cded77ea8b546c776a674a34c5be4a69211ea8df)
---
Equipping you and your family with a few tools that will make this inevitable situation less stressful is what we’re here to provide. You can grab yours for just the cost of shipping by [clicking here.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21459/6374453/7bab703576c956b3575fb394807e11ea526584db/cded77ea8b546c776a674a34c5be4a69211ea8df) Months ago, we picked two of our Best Selling items, tossed them in our new Dry Bag, and completely sold out within the week. The feedback from our customers was so positive that we had to bring this bundle back. I’m sorry it took so long to get everything back in stock, that’s just the way she goes sometimes. If you take self reliance & preparedness seriously, [go checkout what I’m talking about.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21459/6374453/7bab703576c956b3575fb394807e11ea526584db/cded77ea8b546c776a674a34c5be4a69211ea8df) I hope this gets to you before we sell out again. Please be sure to reach out with any feedback, our team truly does value all of the input we’ve received over the years. Last chance: [tap here to just pay shipping](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21459/6374453/7bab703576c956b3575fb394807e11ea526584db/cded77ea8b546c776a674a34c5be4a69211ea8df). As always; Stay safe & God Bless.
---

This is huge!

_MSNBC_ host Rachel Maddow has covered the Trump administration every day since he took office in January! **For 100 days,** Maddow has covered Trump's disastrous policies and terrible actions. She's helping Americans understand just how dangerous this man and his MAGA cronies are acting.

And that's nothing new for Rachel Maddow. For 17 years, she has been a source of truth and accountability -- standing up to Republicans on a daily basis.

And during Trump's last presidency, we were SO grateful for the honest reporting she did.

[**_So today, we 're calling for all good Democrats in your area to sign our massive Thank You Card to Rachel Maddow by MIDNIGHT - to show our support and appreciation!_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61060?t=4&akid=23038%2E4449941%2E4X-1Ck) | [SIGN THE CARD >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61060?t=5&akid=23038%2E4449941%2E4X-1Ck)

name: Jane Fonda
subject: You’re the reason this works
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
I mean it.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107073585/543520601/1328794144?refcode=ea.63af27fd-0029-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.63af27fd-0029-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzYWYyN2ZkLTAwMjktZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BFE8H8rgOTfk6vi6apwOeVlPuTRz0CcTGmVMdZ0Tniw=&emci=b00c897a-cc26-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=63af27fd-0029-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=4823105)
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107073586/543520602/2105508926?refcode=ea.63af27fd-0029-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.63af27fd-0029-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzYWYyN2ZkLTAwMjktZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BFE8H8rgOTfk6vi6apwOeVlPuTRz0CcTGmVMdZ0Tniw=) I want to share something I’m deeply proud of: **Our average grassroots online donation to JanePAC last month was around $24.** Not $2,400 from high-powered lobbyists or billionaires trying to cozy up to power. Just $24. From teachers and nurses. From students, retirees, and working parents — people chipping in what they can to emails like this one because they believe in this fight. And let me tell you — that $24 goes a long way. It’s what helps us elect climate champions in places where Big Oil thinks they’ve already won, and it helps us build an unbreakable firewall at the state and local level against Donald Trump and his dirty agenda. **But here’s the problem: Trump and his MAGA bandwagon are actively working to dismantle _every_ protection we’ve fought for. They are gutting the EPA, boosting coal production, and handing the keys to the polluters, all to pad their profits while our communities pay the price.** I’ve been alive long enough to know that people power is the only thing that will break the fossil fuel industry’s grip on our lives. So today, I’m asking because this work is only possible when people like you step up and make it happen. **[If you believe in building climate power from the ground up, will you chip in $24 — or whatever feels right — to help keep this movement growing? Your $24 next to thousands of grassroots supporters all across the country will give our incredible candidates the resources they need to take on Big Oil — and WIN.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107073587/543520603/2105508926?amount=24&refcode=ea.63af27fd-0029-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.63af27fd-0029-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzYWYyN2ZkLTAwMjktZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BFE8H8rgOTfk6vi6apwOeVlPuTRz0CcTGmVMdZ0Tniw=)** | [**DONATE $24**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107073588/543520604/2105508926?amount=24&refcode=ea.63af27fd-0029-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.63af27fd-0029-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzYWYyN2ZkLTAwMjktZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BFE8H8rgOTfk6vi6apwOeVlPuTRz0CcTGmVMdZ0Tniw=)

[**DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107073589/543520605/2105508926?refcode=ea.63af27fd-0029-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.63af27fd-0029-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzYWYyN2ZkLTAwMjktZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BFE8H8rgOTfk6vi6apwOeVlPuTRz0CcTGmVMdZ0Tniw=)

With deep gratitude,
Jane Fonda

clean_body: I mean it. | = I want to share something I’m deeply proud of: Our average grassroots online donation to JanePAC last month was around $24. Not $2,400 from high-powered lobbyists or billionaires trying to cozy up to power. Just $24. From teachers and nurses. From students, retirees, and working parents — people chipping in what they can to emails like this one because they believe in this fight. And let me tell you — that $24 goes a long way. It’s what helps us elect climate champions in places where Big Oil thinks they’ve already won, and it helps us build an unbreakable firewall at the state and local level against Donald Trump and his dirty agenda. But here’s the problem: Trump and his MAGA bandwagon are actively working to dismantle every protection we’ve fought for. They are gutting the EPA, boosting coal production, and handing the keys to the polluters, all to pad their profits while our communities pay the price. I’ve been alive long enough to know that people power is the only thing that will break the fossil fuel industry’s grip on our lives. So today, I’m asking because this work is only possible when people like you step up and make it happen. = | = = Real climate progress won’t come from billionaires writing big checks behind closed doors. It happens when thousands of people come together to demand better. With deep gratitude, Jane Fonda | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

body:
Trump’s future as POTUS is in danger...
| **_A SECURE REPORT FROM THE DESK OF REP. ELISE STEFANIK_**
---
Fellow Republican,
---
Chuck Schumer just confirmed what we already knew...
---
**The Democrats will attempt to _IMPEACH_ President Trump if they take back control of Congress in the midterm elections! **
---
But what’s truly terrifying is just how close the Democrats are to FLIPPING the House.
---
They need to win just a handful of seats, and the latest polling shows they have a **7-POINT LEAD** over Republicans on the generic ballot despite their historically low approval ratings!
---
**_Fox News Poll: Democrats’ favorability hits new low, still favored over GOP in 2026 midterms_**
---
“If the midterm elections were today, voters would back the Democrat over the Republican candidate in their district by **7 points (49% vs. 42%)** , similar to the results in April 2017 during President Donald Trump’s first term (47% vs. 42%).”
---
Seeing polling like that makes me sick to my stomach, Fellow Republican.
---
_These are no ordinary midterm elections. If the Left retakes control of Congress, they _WILL_ baselessly impeach President Trump and attempt to remove him from office. _
---
If they’re successful, they’ll almost certainly follow that up by resuming their plot to JAIL him for LIFE as an innocent man!
---
It’s no exaggeration to say that Trump’s future as the President of the United States – _and his freedom_ – will be on the ballot next year.
---
_As the Left’s plot to REMOVE President Trump gains momentum following this polling, we need to do something drastic to show that the overwhelming majority of Americans still OPPOSE the Left’s sham impeachments._
---
**That is why I’m calling on __every__ America First patriot to join me in DEFENDING President Trump – and everything he’s already accomplished – by officially pledging your vote to America First Republicans in the midterms. **
---

body:
We didn’t receive your signature, Peter >>

|
---
Peter,

**We messaged you on Friday that we were going to send a letter to Jamie Raskin** to let him know that we support his efforts to hold Trump and Musk accountable! (We didn’t receive your name.)

Because so many Democrats were pumped to show their support, we’re going to send one more round of the letter!

[Peter, this is our chance to show the magnitude of our movement! Can you add your name now to show Jamie Raskin (and as a result, Musk and Trump) that we will not be silenced by the MAGA oligarchy?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107076480/543531507/-609596625?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20250504_EMLTR_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZjODkxZDNiLTA5MjktZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6rIrs-ZSuniFPchmDbiwPSpx2Wbgp-LPZkr81jns0eU=) | ***Please add your name before our portal closes at 11:59pm and you miss your chance to sign this time-sensitive letter!***

Thanks for signing on!
The Democracy On The Line Team

**_FWD:_**
\-----------------------------
**→ FIRST:** Elon Musk gutted federal agencies, fired thousands, and gained access to Americans’ confidential Social Security data — **all without being elected to a single office.**

**→ THEN:** Jamie Raskin introduced the** “Nobody Elected Elon Musk” **to hold him accountable for his unconstitutional attacks on democracy!
**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107076481/543531508/-609596625?amount=10&refcode=DOTL_20250504_EMLTR_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZjODkxZDNiLTA5MjktZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6rIrs-ZSuniFPchmDbiwPSpx2Wbgp-LPZkr81jns0eU=)**
**→ NOW:** They’re _**ruthlessly attacking him**_ to try to silence him and stop him from passing this critical bill!

[We’re sending a “Thank You” letter to Jamie Raskin at 9:00am tomorrow morning and we need your name on it to show he’s got the American people’s support behind him](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107076482/543531510/-609596625?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20250504_EMLTR_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZjODkxZDNiLTA5MjktZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6rIrs-ZSuniFPchmDbiwPSpx2Wbgp-LPZkr81jns0eU=)

**TO: Jamie Raskin
FROM: Peter Willis
Subject: The American people are on your side!** Dear Rep. Jamie Raskin,

Thank you for standing up against MAGA oligarchs Donald Trump and Elon Musk!

**Like so many Americans, I’m OUTRAGED by their attacks on the Constitution** — from gutting federal agencies to violating our privacy!

They must be held responsible, **that’s why I’m so grateful that you’re taking a stand by championing the “Nobody Elected Elon Musk Act.”**

As they try to silence you, please know that thousands of Americans – _including myself_ – have your back and stand with you against the MAGA regime!

[That’s why I’m chipping in $7 today to show my support for this bill and so we can keep electing amazing Democrats like you to defeat the MAGA oligarchy! »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107076485/543531512/-609596625?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20250504_EMLTR_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZjODkxZDNiLTA5MjktZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6rIrs-ZSuniFPchmDbiwPSpx2Wbgp-LPZkr81jns0eU=) | [50 SPOTS LEFT FOR Cresco DEMOCRATS: SIGN THE “THANK YOU” JAMIE RASKIN LETTER NOW »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107076486/543531514/-609596625?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20250504_EMLTR_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZjODkxZDNiLTA5MjktZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6rIrs-ZSuniFPchmDbiwPSpx2Wbgp-LPZkr81jns0eU=)

(We didn’t receive your name.) Because so many Democrats were pumped to show their support, we’re going to send one more round of the letter! = | *Please add your name before our portal closes at 11:59pm and you miss your chance to sign this time-sensitive letter! Thanks for signing on! The Democracy On The Line Team FWD: \----------------------------- → FIRST: Elon Musk gutted federal agencies, fired thousands, and gained access to Americans’ confidential Social Security data — all without being elected to a single office. → THEN: Jamie Raskin introduced the “Nobody Elected Elon Musk” to hold him accountable for his unconstitutional attacks on democracy! = → NOW: They’re ruthlessly attacking him to try to silence him and stop him from passing this critical bill! = = TO: Jamie Raskin FROM: Peter Willis Subject: The American people are on your side! Dear Rep. Jamie Raskin, Thank you for standing up against MAGA oligarchs Donald Trump and Elon Musk! Like so many Americans, I’m OUTRAGED by their attacks on the Constitution — from gutting federal agencies to violating our privacy! They must be held responsible, that’s why I’m so grateful that you’re taking a stand by championing the “Nobody Elected Elon Musk Act.” As they try to silence you, please know that thousands of Americans – including myself – have your back and stand with you against the MAGA regime! = | = X Peter Willis Democracy on the Line Please add your name before our portal closes at 11:59pm and you miss your chance to sign this time-sensitive letter! | | Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC (www.democracyonthelinepac.com) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 122 C Street NW, Suite 360, Washington, DC 20001 Please, consider making a =. We are on a path to rid our state of _toxic Thom Tillis_ and show that our state doesn’t just have incredible potential — meaningful change is possible here. In these early days of our campaign, we're not just dreaming up what could be.
