name: Josh Harder
subject: May the 4th be with you!
body:
My favorite day of the year.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107076838/543532512/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzA4OTFkM2ItMDkyOS1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qHfpHT42dLGIDHW5JZ-PAdOliJB_F1YN_T4h3_ECZGM=) | Greetings, Rebels and Jedi alike, It’s that time of the year again – **May the 4th** – and you know what that means: it’s time to channel your inner Wookie, fire up your lightsabers, and hypserspace-jump into the Star Wars galaxy. As many of you know, I’m a proud Star Wars nerd. Growing up, I read “the books” in the expanded universe. In fact, George Lucas is from Modesto, and he’s a hometown hero here in California's Central Valley. [_**I’ve been training to be a Jedi for practically my whole life, so today I’ll try using the force to get you to donate to my campaign. Let’s see if it works...**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107076839/543532513/-1759382976?&refcode=E13154-20250504-StarWars-SL-Other&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzA4OTFkM2ItMDkyOS1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qHfpHT42dLGIDHW5JZ-PAdOliJB_F1YN_T4h3_ECZGM=) **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107076841/543532514/-1759382976?&refcode=E13154-20250504-StarWars-Image-Other&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzA4OTFkM2ItMDkyOS1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qHfpHT42dLGIDHW5JZ-PAdOliJB_F1YN_T4h3_ECZGM=)** [DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107076842/543532515/-1759382976?&refcode=E13154-20250504-StarWars-SB-Other&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzA4OTFkM2ItMDkyOS1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qHfpHT42dLGIDHW5JZ-PAdOliJB_F1YN_T4h3_ECZGM=) _Hmmm... That didn’t work? name: Elise Stefanik
subject: My new leadership position
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
I want you to hear the big news directly from me.
| **__A Personal Note from Rep. Elise Stefanik on her New Leadership Position__**
---
Peter,
---
I just received the honor of being appointed to the position of Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership for the 119th Congress!
---
**This position has been used by prior Republican House leadership teams to deliver for the American people in critical moments for our country, such as the 1994 Contract with America and the 2010 Tea Party wave election.**
---
_I look forward to picking up the baton to help guide our House GOP Majority through another such moment as we execute on the mandate from the American people to pass the President’s America First agenda._
---
We’re truly on the brink of ushering in a new “Golden Age” for our country!
---
But at such a critical moment, with the very fate of America on the line, advancing the President’s agenda won’t be my only responsibility...
---

clean_body: I want you to hear the big news directly from me. | A Personal Note from Rep. Elise Stefanik on her New Leadership Position Peter, I just received the honor of being appointed to the position of Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership for the 119th Congress! This position has been used by prior Republican House leadership teams to deliver for the American people in critical moments for our country, such as the 1994 Contract with America and the 2010 Tea Party wave election. I look forward to picking up the baton to help guide our House GOP Majority through another such moment as we execute on the mandate from the American people to pass the President’s America First agenda. We’re truly on the brink of ushering in a new “Golden Age” for our country! But at such a critical moment, with the very fate of America on the line, advancing the President’s agenda won’t be my only responsibility... ...he’s also entrusted me with using this new position in House Republican Leadership to protect our razor-thin majority. We simply cannot let the Democrats FLIP the House and rob us of this historic opportunity to Make America Great Again! With the Left preparing to spend BILLIONS against us in the midterms, I have no choice but to do everything in my power to close the gap on their record-breaking war chest as quickly as possible. That is why, in my capacity as the NEW Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership, I immediately authorized a 500% MATCH on all gifts for the next hour to help us kick off my first 24 hours in this new role with our biggest fundraising surge of the year! If (and only if) you’re in the position to do so, I ask that you give any amount you can afford to take advantage of this match. Thank you and God Bless, Rep. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801 |

body:
Team —
We wanted to ensure you saw the latest update from our team: Colorado joined a lawsuit against Donald Trump over harmful tariff policies that are hurting the economy.
Jena has never been afraid to take on Donald Trump and MAGA extremists. As Attorney General, she’ll fight to protect Colorado workers, stand up for our rights, and defend our way of life.
But she can’t do it without your support. Read our message below, and donate here to stand with Jena → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2505-q2-jg?refcode=250504-email]
Thanks for being part of this team. Let’s keep up the fight!
Jena for CO

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2505-q2-jg?refcode=250504-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2505-q2-jg?refcode=250504-email]
Peter –
Colorado has joined a lawsuit against Donald Trump’s reckless tariff policies — policies that have hurt workers, businesses, and the economy.
We are proud that Colorado is stepping up, and as Attorney General, Jena will keep up the fight against Donald Trump and the extremists who threaten our rights, our freedoms, or our way of life here in Colorado.
Whether it’s reckless policies that hurt our families or dangerous attacks on our democracy, Jena will never back down from doing what’s right for Coloradans.
But we need you with us. If we’re going to build the kind of campaign that’s strong enough to take on Trump and his allies, we need grassroots support at every step. Can you chip in today and help power our fight forward? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2505-q2-jg?refcode=250504-email]

clean_body: Team — We wanted to ensure you saw the latest update from our team: Colorado joined a lawsuit against Donald Trump over harmful tariff policies that are hurting the economy. Jena has never been afraid to take on Donald Trump and MAGA extremists. As Attorney General, she’ll fight to protect Colorado workers, stand up for our rights, and defend our way of life. But she can’t do it without your support. Read our message below, and donate here to stand with Jena → [] Thanks for being part of this team. Let’s keep up the fight! Jena for CO ----- Original Message ----- [] Peter – Colorado has joined a lawsuit against Donald Trump’s reckless tariff policies — policies that have hurt workers, businesses, and the economy. We are proud that Colorado is stepping up, and as Attorney General, Jena will keep up the fight against Donald Trump and the extremists who threaten our rights, our freedoms, or our way of life here in Colorado. Whether it’s reckless policies that hurt our families or dangerous attacks on our democracy, Jena will never back down from doing what’s right for Coloradans. But we need you with us. If we’re going to build the kind of campaign that’s strong enough to take on Trump and his allies, we need grassroots support at every step. Can you chip in today and help power our fight forward? | | _Friend,_ For decades, my home state has been represented by two Democrats. I’ve spent enough time in Washington to know one thing: the system protects itself. And unless we change the players, nothing else changes. That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate — because the 2026 election is a turning point for this country, and Michigan is ground zero. | **BREAKING:** Glenn Youngkin just vetoed the Right to Contraception Act.

This is shameful, Peter. _Virginians deserve the right to decide if and when to start a family — without interference from politicians._

Make no mistake, Abigail Spanberger would sign legislation to protect access to birth control as Governor. But we cannot allow the GOP's assault on reproductive rights to go unchallenged, so we're asking top supporters to sign on by midnight. Let's be honest, Governor Youngkin’s veto is just the latest attempt to roll back our fundamental freedoms.

Since the fall of _Roe_ , Virginia has been the last remaining state in the South without further restrictions on reproductive rights — and that’s only because Democrats have held the line with a razor-thin majority in the General Assembly.

_But that line is under threat._

Earlier this year, Abigail's opponent cast the tie-breaking vote against the Right to Contraception Act as Lieutenant Governor, and she’s made clear she supports extreme bans on abortion too.

**That's why we're all united behind Abigail and joining forces to defend our reproductive rights.** [_**Click here right now to stand with Abigail Spanberger and stand up for access to reproductive health care for all Virginians >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107078902/543540254/-1636114850?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODhkMzZlMTUtMTEyOS1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ixFM4BJzeETbN0010N2zc1Xe-4UcVGMl4LRaODcH5Ug=&emci=82d36e15-1129-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=88d36e15-1129-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=8470899)

clean_body: Virginians deserve the right to decide if and when to start a family — without interference from politicians. | = | BREAKING: Glenn Youngkin just vetoed the Right to Contraception Act. This is shameful, Peter. Virginians deserve the right to decide if and when to start a family — without interference from politicians. Make no mistake, Abigail Spanberger would sign legislation to protect access to birth control as Governor. But we cannot allow the GOP's assault on reproductive rights to go unchallenged, so we're asking top supporters to sign on by midnight. | Let's be honest, Governor Youngkin’s veto is just the latest attempt to roll back our fundamental freedoms. Since the fall of Roe , Virginia has been the last remaining state in the South without further restrictions on reproductive rights — and that’s only because Democrats have held the line with a razor-thin majority in the General Assembly. But that line is under threat. Earlier this year, Abigail's opponent cast the tie-breaking vote against the Right to Contraception Act as Lieutenant Governor, and she’s made clear she supports extreme bans on abortion too. That's why we're all united behind Abigail and joining forces to defend our reproductive rights. | Thank you, Spanberger for Governor HQ * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

name: Jim Jordan
subject: It pains me to announce this…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Jordan a joint fundraising committee authorized by
body:
But the numbers don’t lie.

[https://secure.winred.com/team-jordan/516e9d0945f0a7ac/?utm_campaign=20250430&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=MAWCO&utm_term=lrm-active]

Friend,

It pains me to announce this...

But numbers don’t lie. And _these_ numbers tell a deeply troubling
story:

“HOUSE DEMOCRATIC CAMPAIGN ARM RAISES $36.9M IN FIRST QUARTER” –
_THE HILL_
[https://secure.winred.com/team-jordan/516e9d0945f0a7ac/?utm_campaign=20250430&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=MAWCO&utm_term=lrm-active]

The radical Democrats have gone on an all-out fundraising BLITZ over
the past few months.

_We saw what that meant for the recent special elections where the
Left was able to OUTSPEND us in Florida by 1000%!_

And now, I worry what it means for our TOSS-UP majority of just a
handful of seats.

When the Democrats came for our majority in November, I transferred
$2.5 MILLION of my own campaign funds to ensure we could protect key
battleground races from their massive warchest.

But after House Democrats just released their target list of
vulnerable Republicans for the midterms (_and with their fundraising
haul of nearly $40 MILLION!_), I won’t lie, my personal commitment
alone would be a mere drop in the bucket.

That’s why at this pivotal moment for our majority, I have no choice
but to turn to grassroots conservatives like YOU to take a stand with
us.

If we fail to act right now, a Democrat majority would freeze
President Trump’s agenda in the blink of an eye – and all our hard
work would be for _NOTHING_.

SO, BEFORE TONIGHT’S DEADLINE, I’M CALLING ON 2.5 MILLION PATRIOTS
TO MATCH MY 2024 COMMITMENT BY MAKING A GRASSROOTS CONTRIBUTION OF ANY
AMOUNT TO HELP DEFEND PRESIDENT TRUMP’S HOUSE MAJORITY.

MATCH MY COMMITMENT TO DEFEND OUR RAZOR-THIN HOUSE MAJORITY.

name: Mark Pukita, GFI
subject: 💥 A GIGANTIC ANNOUNCEMENT!
body:
Our grassroots conservative prayers have been answered! | | | [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=b279614caa&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|
**PLEASE READ THIS AND CONSIDER ACTING! IT WILL ONLY TAKE MINUTES BUT IS EXTREMELY IMPORTANT!**

Thank you for subscribing & staying subscribed!

**BE SURE TO HAVE YOUR FAMILY & FRIENDS "JOIN US":**

---
| [Join Us!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=206fa56666&e=5c740fa3e2 "Join Us!")
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| **MARCELL STRBICH STEPS UP TO RUN FOR OHIO SECRETARY OF STATE IN THE GOP 2026 PRIMARY ON MAY 5, 2026!**

We have a grassroots, patriot, combat veteran who has stepped up to selflessly run for Ohio Secretary of State in 2026, Marcell Strbich. Many of you know Marcell. You've heard him on the radio with Bob Frantz, Jack Windsor, and Brian Thomas. You've seen him on video with Emerald Robinson and Steve Stern. You've seen him testify at the State Capital on election integrity legislation. He can and will do the job to secure Ohio's elections and clean up Ohio's registered voter rolls, which contrary to what you hear from our current Secretary of State, are a MESS. Many of you know Marcell and personally endorse him. For those of you who don't, once you get to know him we're confident he'll have your endorsement too!

**To learn more about Marcell Strbich, go[HERE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=f126b472b6&e=5c740fa3e2) or click on the image below.

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=4f3b3d8436&e=5c740fa3e2)**

**Here's a video of what we all need to do. HINT: It's titled "DONATE • DONATE • DONATE!" and you can do it[ HERE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=430c0f348d&e=5c740fa3e2).**

---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=e56c21b026&e=5c740fa3e2 "Donate • Donate • Donate! Marcell Strbich for Ohio Secretary of State!")
---
DONATE • DONATE • DONATE! MARCELL STRBICH FOR OHIO SoS
|
---
| |
---
|
---
| | ** **

** **
**DON'T FORGET ABOUT ISSUE 2!**

* * *

**A CONTINUING

CALL TO ACTION!**

* * *
** **
**SPREAD THE WORD!
$2.5B BOND ISSUE ON
OHIO'S MAY PRIMARY BALLOT!
WHAT EVERYONE NEEDS TO KNOW!
WE MUST GET THE WORD OUT!**

---
| _<**We've left prior weeks' information on Issue 2 below just in case you missed it!** >_

**This issue is beatable!**
1) Turnout for the **May 6th PRIMARY ELECTION** is expected to be around 5% of registered Ohio voters. That's about 400,000 total votes.
2) The past 2 times a similar bond issue was on the ballot, the winning margin was 19.23%, let's round that up to 20%. That means 60% YES & 40% NO. Or, 240,000 YES votes & 160,000 NO votes. A 20% difference or 80,000 vote differential.
3) **FIRST** , if we can educate 10% of the potential YES voters & turn them to NO voters, the result would be 216,000 YES votes & 184,000 NO votes, a 24,000 vote swing. Across Ohio's 88 counties we'd need to persuade 273 YES voters to vote NO, **A VERY REASONABLE** thing to do.
4) **SECOND** , if we can activate 40,000 voters who typically don't vote in primary elections **and get them to vote** , that's a turnout increase of only 0.5%, or one-half of one percent! This is also **A VERY REASONABLE** thing for us to try to get done! It's only an additional 455 votes per county.
5) **WHEN** we do this, **WE WIN!** The final vote count would be 224,000 NO and 216,000 YES = 440,000 total votes = 5.5% turnout. Again, **A****VERY REASONABLE** objective!
**WHAT EACH OF US CAN DO TO SPREAD THE WORD AND MAKE THIS HAPPEN!**
Over the next week, **PLEASE** :
* Make 10 **social media posts** on the issue
* **Send texts** about the issue to 10 people
* **Send emails** about the issue to another (different) 10 people
* **Make calls** about the issue to 10 more (different) people
* Persuade 10 more (new) people to commit to go **to vote with you**
* Persuade 10 people not previously contacted **to make absentee (mail-in) ballot requests with your help**

_****__**Try to contact 50 DIFFERENT people.**_
If each of the 11,000+ subscribers to this email did this, we would easily defeat this **stealthy, unnecessary, costly** , $2.5B bond issue!
**LET'S MAKE IT HAPPEN!**

* * *

[**NEW**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=152d02efbf&e=5c740fa3e2)[**WEBPAGE FOR YOU TO BOOKMARK WITH RESOURCES TO HELP US ALL FIGHT ISSUE 2!**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=bcabbc2d0b&e=5c740fa3e2)

We [**PREVIOUSLY**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=5f46909335&e=5c740fa3e2) made you aware there's a bond issue on the Ohio primary election ballot in May. Now we must make sure others are aware! **EARLY VOTING STARTS APRIL 8TH!**

**HERE'S WHAT YOU CAN DO TO HELP!**

1) PLEASE **forward this message** to as many people as you can, especially those who typically would not vote in a primary election!
2) PLEASE download **[THIS GRAPHIC](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=d69ffdf7f0&e=5c740fa3e2) (same as below)** to your phone & send it to everyone you can, again, **especially those who typically would not vote in a primary election!
NEW >>>> 3)****** PLEASE **refer** as many people as you can **to the new Issue 2[WEBPAGE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=8741539e4e&e=5c740fa3e2)**!

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=ab91a6af29&e=5c740fa3e2)
**(Click the image above to download!)
BACKGROUND ON THIS BOND ISSUE**
It's for $2.5B dollars with spending limits of $250,000,000 annually. Supposedly, it's necessary for the health and well-being of Ohio's infrastructure. We'll bet most Ohioans haven't heard about it and know almost nothing about it. That's intentional. It's taxpayer abuse. A great strategy might be to vote NO on it. Here's why in a short video. Once you've watched it, please SHARE it with everyone you can!
Thank you!

**EPISODE: "Ohio's Stealthy May Bond Issue"**

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=8a05bd69b1&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
| |
**Prior Issues of This Email
You May Find Valuable**

---
|
[**CLICK HERE for access to all past issues!**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=87f2273326&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
|
---
| Thank you for being a GFI **person** as part of the GFI **network**. We're always interested in how we can do a better job of connecting patriots across Ohio. If you want to communicate, we're here!

Best regards,

**Mark Pukita
A GFI Person
mark@gfiohio.com
614-499-0599 (c)
[GFIOhio.com](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=6780e5fa22&e=5c740fa3e2)**

**Our mailing address is:**
The Grassroots Freedom Initiative4240 Hobbs Landing Dr WDublin, OH 43017-6025
[Add us to your address book](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/vcard?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/profile?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&e=5c740fa3e2&c=c92a90ef9e) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&t=b&e=5c740fa3e2&c=c92a90ef9e).

name: Elect State Dems (via DLCC.org)
subject: If you are a Democrat, please keep reading.
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
If every supporter reading this donated to support state Dems, we’d have the resources to defend and expand Democratic power from right-wing extremists in state legislatures across the map. | | |
---
| |
---|---

| 🫏 If you are a local Democrat, please continue reading.

State Democrats are facing competitive special elections over the next few months.

We're excited to invite you to our Annual Hoosier Hospitality Dinner on **Friday, June 13, 2025, at The Indiana Roof Ballroom, **a historic landmark in downtown Indianapolis. subject: Efficiency??!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
We're supposed to believe this is all in the name of efficiency...? [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107080587/543546450/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmEwYjE1YS0xNjI5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vufi4mONLHWBMRHzeD3_rpIbcULGbSWAogrcVLLKHxo=&emci=b0d1be53-be26-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=cba0b15a-1629-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

One of the top concerns Kim has been hearing from people all across our district is about the future of Social Security.

And frankly, **they have every right to be worried.**

The Social Security Administration—the agency responsible for delivering benefits to millions of Americans—is already stretched to the breaking point.

Thanks to deep staffing and resource cuts from DOGE during the Trump administration, wait times have grown longer, services have been delayed, and people are left anxious about whether they’ll get the benefits they’ve earned.

_Now, things could get even worse._

The SSA just announced plans to cut nearly 7,000 more jobs—about 12% of its workforce. That would mean even fewer people to process claims, answer calls, and support the seniors, people with disabilities, and working families who count on Social Security every single day. This is not government efficiency— _**it’s chaos.**_

And the people who are left out to dry are everyday Americans— those who paid into this system their entire lives. We simply cannot allow Social Security to be dismantled by neglect and extremists who have proven time and time again that they don't care about the people they were _hired_ to represent.

We built Social Security as a promise: that after a lifetime of hard work, no one would retire into poverty or be left without safety.

[**Kim is fighting every day in Congress to try and stop dangerous politicians from making a mockery of our government bodies and critical services that you've EARNED, but she needs you with her. Will you add your name now to demand Congress protect and strengthen Social Security and end these reckless partisan games?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107080588/543546451/-1965711477?ms=em25_250504_sspet_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&refcode=em25_250504_sspet_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&source=em25_250504_sspet_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250504_sspet_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=N1F3NqKtGQqaqCK6v4+pNFugtmqTMO9mRkUfdklLS3fNuZAHN2eu/JWCARp/KS7Xm7WvuSzuI5RmTYtFRVGWyLXhKV25EIlZMpc6D9UwpNroHbp86eLbTzkoMTQIgmezJKwOzqJmJR7d1xwU7Smo84u2x6lO58G+3PHBBgE/jVU=&refcode2=cba0b15a-1629-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmEwYjE1YS0xNjI5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vufi4mONLHWBMRHzeD3_rpIbcULGbSWAogrcVLLKHxo=&emci=b0d1be53-be26-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=cba0b15a-1629-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=15820338) [SIGN THE PETITION >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107080589/543546452/-1965711477?ms=em25_250504_sspet_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&refcode=em25_250504_sspet_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&source=em25_250504_sspet_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250504_sspet_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=N1F3NqKtGQqaqCK6v4+pNFugtmqTMO9mRkUfdklLS3fNuZAHN2eu/JWCARp/KS7Xm7WvuSzuI5RmTYtFRVGWyLXhKV25EIlZMpc6D9UwpNroHbp86eLbTzkoMTQIgmezJKwOzqJmJR7d1xwU7Smo84u2x6lO58G+3PHBBgE/jVU=&refcode2=cba0b15a-1629-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmEwYjE1YS0xNjI5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vufi4mONLHWBMRHzeD3_rpIbcULGbSWAogrcVLLKHxo=&emci=b0d1be53-be26-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=cba0b15a-1629-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=15820338) Thank you,

clean_body: We're supposed to believe this is all in the name of efficiency...? Peter, One of the top concerns Kim has been hearing from people all across our district is about the future of Social Security. And frankly, they have every right to be worried. The Social Security Administration—the agency responsible for delivering benefits to millions of Americans—is already stretched to the breaking point. Thanks to deep staffing and resource cuts from DOGE during the Trump administration, wait times have grown longer, services have been delayed, and people are left anxious about whether they’ll get the benefits they’ve earned. Now, things could get even worse. The SSA just announced plans to cut nearly 7,000 more jobs—about 12% of its workforce. That would mean even fewer people to process claims, answer calls, and support the seniors, people with disabilities, and working families who count on Social Security every single day. This is not government efficiency— it’s chaos. And the people who are left out to dry are everyday Americans— those who paid into this system their entire lives. We simply cannot allow Social Security to be dismantled by neglect and extremists who have proven time and time again that they don't care about the people they were hired to represent. We built Social Security as a promise: that after a lifetime of hard work, no one would retire into poverty or be left without safety. Thank you, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat. | = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: When the chips are down, who do you want in your corner?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
We work for Mark, and we’ll be the first to tell you it’s easy to get a little lost in his accomplishments. He’s an impressive guy.
#

Team,
We work for Mark, and we’ll be the first to tell you it’s easy to get a little lost in his accomplishments. He’s an impressive guy.
Combat pilot. Astronaut. Senator.
But behind each of those titles came thousands and thousands of hours of hard work. Mark didn’t just get handed an attack aircraft when he joined the Navy. They didn’t fasttrack him through astronaut training, or immediately greenlight his missions to space. And winning his two campaigns was four years of seven day weeks and twenty four hour days.
And as Mark went through his training, his missions, and his campaigns, he always had help. He had wingmen, aircrew, and leaders supporting him as a pilot. He had his crew and all of NASA working to make sure each of his missions to space were successful. And in each of his campaigns he had massive teams of staff, volunteers, and supporters working to get him across the finish line.
You definitely want somebody like Mark in your corner when the chips are down. But if he’s going to be able to continue fighting back against Trump, Elon, and the rest of the MAGA Right, he still needs our help.
**Mark still needs you. And if he can still count on your support, could you show him by chipping in a donation**

body:
Trump’s future as POTUS is in danger...
| **_A SECURE REPORT FROM THE DESK OF REP. ELISE STEFANIK_**
---
Peter,
---
Chuck Schumer just confirmed what we already knew...
---
**The Democrats will attempt to _IMPEACH_ President Trump if they take back control of Congress in the midterm elections! **
---
But what’s truly terrifying is just how close the Democrats are to FLIPPING the House.
---
They need to win just a handful of seats, and the latest polling shows they have a **7-POINT LEAD** over Republicans on the generic ballot despite their historically low approval ratings!
---
**_Fox News Poll: Democrats’ favorability hits new low, still favored over GOP in 2026 midterms_**
---
“If the midterm elections were today, voters would back the Democrat over the Republican candidate in their district by **7 points (49% vs. 42%)** , similar to the results in April 2017 during President Donald Trump’s first term (47% vs. 42%).”
---
Seeing polling like that makes me sick to my stomach, Peter.
---
_These are no ordinary midterm elections. If the Left retakes control of Congress, they _WILL_ baselessly impeach President Trump and attempt to remove him from office. _
---
If they’re successful, they’ll almost certainly follow that up by resuming their plot to JAIL him for LIFE as an innocent man!
---
It’s no exaggeration to say that Trump’s future as the President of the United States – _and his freedom_ – will be on the ballot next year.
---
_As the Left’s plot to REMOVE President Trump gains momentum following this polling, we need to do something drastic to show that the overwhelming majority of Americans still OPPOSE the Left’s sham impeachments._
---
**That is why I’m calling on __every__ America First patriot to join me in DEFENDING President Trump – and everything he’s already accomplished – by officially pledging your vote to America First Republicans in the midterms. **
---

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21084?t=1011&refcode=email-20250504_v&akid=8398%2E5885482%2ERmJUL0 ]Our Revolution logo

BREAKING: On Thursday night Trump signed an Executive Order directing the
Corporation for Public Broadcasting (CPB) to "cease federal funding for
NPR and PBS."

That’s not all: Congress is expected to vote any day now on a request for
Public Broadcasting to GIVE BACK more than $1 BILLION in already allocated
funding.This is all-out war on public media and today is an urgent
all-hands-on-deck moment.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21084?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250504nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8398%2E5885482%2ERmJUL0 ]Can you urgently chip in right now to power our work to SAVE PUBLIC MEDIA
from Trump and MAGA extremism?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25233?source=email-20250504&t=1061&akid=8398%2E5885482%2ERmJUL0 ]Headline: Trump signs executive order to stop federal funding for NPR
and PBS.

Trump’s request to Congress to rescind $1 billion in funding is FAR from a
foregone conclusion: after a MASSIVE mobilization by this community,
including two rallies outside of NPR HQ, some Republican lawmakers are
starting to have second thoughts.

At least two members of Congress from Iowa and Nebraska just expressed
concern about the wisdom of defunding trusted public media outlets their
constituents rely on. We just need a few more to stop Trump from defunding
public media and momentum is on our side – but we haven’t won yet.

We need to keep up this fight and make it clear to vulnerable Republicans
that defunding PBS and NPR is unacceptable. We’re delivering our voices on
the Hill, bird-dogging members of Congress, and making this massive in the
media.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21084?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20250504nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8398%2E5885482%2ERmJUL0 ]Can you urgently chip in right now to power our work mobilizing our 57,000
strong Citizen Army, taking to the streets in Washington, D.C., and
rallying lawmakers, to protect public media from Trump and MAGA extremism?

The stakes couldn't be higher. Trump's allies in Congress want to silence
independent media so that they can get away with spreading lies and
disinformation even more freely. But when public broadcasting is silenced,
the fact is that it’s rural communities, elderly Americans, and children
who most pay the price.

Trump and his MAGA backers may think they can get away with destroying
public media, but public outrage about their radical proposal to gut PBS
and NPR funding is making some conservative lawmakers nervous.

Our Revolution is standing between Trump's misinformation agenda and
independent media sources. We’re mobilizing volunteers, organizing
petitions, and turning people's protests into real political pressure in
Washington.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25233?source=email-20250504&t=1060&akid=8398%2E5885482%2ERmJUL0 ]But we can't sustain our fight without your help. Chip in what you can
today and let's stand together to protect PBS and NPR.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

* * *
The Trump regime is withholding federal funding to critical disability protection groups in various states. Essential services have stopped, leaving countless individuals without the support they desperately need.
The Developmental Disabilities Assistance and Bill of Rights Act of 1975 mandated protection and advocacy agencies in every state to support the rights of people with disabilities, but organizations in New Jersey and Arkansas have had their funding shorted by Republicans.
A leaked [HHS report](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.T4f1s0H8aL8dqpmq959YtN8RmvlR8WKqbsYKc3Jt4pZPBeHWrpc_B5QQxE1WQseB_m-Fhz1Mxab9sM9ADA0Ul3Ogh3sIhPxGJGG8NBtbw0wpIn7JfrROLr2foRsjyStB_PfvVaY66HKgda_qH87sgkhrjyVbe1X_BXFVZBmIU4k51EsDxGdZPXUVlIIztGkY6ZzEuHfyZklknVFhyO2J2dpAKizvQcOod_nopwEiTMwlDiNVV-33epfz8PbMr1MEMxEWxe6scG2MlXFoF7bWvdQ1hx_2gFZkr4yjz5q4j__lEwvsqARXx7DJDqf5bPrtiqfsphsLvSAMIOwMDy-7RAwbmDzbz78s2sWgV7LZ2ScTWD1l_pZBAzIEIkfwSWJsWyRtW8cXDrm2ry6ktORwfg/4g7/I4XLLwmuRryeCz_yxl68lw/h2/h001.7l_wkxtNEwyfgViq-MLWWFrbA8NDWhacfdudZbTv1BA) suggests they plan to stop funding for all protection and advocacy agencies.
**At Able Dems, we believe in the power of representation and the vital importance of electing Democrats with disabilities and their allies who will champion the services that serve as lifelines for millions.**
**[Join us in advocating for leaders who will prioritize the rights and well-being of every individual— chip in and help us make a difference today!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXO2FiuxEhBk3zsUTCYW6F8lB7-RffhngK16Xoh7-Vi8mCV83GPCXTMCuw80xUVzkwnw33C4uU0c9MwTKhLah5SPBOaAfJOh_p3q__YgHT5Ik42R6iMErPDzyqqzUNrMRynYRm_D2IfouJFYZA10HaYN2SDqX6wJ7U3A-xDI3Br8TZ479dpkjEjUlPjrEkjXAv9rhKgkq_PqvBcQMPFThi3gl0oMG7rWyyxhuaTDwiS_df18Ry7yqyRozRbQ_7AUC3JU9WmWWF9AqmDpZrS91IUdl47yPCX-13vfgKbYwOy-ODlaI3e5gIyGCley6YahbtoFZieIoj5PdG3tWrxppXmXVjzi7Wpes7fh6260WwOnK4/4g7/I4XLLwmuRryeCz_yxl68lw/h3/h001.bsMe1oGerx2Y6GeLshgZKu0ZfsAjXAgfcPnQVUR7CfU)**

clean_body: | | | Trump defunds groups that help the disabled community! The Trump regime is withholding federal funding to critical disability protection groups in various states. Essential services have stopped, leaving countless individuals without the support they desperately need. The Developmental Disabilities Assistance and Bill of Rights Act of 1975 mandated protection and advocacy agencies in every state to support the rights of people with disabilities, but organizations in New Jersey and Arkansas have had their funding shorted by Republicans. A leaked suggests they plan to stop funding for all protection and advocacy agencies. At Able Dems, we believe in the power of representation and the vital importance of electing Democrats with disabilities and their allies who will champion the services that serve as lifelines for millions. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. We are at a crossroads as a society - will we be heading to a future where people with disabilities do not receive the support they need? This is a crisis that cannot be ignored. We must elect compassionate and empathetic representatives who respect the dignity of all individuals, ensuring that everyone has access to the resources and support necessary for a fulfilling life. ** Together, we can work towards a future where all voices are heard and respected in our political landscape. -Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. name: Team Sharice
subject: It is unacceptable that the federal government is still denying full equality
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
As Kansas’ first-ever openly LGBTQ+ Congressperson, this legislation is personal to Sharice

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107081999/543551170/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmE1N2JjYS0xYzI5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ESLuBe-ioi_q8GnEnKxe42obfHm8r-OwH0AMV1MEKgM=) Despite all the attempts by right-wing extremists to vilify LGBTQ+ people, this actually isn’t controversial: The vast majority of the American people fundamentally believe in equality. We believe in full, equal protection under the law. And we believe that _no one_ should face discrimination because of who they are or who they love. **That’s why Sharice was proud to help reintroduce the _Equality Act_ on the House floor earlier this week — so that our laws finally reflect that basic belief.** [_**We’ll tell you more about why this legislation is so important and so personal to Sharice, but if you already know you’re with her, will you sign your name as a Citizen Cosponsor of her _Equality Act_ right now?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107082000/543551171/241954838?refcode=email_050425_Equality-act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmE1N2JjYS0xYzI5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ESLuBe-ioi_q8GnEnKxe42obfHm8r-OwH0AMV1MEKgM=&emci=d1083d38-5627-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=1ba57bca-1c29-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=22117458) | | [Become a Sponsor →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107082001/543551172/-331316939?refcode=email_050425_Equality-act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmE1N2JjYS0xYzI5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ESLuBe-ioi_q8GnEnKxe42obfHm8r-OwH0AMV1MEKgM=&emci=d1083d38-5627-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=1ba57bca-1c29-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=22117458)
---
As Kansas’ first-ever openly LGBTQ+ Congressperson, this legislation is personal to Sharice. Right now, in a majority of states across the country, including Kansas, it is still legal to discriminate against LGBTQ+ folks in housing, education, health care, and nearly every aspect of day to day life.
But the _Equality Act_ would change that. If we get this legislation past the finish line, it would extend federal civil rights protections to members of the LGBTQ+ community, and ensure that every American can enjoy their most basic human rights, no matter what state they reside in.
It is unacceptable that in 2025, the federal government is still denying full equality to LGBTQ+ Americans — and that’s why we’re counting on your help.

We believe in full, equal protection under the law. And we believe that no one should face discrimination because of who they are or who they love. That’s why Sharice was proud to help reintroduce the Equality Act on the House floor earlier this week — so that our laws finally reflect that basic belief. | | As Kansas’ first-ever openly LGBTQ+ Congressperson, this legislation is personal to Sharice. Right now, in a majority of states across the country, including Kansas, it is still legal to discriminate against LGBTQ+ folks in housing, education, health care, and nearly every aspect of day to day life. But the Equality Act would change that. If we get this legislation past the finish line, it would extend federal civil rights protections to members of the LGBTQ+ community, and ensure that every American can enjoy their most basic human rights, no matter what state they reside in. It is unacceptable that in 2025, the federal government is still denying full equality to LGBTQ+ Americans — and that’s why we’re counting on your help. | It is long past time for this commonsense bill to become law, so thank you for using your voice. Running for statewide office in a big state like California isn’t easy.
There’s no way around it: campaigns here just have to do a higher volume of voter contact to win. That means spending more money on everything from staff to TV ads.
In recent election cycles, winning campaigns in California have spent tens of millions of dollars.
To elect Katie as our next governor, we have a little over a year to raise the resources we need.

body:
We’re entering the next phase of our campaign and the stakes couldn’t be higher. Here’s why >>> | | | Friend, **Today marks _six months_ until Election Day.**

That’s six months to protect everything we’ve fought for.

**And today I’m asking you for something specific:_[_Just $6._](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/8mI28Mb8xOA2hkQ_WHQWnsRymTDovZFcqtQL09YZ63UJaI8VFZTDbDhoQYGaG1ZdAS1Dpz0teqrfSOWsAt7S-7qa91DaVIG0Adn979y6LubVyTJ5sIy_r8YPIVz8604mZk09X4oh1sQRrYKddlvH6d2yyZqLxIP21v2Ivwf5sgEDClqI7_iOj055ZTI7tJQKoBKKNIQGxAqCMVnECm_NQ2TwZWCPfCnJXEQYplgvVS20sjx_keLu_0hiOTdv-1obkRLYbCIeNRHBZGuZ3TjStP3du6SWoV_5KcIGkK7TqX6pSTcxscY4oFcy41pO2Usphm8VVl4a_eGvlpQ4015bAGin6gx1jSx2bNHg-gzxL575L24tY5ay1t0p9Qto9IRhRXkHIAI/WPCsvy44nBidDITmaxqkTD4aavh7DAq3/8)_**

_Because even a small amount can make a BIG difference at the right time._

How do I know? In 2021, we won by the narrowest of margins — less than one percent of the vote.

And every day since, I’ve delivered real results: partnering with law enforcement, taking down violent criminals, protecting our kids from fentanyl and Big Tech, and defending the rights of parents and families across Virginia. That small difference on Election Day made a big impact for years to come.
__
---
[**LET’S DO IT AGAIN — CHIP IN $6 NOW** ](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/jR9pnDbRvMWoc4zjbbo1pvKSzYwbZFL2OQ1i61FRmyhTPprYYlyKYxSG3ORWu9mN11ZoLpvQ3iL_KKcMPMudEx5-n41iS_yb9EM6BPn2h5IwrcF5qITbHIkmWEd8xYV9HJzDUCmmXHov9sU7Ph_T_2SSnbonjynFXYD1OrRH1QKDtK7ygu7ZMDPrhT9VBK8LbSd2OjTUSSZmDKEGZy9p-If0C9SChtr7dXbnIQ-MlRkeZGDe_EGBqSvBJZJ5JiBweVlrA5Wn0Ye8SE10JQW3T2qUo5gwUYRxlE-5X56byz4eSOuJS6XOI16ivNbTWvVq7pGNSWpWcIHFj7asOC7p0kP403XKeBMzIeQSG3tfKLnHx5zibVXOsjhhCrB4LlK3TjD0r8c/ij6phtV6YEI-35iJqxyjJ4XOl5Q50ao4/8)
---
_**And it’s more urgent than ever, friend, because the far-left is returning with a vengeance.**_

National liberal groups are pouring millions into Virginia to flip this seat. They want an AG who’ll go soft on crime, push their radical agenda, and stop the progress we’ve made.

_**[We can’t let that happen.](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/2QcEPBpwRBRrDD2BQMyfarv115JU8J1dQrNNFhP1TCYwQKgLIWv0AmUVqZcN94kjZR_Fxa7-zK2SSllgs8uBSBHA7r0BRFlYu8AvMXZ5wdvZwCBQFrvuC9sRDQ7_E3R8iGnaTVkvCYKnZn8rldCvtfrBtrqfNRVhyFJ2y0HgKBnaNm9ru2iv_zrb6X3jzRRCUe-NBfs9LbHoIFpWXAt0oOVxVXF0VrlyHfpSvKcjl2mP_1RdRk23-8zVLPgHCvnBQjZyKlLnAysoFowNGg9LK0KwffGiJpUYk3f_Cejw5zbsBUpGW8nKOOFCWsSGgAxdaftI9kYLtW5U2Yt6G0eNA8sk8J0qFzk6iLdXfkHtKMLnwbLf5amu3m3ffUE/2LEmHTpQWHmP0Lf-yi9AcDHd6VmrGPDM/8)**_

That’s why I need you with me right now. This campaign will be won or lost in the next six months. From here on out, we’re sprinting until Election Day. Every single donation counts.

_**If you’ve been waiting for the right time to get off the sidelines and chip in to our campaign... _THIS IS IT._**_

**Pitch in now and let’s keep Virginia safe and strong, friend. Let’s go win this — together.**
__
---

name: Jason Johnson
subject: Police officer used as a pawn for a special election
body:
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f04697335d5a4403b3325e2ee0833b83&_e=GAAHkKecI3sCoAaymxF4zr4mnZbmbEKLf_SxPj2f4qhSq7qfsMP_8zgM8jKfklxhY5vEKxghYMMRzDEKfAKmf9MsVAViYJ6LEaHYdHsmrLTRmaNBDUkOBxNjFuIqJ08yqkuKs-bHHlPkYuBw5zmK7-tLkNC-av7JUPyNujxTLwITJcuD1R72iunvApCP8AWYvd5d_uxBcWzYmupWnBjDbOjA4gn1eD0bWPcE9Y47dkQ60WUw3Bo1ZMCQ9NTqgljiVaioGe0Fo0lNHEHfbtxeDjjMuDNpGn7VWfbMnw99sJdmhDUxZ4LxQR29RCyB0htLlxTXi_EqBu6zHdgndywRAaVfjg0DEMNFsiUZ5RoSQVye_qAD_5WvDR3xs3js_0Ng9aXWbOHCMifA9WetfeSquw%3D%3D)
---
Dear Patriot , I’m reaching out to you today because another brave police officer is being targeted by a vicious political attack -- one that could cost him everything.
---
| | Sergeant Robert Warrington is **facing unjust charges of Attempted Second-Degree Murder and First-Degree Assault** , because** ** Soros-backed prosecutor **Aisha Braveboy** saw his case as an opportunity to advance her political agenda. **[We’re running out of time to act, and your response is critical](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f04697335d5a4403b3325e2ee0833b83&_e=GAAHkKecI3sCoAaymxF4zr4mnZbmbEKLf_SxPj2f4qhSq7qfsMP_8zgM8jKfklxhY5vEKxghYMMRzDEKfAKmf9MsVAViYJ6LEaHYdHsmrLTRmaNBDUkOBxNjFuIqJ08yqkuKs-bHHlPkYuBw5zmK7-tLkNC-av7JUPyNujxTLwITJcuD1R72iunvApCP8AWYvd5d_uxBcWzYmupWnBjDbOjA4gn1eD0bWPcE9Y47dkQWbd5kGx_snlGJqyO4t1cTRmn854XMSNm2u6Hq1Pc6fJoemkyUQ-JscbuYRJe8aM6KajIfDI8F5r7QoX1gF1uI7b81uUwgrWSITGXW7CLLAuxfh2Cm5xDCZ_ig6ydEMMJaIbyBSF5AVlQCx16aymlG80j9_cd5HIrRKUtjdQLdXA%3D%3D),** but first let me share what happened.Last September, while on routine patrol, Sgt. Warrington noticed a car pulled over on the side of the highway and stopped to help.
---
| [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f04697335d5a4403b3325e2ee0833b83&_e=GAAHkKecI3sCoAaymxF4zr4mnZbmbEKLf_SxPj2f4qhSq7qfsMP_8zgM8jKfklxhY5vEKxghYMMRzDEKfAKmf9MsVAViYJ6LEaHYdHsmrLTRmaNBDUkOBxNjFuIqJ08yqkuKs-bHHlPkYuBw5zmK7-tLkNC-av7JUPyNujxTLwITJcuD1R72iunvApCP8AWYvd5d_uxBcWzYmupWnBjDbOjA4gn1eD0bWPcE9Y47dkS5jotlIfaloFuLgvdvXf7zQ8F1d3FcP8CT3SWJCzh6hCo_E6sMSXJDd82jJTaLQJXsnTlPRRfgRI0SxcMnMLCkI3wHkAXGxlkkibJREL7eR7DM-vNrHt_XWpwdpxVEwdGYO4_ZVN2D-Y-d6G5DClhSd207oRlwGBPtJZfdvEOfOg%3D%3D)
---
| | As he approached, he saw a man walking toward the car with his hand suspiciously near his waistband.Sgt. Warrington asked the man if he was there to help, but the man didn’t respond. Just as the man passed, he suddenly turned toward the officer and reached into his coat, pulling out a black object.Fearing for his life and acting on his training, Sgt. Warrington drew his firearm and discharged a single shot. It didn’t hit anyone.Afterwards, he discovered the man was unarmed. But with mere seconds -- either react or be killed -- his training and experience told him to act fast.Now, he is facing trumped up criminal charges that fail to recognize the facts of the case. Friend, the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF) is doing everything we can to scrape together enough money to help Robert with his legal fees. **[**Will you help us defend this honest man with a $35 donation today?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f04697335d5a4403b3325e2ee0833b83&_e=GAAHkKecI3sCoAaymxF4zr4mnZbmbEKLf_SxPj2f4qhSq7qfsMP_8zgM8jKfklxhY5vEKxghYMMRzDEKfAKmf9MsVAViYJ6LEaHYdHsmrLTRmaNBDUkOBxNjFuIqJ08yqkuKs-bHHlPkYuBw5zmK7-tLkNC-av7JUPyNujxTLwITJcuD1R72iunvApCP8AWYvd5d_uxBcWzYmupWnBjDbOjA4gn1eD0bWPcE9Y47dkQbHZUOqHXw07pq2MtT9P90fXmSZp2NXN5cVcWWUw0UsY_CcGG6rn6ilj8LVqA4TitTTHQT3T4Immlc6_1Wkf6uCZvlVgpw1IVNG4yJgkM7yGCZ97GhaFLkko5dYZOMfSnjZprZE_Z5bOcYbDnwiriyCLO3p4Y_MFOQF3BAfGr9Yw%3D%3D)**_Robert's case is as political as it gets._ A Soros-backed prosecutor, looking to make a name for herself during a special election, decided to make him the target of her campaign by charging him with attempted murder.This is a corrupt abuse of power.And now LELDF is doing everything they can to clear Robert’s good name. As a non-profit we support and defend law enforcement officers who have devoted their lives to upholding the Constitution and serving the United States and its citizens.We also educate the public about the many risks and threats to law enforcement officers -- like sham prosecutions by left wing prosecutors.Sgt. Warrington noticed a car pulled over on the side of the highway and stopped to help. | | | As he approached, he saw a man walking toward the car with his hand suspiciously near his waistband.Sgt. Warrington asked the man if he was there to help, but the man didn’t respond. Just as the man passed, he suddenly turned toward the officer and reached into his coat, pulling out a black object.Fearing for his life and acting on his training, Sgt. Warrington drew his firearm and discharged a single shot. It didn’t hit anyone.Afterwards, he discovered the man was unarmed. But with mere seconds -- either react or be killed -- his training and experience told him to act fast.Now, he is facing trumped up criminal charges that fail to recognize the facts of the case. subject: Don’t let Greg Abbott pick the mayor of TX’s 2nd largest city!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25]
Peter ,
The runoff for San Antonio mayor is officially set, and the contrast between the top two candidates couldn’t be clearer.
On one side, we’ve got Gina Ortiz Jones: a veteran, a former Air Force undersecretary, and a lifelong public servant who knows what it means to fight for her community.
On the other? Rolando Pablos — Texas Governor Greg Abbott’s handpicked guy and a former Secretary of State who helped push voter suppression policies across Texas.
This is supposed to be a nonpartisan race, but Abbott is playing hardball. He’s already flexing his political machine in San Antonio — and with a massive war chest, he could flood the airwaves and tip the scales in the final stretch.
But we’re not letting him.
GOTV PAC is all-in to elect Gina Ortiz Jones, but with early voting starting May 27 and turnout already low, we need to scale up fast to reach every voter we can.
We can’t let Greg Abbott pick the next mayor of Texas’ second-largest city. Not after everything he’s done to strip away rights, rig the maps, and silence Texans.
Can you chip in $20 right now to help GOTV PAC power Gina Ortiz Jones to victory on June 7? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email05042025&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=Email05042025] DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=Email05042025]

OTHER AMOUNT → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email05042025]
Let’s show Abbott that San Antonio voters don’t take orders from Austin.
GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email05042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email05042025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

name: Tanya Lloyd
subject: Thank you!
body:
Thank you! Dear Supporters, First of all, I want to thank you for supporting me through the last election cycle. Your support has not gone unnoticed! I know that I have been quiet since the disastrous | | | [](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6817cc47fe3c3e2f50317c32&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tanyafortx27.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D6817c7e93c90c03b717e2595%26ss_email_id%3D6817cc47fe3c3e2f50317c32%26ss_campaign_name%3DThank%2Byou%2521%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-05-04T20%253A21%253A34Z&w=658f0ec36f3fe00284167a1e&c=b_6817c7e93c90c03b717e2595&l=en-US&s=UuOFq1z9Un-z6-AUXQTXnaPM0Ms%3D) Thank you!
---
| Dear Supporters, First of all, I want to thank you for supporting me through the last election cycle. Your support has not gone unnoticed!
I know that I have been quiet since the disastrous election of Nov. 2024. I have taken the last months to take some time for myself and my family and to continue my job as a 1st grade public school teacher.
The last 100+ days have been hard to watch, it’s been hard to watch so many of our sitting congressmen and women sit in silence while harmful and unlawful EO after EO has been signed. I know that a few have stood up and made their voices heard, but it is not enough. We need more representatives that will do the will of the people and not the will of the sitting administration.
I have not given up on my goal to represent TX-27 and have started taking steps to set up a team to help me fund raise and manage the campaign. My website is still up, although it needs some updating. I am still active on Facebook and Instagram at @tanyafortx27.
Thank you for taking the time to read this email! I look forward to keeping you all informed of the progress of our campaign to take TX-27 back for the people!
In Solidarity, Tanya

---

clean_body: Thank you! Dear Supporters, First of all, I want to thank you for supporting me through the last election cycle. Your support has not gone unnoticed! I know that I have been quiet since the disastrous | | | Thank you! | Dear Supporters, First of all, I want to thank you for supporting me through the last election cycle. Your support has not gone unnoticed! I know that I have been quiet since the disastrous election of Nov. 2024. I have taken the last months to take some time for myself and my family and to continue my job as a 1st grade public school teacher. The last 100+ days have been hard to watch, it’s been hard to watch so many of our sitting congressmen and women sit in silence while harmful and unlawful EO after EO has been signed. I know that a few have stood up and made their voices heard, but it is not enough. We need more representatives that will do the will of the people and not the will of the sitting administration. I have not given up on my goal to represent TX-27 and have started taking steps to set up a team to help me fund raise and manage the campaign. My website is still up, although it needs some updating. I am still active on Facebook and Instagram at @tanyafortx27. Thank you for taking the time to read this email! I look forward to keeping you all informed of the progress of our campaign to take TX-27 back for the people! In Solidarity, Tanya | Tanya Lloyd for Congress, 1887 FM 672, Lockhart, TX 78644, United States Powered by

| Hi Peter, it’s Congresswoman Sarah McBride. Recently, I sat on the Capitol steps and shared one of the most painful memories of my life: holding my husband Andy’s hand as he took his last breaths after a battle with cancer. That experience is why I will never stop fighting Republican attempts to cut access to health care. **Predictably, Stephen Miller jumped at the opportunity to distract his audience by using schoolyard taunts against me.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107083055/543554659/-1778669283?amount=15&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_050425_MCBRIDESPLIT_2x30DO-60DC-60DD_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWNkNmEwZi0yYTI5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WkxY6Uz1XPViMVhRmYEdLESZea9QsMnu6-JK2Nb95uU=) **Notice what Stephen is doing here.** He doesn’t _actually_ care about women — men, _or_ anyone for that matter. He’s trying to distract from the fact that the far-right wants to take away health care from millions of Americans. The only “pretending” that’s happening here is the Republicans pretending to care about working people while doing everything they can to make life harder for them. I’m sick of it. **I’m not here to play into Stephen Miller and the GOP’s bigotry, Peter. No matter how much they attack me, I’m not backing down. I will protect health care from their sticky fingers.** [Peter, will you stand with me by splitting an urgent donation of $15 between me and the Democratic Party of Georgia right now? Every dollar helps us fight back — and stay laser-focused on what matters.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107083056/543554660/-1778669283?amount=15&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_050425_MCBRIDESPLIT_2x30DO-60DC-60DD_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWNkNmEwZi0yYTI5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WkxY6Uz1XPViMVhRmYEdLESZea9QsMnu6-JK2Nb95uU=) | | **[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107083057/543554661/-1778669283?amount=15&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_050425_MCBRIDESPLIT_2x30DO-60DC-60DD_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWNkNmEwZi0yYTI5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WkxY6Uz1XPViMVhRmYEdLESZea9QsMnu6-JK2Nb95uU=)**

name: Mary Trump
subject: this fight is personal for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107083142/543554837/1722609566?refcode=250504_MaryTrump_DDF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTM0MTZjOC0yOTI5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gvCqSaWWc9EN0hKiRn9v0ns_9ifqqFtxNcHbd1KWjec=) Friends, I never needed political pundits or psychologists to tell me that my uncle Donald shouldn’t be anywhere near the Oval Office. I spent much of my childhood in the very house where Donald grew up. Voter Action Project
CNN: Trump is dismantling election security networks. State officials are alarmed
Team,
The United States has a history of strong preparation and quick work by an information-sharing and analysis network of hundreds of federal, state, and local election, cybersecurity, and law enforcement officials to protect our elections. It's a history we should be proud of.
But now key parts of this security network, much of it built over the past decade, are being systematically dismantled by the Trump administration and Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency, a CNN investigation has found – leaving election offices across the country scrambling to protect against future threats.
In an age of cyber attacks, poorly funded election equipment breaking down, or anti-voting activists trying to skew the results, these moves to remove the guardrails on our elections are a dangerous step away from democracy.
That's why our work is so critical. We need to get the word out about these threats to voting rights -- all while we work to register new voters, activate registered voters, and fight suppressive laws to make sure every vote counts.
Help multiply our efforts to defend voting rights by chipping in $25 or whatever you can today to make sure every voice is heard in our elections >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2]

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107083780/543557211/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE509_20250504_NRCCMoney_PL_v1s1&sourceid=1056037&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmUzYmNmNS0yYjI5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GN7Rv6HPCw78W9bJj3U0mH_ZPfKK3KY7eJeKV5bJf0g=) Peter,

You've probably seen a flood of emails lately about critical fundraising deadlines. That's because once those deadlines pass, fundraising numbers go public — not just ours, but our opponents' too.

And here's what caught our attention: The National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) just reported a staggering $36.7 million raised in Q1 of 2025 — the best off-year quarter in its history.

[**But here's the good news: Our grassroots supporters are stepping up in record numbers too. Can you chip-in today to help take back the House majority — where Democratic pro-choice women will be leading the charge?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107083781/543557212/-1082512980?refcode=WUEFE509_20250504_NRCCMoney_PL_v1s1&sourceid=1056037&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmUzYmNmNS0yYjI5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GN7Rv6HPCw78W9bJj3U0mH_ZPfKK3KY7eJeKV5bJf0g=) | [TAKE POWER BACK](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107083782/543557213/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE509_20250504_NRCCMoney_PL_v1s1&sourceid=1056037&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmUzYmNmNS0yYjI5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GN7Rv6HPCw78W9bJj3U0mH_ZPfKK3KY7eJeKV5bJf0g=)

U.S. House Republicans have momentum, even as they continue to fail the American people and fall in line behind the Trump agenda. They're clinging to their narrow majority so they can continue to enrich their billionaire donors and push an extreme, anti-choice platform.

But here at EMILYs List, we’re fighting back harder than ever:
* Members of our team are embedded across the country, where they're recruiting Democratic pro-choice women to run for office, building campaigns, and investing in incumbents whose 2026 races are expected to be VERY close.

* We're working with our Communications and Digital teams to ensure that as House Republicans spread disinformation and wreak chaos, we're calling them out and setting the record straight.

* And our On Notice project has already put 46 extremist U.S. House Republicans on alert: we're coming for their seats in 2026.

This next cycle will be a marathon, not a sprint, and Democratic pro-choice women are the key to securing the next U.S. House majority — which we MUST take back in order to create a federal check on Donald Trump and beat back GOP attacks on our rights and our livelihoods.
****[**Donate today to help EMILYs List women WIN in 2026:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107083783/543557214/-1082512980?refcode=WUEFE509_20250504_NRCCMoney_PL_v1s1&sourceid=1056037&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmUzYmNmNS0yYjI5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GN7Rv6HPCw78W9bJj3U0mH_ZPfKK3KY7eJeKV5bJf0g=)****

clean_body: This is a marathon, not a sprint. | = Peter, You've probably seen a flood of emails lately about critical fundraising deadlines. That's because once those deadlines pass, fundraising numbers go public — not just ours, but our opponents' too. And here's what caught our attention: The National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) just reported a staggering $36.7 million raised in Q1 of 2025 — the best off-year quarter in its history. = | = U.S. House Republicans have momentum, even as they continue to fail the American people and fall in line behind the Trump agenda. They're clinging to their narrow majority so they can continue to enrich their billionaire donors and push an extreme, anti-choice platform. But here at EMILYs List, we’re fighting back harder than ever: Members of our team are embedded across the country, where they're recruiting Democratic pro-choice women to run for office, building campaigns, and investing in incumbents whose 2026 races are expected to be VERY close. We're working with our Communications and Digital teams to ensure that as House Republicans spread disinformation and wreak chaos, we're calling them out and setting the record straight. And our On Notice project has already put 46 extremist U.S. House Republicans on alert: we're coming for their seats in 2026. This next cycle will be a marathon, not a sprint, and Democratic pro-choice women are the key to securing the next U.S. House majority — which we MUST take back in order to create a federal check on Donald Trump and beat back GOP attacks on our rights and our livelihoods. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, the EMILYs List Campaigns team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILYs List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible. EMILYs List P.O. Box 96612 Washington, DC 20077 United States | ---|---

It’s James Carville. Did you see this?

The New York Times just reported that our resistance to Donald Trump is “TIRED.”

C’mon...

Donald Trump and his billionaire donor Elon Musk have spent their first months in office trying to DESTROY our government and unravel our checks and balances.

Democrats aren’t tired – we’re FIRED up!

And we’re going to CRUSH their House Majority in the midterms with one of the largest blue waves we’ve ever seen! But let me tell you – that takes resources. A lot of resources. And House Majority PAC spent down nearly all of their funds to help us GAIN seats in the House in the last election. So they asked me to email ya today to see if you’d chip in to help refill their coffers. name: Shahid Buttar
subject: A dozen ways that the Trump administration is destroying America's economy (Part I)
body:
The candidate trusted by confused voters to improve the nation's economy is doing precisely what he said he would--and no one should be surprised by the results

| |
