---
| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA.And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content. Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion.The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming. We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values!**[**I hope you see why I need your help today.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=da390802ed324ca88d11850a404ed6c7&_e=NLeTHtgOVriwQh1Jscm8gl0P5TkNyJb16Z1RasxpcK_fA-ROo2oWGJFQ788GDECXtqboX0wBF5cn_dc2QPT2YG0-f70Pi4ggtMYtI-v3tWMfQGtcUa5T41rYlqc0fOyji_1gUVpfYY081SKOBZdu78TueJzMPYFPYUizgkre4BGi0ZvRnyXa_Jk491rCMrya8D4iArh83L6TFYC7HZI7HCzZy0bwqMW5UAJFEQKJu-ShBEwYHqtuhoWjyEv3489bXgO9AbDKPaN7ZV-BOK5GJbroeSXqzw8l4cR_VfMYMjyQbjC4kHaYjYU7WmAiEfd4Wkx8iJFtF8mZufzxWg6WBKwxZ7sh2enjoGF4MGao_yVS5_Y6rwJnDBxaziT4pXm61JWe3KsxHMzNNjh6OXOjIw%3D%3D)** My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **Brave Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome **Brave Books** that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), **Brave Books** was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking **Brave Books** how they could host Story Hours of their own.And that’s how our nationwide “See You at the Library Day” was born. Last year, committed conservatives just like you booked event rooms at 360 libraries in 45 states.On the same day, we held hundreds of Story Hours to fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God.**I went to as many "See You at the Library" events as I could in one day to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots...**...for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries.And this year, our ambitious goal is to expand “See You at the Library Day” to over 1,000 libraries reaching over 100,000 children.The exact date in August will soon be announced. And before then, what we need is you!It’s going to be expensive to give these volunteers the resources they need to hold Story Hours for 100+ children at each library – that's 100,000+ children in all. **[That’s why I hope you’ll give a sponsorship gift of $175, $350, $525 or more today.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=da390802ed324ca88d11850a404ed6c7&_e=NLeTHtgOVriwQh1Jscm8gl0P5TkNyJb16Z1RasxpcK_fA-ROo2oWGJFQ788GDECXtqboX0wBF5cn_dc2QPT2YG0-f70Pi4ggtMYtI-v3tWMfQGtcUa5T41rYlqc0fOyji_1gUVpfYY081SKOBZdu78TueJzMPYFPYUizgkre4BGi0ZvRnyXa_Jk491rCMrya8D4iArh83L6TFYC7HZI7HCzZy0bwqMW5UAJFEQKJu-ShBEwYHqtuhoWjyEv3489buVVqlK-yLSE2tGb-dzxK40KScLpDsvscXyxzBh1wFVASAZdmYPV2g0ROEtp7bRuRssk0Fu0b76GadxYq_BjAdmzrskYkm6gsJsZiAt8FJsa6lnTgo5wRko-2G0xlXr2N6OjZOkfJ3nddikfMOVaYXg%3D%3D)** Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing a “See You at the Library Day” event. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items.**Brave Books** is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our 1,000 Story Hours to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, **[**please consider a sponsorship gift of $175.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=da390802ed324ca88d11850a404ed6c7&_e=NLeTHtgOVriwQh1Jscm8gl0P5TkNyJb16Z1RasxpcK_fA-ROo2oWGJFQ788GDECXtqboX0wBF5cn_dc2QPT2YG0-f70Pi4ggtMYtI-v3tWMfQGtcUa5T41rYlqc0fOyji_1gUVpfYY081SKOBZdu78TueJzMPYFPYUizgkre4BGi0ZvRnyXa_Jk491rCMrya8D4iArh83L6TFYC7HZI7HCzZy0bwqMW5UAJFEQKJu-ShBEwYHqtuhoWjyEv3489bVxGMFIX3GoiW6UAKRU2TD8lZYVavmXRmLj-akqpgKIZTKmn5Icpy8LzIPQ33rWLE1a0M2EY38d8MfKhCLOHn3uOJTBe0CpEEW2rj8nrplm5uapPxX6nBvBLGkE_330DxEFxUnffhGnj_mp_sr7pfkg%3D%3D)** That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself. clean_body: See you at the library| | | | | Fellow Conservative,Before you do anything else today, will you please take a moment to If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical. Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like Pat the Bunny and The Little Engine That Could. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the Three Musketeers , Treasure Island and Charlotte’s Web.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call Adventure of Huckleberry Finn and To Kill a Mockingbird “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” Little House series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...” | | | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.” | | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.” | | Prince and Knight. The “premier queer-friendly fairy tale” about a prince who marries a knight instead of a princess. | | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.” | | | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.” | | I wish I could tell you this was only happening in places like New York City and San Francisco. | | | But that’s just not true.<\- this is a man leading “drag queen story hour.”< p style="box-sizing: border-box;"> | | But that’s just not true.THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.” | | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA.And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content. Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion.The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: Rick about a cross-dressing Grandpa, Melissa filled with graphic nudity, and Darkstalker featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming. We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values! My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named Brave Books , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome Brave Books that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), Brave Books was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking Brave Books how they could host Story Hours of their own.And that’s how our nationwide “See You at the Library Day” was born. Last year, committed conservatives just like you booked event rooms at 360 libraries in 45 states.On the same day, we held hundreds of Story Hours to fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God.I went to as many "See You at the Library" events as I could in one day to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots......for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries.And this year, our ambitious goal is to expand “See You at the Library Day” to over 1,000 libraries reaching over 100,000 children.The exact date in August will soon be announced. And before then, what we need is you!It’s going to be expensive to give these volunteers the resources they need to hold Story Hours for 100+ children at each library – that's 100,000+ children in all. Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing a “See You at the Library Day” event. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items.Brave Books is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our 1,000 Story Hours to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself. Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America, Kirk Cameron | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | | | ---|---|---

Peter, you've been identified as a crucial part of this effort. State Defender Society is a highly selective group and it would be an absolute honor to have you join its ranks. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: One of the Left's most powerful tools
body:
The far-Left in America is attempting to rewrite...

| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/_DRLIdCe-Hh7g1UO80QIpYmo4IC1axieZdCWJb8a25PoClQX-aU_I-Uevyz5kv1rGvOdul-UiY-moEAcrxZYtCgEyo8kl7ynwLY3xg_iX4dAmp4iWLFHFZkXwolHkO1Nd1-qly93LyTjuK_VrI1OZJgcHqt7j9_EwsLIRADG511XgQ2RrG3yeDTj/YI68tjLHYW-BttlNCwfkurJVx_yMatTZ/8)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/MA8jpx5Zl4ObvSun0JW0LwOZqK7GPx73EPWs-8iJtmOBfpv_lP3VfsKywCqVR8EgvuaHkfrvZ_iJay6oia4-FdX60nej7Iw86VU0HHTTcPJKYKxttRcJAIdVLS4wobceo6gA1Z6CPnVa2JO4CQdKwu-KMlidyRS-f6bvmfC8ndCl2T0Z6gpCD0uMzyuWbFxCI3xr4Cr_8klNmfRkoTYReHEh0tsrCorctfDsDF98qsQ_Ts4269jv_7LW6lv6J7IExrr4IcHYOGXP5ndjtDe_Xn6HmL87c14D87H7KXMHX0F3KufN6OnFS91xuZ-hrceNOIuICjiHpC2GcDSszNwMHTuC7-w2c72v9aOlTinofB7X0hDNnF70K5KPeGCpa2y7i6CR-7q-pSZvH5l6OSTqxVxDjhACMpS1bQEr/tHC4eiXXJUW7_zKtqrT90QwTIjqO266d/8) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far-Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution--with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you're receiving Hillsdale College's **Second Amendment Survey** because you're someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? [https://info.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/TUmthZcAUtYpPrqm1X9RgSd_TZVY9UTsWUp0BefhKtfbMtDoEBn2nLcZdWjnkGG216DzNASLTiAMPhCk4wOCJy_3BJkeGPB54-SoZTmhfxaxgh9tHp5rPs3QqIBuIhmXS_oemQiXfHvOlgVR5dwWOKCU8vDDjpvmLUckUbWBwlDmJa3j7kmj67dZiaJ1RJL-wdySkWH2Gt1boPniQSz8jH0IL8-7wlDXD41icii2vkURiKGcV_qGe3Al2EWJxlb3bSPa8LjBtniMpa3hAuyH7dEKmMkZ6cY42jpOLprkJ0Z_o3Rb4T7JSLOlTcfonGwatd_CWUFSnmpZbZvXEr1LCRkq-4rdzRdCzLTkEGzDs_cILGynkJHCpM41COrcA9N-0C9_U1cLahfq3bDOAOvGi4Z7SW4YJlR0pJ8Y/XRd6_KvYekF4fguKB9uA-DsdSxROJ2Ec/8 "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/")

Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty--which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left's most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today, our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: "The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**." This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. **But instead of just TALKING, it 's more important to DO something about it.** That's why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That's why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: [https://info.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/h9K7xko8XV0WOTmrMquTE4Wb03Q4niiUbHQFS5gkUcEhdiHaGbERIUzGaRV7P2Yx4FuZrGqw0-9Ax2XvNrfycYheyPWUa1M6F7ACuIvWdDA_L8jeXhjN9Zh4a9au1k52Y-Aa6K_ZCSHvQNaCPDzV1eOftJaupIU2xo_8-0SccLMCxVujj9A-uRjcqjz_q07UHbnN3ZVk4JJ5RNAWK1PdJQxyOOXlAryfhscK3NxBi3KyaApTRdsSNOS4E0mnSudnv5ajcFrZxaQEdYWnkLf5lO8dpmz0UIIx_OnqJWQH_GHZmZNqtaeUN3OS3BtcS5fvUkWZ78wDGLOhK3xKZeyMKc5sk0YC-04jE39to-d8aDgFI-LAo7Zo7d76zBtzMqNhLdfmPmnmzppwekbYU14ALX4Na4125QBSFb64/zjjIGzc1nMmnfhOEmf5x5N1kIqULo8oz/8) We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, "Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction." Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It's also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty --including the Second Amendment--for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** The Second Amendment is under attack. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far-Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution--with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you're receiving Hillsdale College's Second Amendment Survey because you're someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our Second Amendment Survey using the secure link below? "" Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty--which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left's most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is ignorance. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today, our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in Imprimis , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: "The Second Amendment is an expression of first principles." This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. But instead of just TALKING, it 's more important to DO something about it. That's why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That's why I would like your answers to our brief Second Amendment Survey. You can complete the survey today at this secure link: We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, "Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction." Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we reach and teach millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It's also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty --including the Second Amendment--for future generations. After completing your Second Amendment Survey , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed Second Amendment Survey. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. subject: You deserve an explanation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Here’s the truth
#
In just a moment, we are going to ask you to make a contribution directly to VoteVets. But first, you deserve to know how we will use your donation and why this request is so important.
Here's the truth:
As you read this, Donald Trump and the Republican Party are pulling up the couch cushions looking for any programs they can slash in order to pay for tax cuts for billionaires.
Sadly, that includes programs many Veterans rely on. We're talking about Veterans health care, housing and more.
At the same time, he is trying to hold this ridiculous military parade on his birthday in Washington, D.C. An event that would debase the military and one that must be stopped.
We also have critical elections coming up fast, and we need to re-take the House or Senate to serve as a check against Trump in the next two years.
In each of those instances, it is the voices of Veterans and military families that will play key roles.
VoteVets is one of the top outside spending organizations every cycle, but what you may not know is that almost all of the donations we receive come from people chipping-in in response to emails like this — so we are asking:
[**Can you please make a $5 contribution to VoteVets to help us stop Trump's push to slash Veterans programs, hold a parade in his honor, and to help elect a Congress that will hold him accountable?**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-may25.QbUJE_&refcode=em250504-1-30&t=1&akid=34392%2E3013755%2E5G5xJF)

name: Hillsdale College via Victory Mailings
subject: Why chemistry?
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj204n8gdzs3yofl8e5y3dh4n0judvwbmtju2cjgy261ea2gkycus18cpg3v3fox6xm6fmd1fz6a0lu7anvts&__stmp=svrepd&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svrepd&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jzg1zy9cy3wrkjbjlgrccqzxveklbe5m1t5mumk1igg45ebmud2ulfze6d6hc5ju2fi76cion620qm14mq9y83ulcq4rvn2g6mkqgzsqpxpp3ckpyei7qosjiqbrnk4uzt2gphohd4izkyc9lepk&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svrepd&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svrepd&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svrepd&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svrepd&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jzg1zy9cy3wrkjbjlgrccqzxfs1rjw34fqoc7tnb37rl03r88kbb6p4mpmmx6dovkckv7mo7pfincpcl3vptgbecrmjqs9pg31f9b5t0c1qhqazwablg1o37xnloeda2lce76nlhy6ypsnfwjsf0&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svrepd&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svrepd&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

body:
Help us hold lawless Republicans accountable »
#
**_“These Republicans cannot know a moment of peace.”_**
That’s what Governor of Illinois JB Pritzker said last week — and he’s right.
The GOP under Donald Trump too often operates without regard for the rules, precedent, or even just common sense. _We need to give them hell for it._
**[STAND WITH JB](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88372?refcode=em20250504-8917&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8917%2E614464%2EYh7gwO)**
**We’re working to elect Democrats up + down the ballot who won’t let these lawless Republicans know a moment of peace, but we need your help to build our war chest ahead of 2026.** That’s why we’re urgently asking:
**[Can you chip in $5 or more today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88372?refcode=em20250504-8917&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8917%2E614464%2EYh7gwO)**

subject: ----- FORWARDED MESSAGE ----- regarding Donald John Trump’s impeachment
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23039%2E4449941%2EA41USt) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23039%2E4449941%2EA41USt) I was just checking our records, and I noticed you didn’t sign our petition co-signing the articles of impeachment against Donald Trump.

With all the horrible things he’s done in his first few months, I figured this can’t be right. [**_So I’m reopening the petition just for you. name: JD Vance
subject: Don’t pee on my boots & tell me it’s raining.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc
body:
They’re trying to impeach Donald Trump. Call me crazy, but I think I’ve seen this one before.
| | | |
## **MESSAGE FROM JD VANCE**

---
[](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)
It’s been over 100 days since President Trump took office, and the Democrat HOAX machine has been firing on all cylinders.
Radicals have now introduced SEVEN Articles of IMPEACHMENT against Trump, again!
**Call me crazy but I think I’ve seen this one before!**
They tried once and _**FAILED**_. Then, they tried twice and _**FAILED**_. Now, they’re trying thrice and will _**FAIL AGAIN.**_
**This is all just one big WITCH HUNT. Nobody believes their crap.**
Democrats don’t have any policies. All they have is lies.
They can’t stand that we have a President who’s putting the working men & women of America first, **AND NOW THEY’RE THREATENING TO IMPEACH TRUMP AGAIN!**
**_[WILL YOU STAND WITH TRUMP IF THEY IMPEACH HIM AGAIN?>](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)_**

[SUBMIT RESPONSE](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)
American citizens are finally being sent to the front of the line, and Democrats are going crazy.
Everywhere you turn, the wins for our country are piling up, and we only have one person to thank - YOU!
Your participation in our polls and responses to messages like these really make a difference. THANK YOU!
_**So before the end of the day, can you please answer this one question for President Trump:**_
**_[DO YOU STILL STAND WITH TRUMP AFTER DEMOCRATS INTRODUCED SEVEN NEW ARTICLES OF IMPEACHMENT?>](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)_**

[SUBMIT RESPONSE](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)
Thank you again for everything.
JD Vance

---
Co-Pilot – We’ve seen so much happen since John James announced his campaign for Governor. Michiganders have seen exactly what happens when strong leadership and purpose meets action. From massive national security wins to support from BIG NAMES in the America First movement, the momentum behind John’s campaign is growing stronger every day. We wanted to make sure you were looped in. Here are some of the highlights:
---
|
---
_**MISSION ACCOMPLISHED: FIGHTER JETS COMING TO SELFRIDGE**_ Through the leadership of President Trump and John’s tireless work in Congress – Selfridge Air National Guard Base is receiving **a new fighter jet squadron**. **_"President Trump and I are getting done in 100 days what the previous administration and state leaders couldn’t accomplish in four years." – John James_**** _ _** This is what conservative leadership looks like—RESULTS, not broken promises. **Read more in[The Detroit News](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=2f1312c158554b4f8dcbee571f168ac9&_e=a5Hbam2tksVwkUctaPdRN8akixDr0Hs-93-vOA9P1uNL_cKF8P9BEdtUkKTGM6Z3JaMEREbPh03NZ3IzoAF7CNqZfX2EA8eXFXqZyYYd51ACOMG2VD6qB9xu6BLjvqixjFrybDCO6xItzLbybAdLAmcHKnp_hEGr2K50zzu0wqgLqmpxgjnHk4pHn6Vi8n9zIJmZQBKU7LiN0nzlW9CzmdraQ72yt2pVpJ4Nw8lh0m2oiKqXOWzY1FKUE-FuKfRmX0JAgCXOQ_d6xjdHhNoWWGl_bxsWdtRxWz7SZgxS0p5hSGkS5ULvQX5s1pYmaPyNMhoggBesdgwOX0iODd3UN3j9vpPKO9-l-NV9nAA1ENLjVE4xayDYkhGpbA08DGFCM0sdCrQFqgy-HL9PLN-zD9e7qMX_Q4-lmBFwl8k87NU%3D).**
---
|
---
_**JOHN’S NEWEST AD**_
John released a NEW digital ad to mark President Trump’s 100-day mark visit to Michigan.
---
[](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=2f1312c158554b4f8dcbee571f168ac9&_e=a5Hbam2tksVwkUctaPdRNzfD8MhiyVQ6nOIbnj8laLHz0oPeO5auTYoSUPAGQFzzMY_Ev4Ky0mxL4c5Sw1Sm-HQxy7_F2byPICmhGlefosg0wAjYim_XvA7oF-OgCpoCOqfb5Ca_cD0d5MfQ7CJRvHoFzGPxQuFcXwKi09WWjXP4HFXcjcJjlErJGp0lpvsxwbYskC-MzJgrusA-UNtJoRtlhX4fyIOIt4XLRK9kamvtgqv0kek1WtugLz7W8vlQ)
---
The ad highlights the strong relationship between John and President Trump, emphasizing their shared commitment to Michigan’s working families, economic growth, and secure borders.
---
[ **WATCH THE NEW AD ** ](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=2f1312c158554b4f8dcbee571f168ac9&_e=a5Hbam2tksVwkUctaPdRNzfD8MhiyVQ6nOIbnj8laLHz0oPeO5auTYoSUPAGQFzzMY_Ev4Ky0mxL4c5Sw1Sm-NX3eNXjQ2JJFawI6NTgsWd0MvX46c9J2Gpu98bVYD8VmqVcW0-WZjeohjv_J1_yi5nX_2O_2fWoE7lEHuLScakASK0ivVfd3_OfWS_IcL_kbEHE7Ovij96FfEmW-o3kHqh5FhiGa8fnSucLjyn_wGxDCH2TRACtjNW1QATHDOCF)
---
|
---
_**KID ROCK CHIMES IN ON THE GOVERNOR’S RACE**_
---
[](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=2f1312c158554b4f8dcbee571f168ac9&_e=a5Hbam2tksVwkUctaPdRNx3d5SfM365ykjVlbjEIe9Ssi1tV2x6sU21vMjF09XJr3glI3O6LrfEzdeclLEM95gUONV9UFa29buz9P9FEmsBmzvoWp9Z0kUPjMfHiAVLRj-OM8W1zjrEPZRy-1F3pY-zC8VvhY-Nyb9puWp5yWsaCbLiZjAaF59djWoWltpBRVTeS1HBfTQfvrTRyHvK2pP9D9ETCFAypkGo5KxF2qVXAacGqZxDzCpeQoZ2JiXxJ)
---
**_"Thanks John, as our next Governor of Michigan I know you will bring many more victories to our great city and state!"
— Kid Rock_** **From Kid Rock to Mom & Pop shop owners**, John is growing a broad coalition of America First patriots who are sick and tired of political games and who want RESULTS for our families, our economy, and our community.
---
|
---
_**STAYING TRUE TO PRESIDENT TRUMP**_ **Jack Posobiec,** a grassroots force in the America First movement sent a**clear message to John’s primary opponents on X:**_John is the _**Only Always-Trumper in the Race.**__
---
[](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=2f1312c158554b4f8dcbee571f168ac9&_e=a5Hbam2tksVwkUctaPdRN9hiWQ3v0oejJgbPczxgWsAT2ow0IgmETB9Fmr6uChmFdSDescosCE3oDmzn1qVnS6R1OKtTbzxrQkTb384_xuzJXFqwX4_OvhCpSAoNm68HO-GoguqEeTrwX0D2X0SuZ5nrkW9KVDsj-CivaM6faTh4WcE2WAos2ptX4XEPrLrWANNoaq2tA-2eaoeLB57I2yfANA1jFMuvt-LSIyNtVXX3LimyVY4_7INY4v5PS25ulHRNZbLdogjzKFAORFKxpQ%3D%3D)
---
_**"Only John James stayed true to President Donald Trump and endorsed him in July 2023." — Jack Posobiec**_ While others tried to play both sides, John stood firm in his support of the President. **That matters to voters in Michigan** and sends a **clear message to President Trump that John will have his back as Governor**. **_That’s the kind of leadership Michigan needs._**
---
|
---
_**JOHN’S DAILY CALLER INTERVIEW**_
In a new interview with _The Daily Caller,_ John speaks on faith, service, and the future of Michigan. With insight into his military record and America First vision, it’s must-read for anyone interested in John’s story and his vision for Michigan’s future. Here are two excerpts from the interview: **_“We have a remarkable opportunity to carry President Trump’s agenda into the states,” James, a former Army helicopter pilot, told the DCNF. “It’s very important. If we don’t win it doesn’t matter. Winning matters. And we have to start winning again in Michigan.”_** **_ _** **_“We can’t play small ball anymore. We can’t be cowardly conservatives,” the congressman added. “We have to be bold. Without a strong top of ticket, we will lose seats in Michigan that jeopardizes President Trump’s agenda.”_** [**Read the full interview here.**](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=2f1312c158554b4f8dcbee571f168ac9&_e=a5Hbam2tksVwkUctaPdRN4_KftXHjH087GrUhCplpDqTYITbUHKqiShKNTGLFQAZs0KcjUtuZoKnWrvNxjI3sG3h1gbBRzV-68eRimd2QVnLiyUZ-RH9nZDdYk_WMNy28w3b-bJ-UnKK3Nb78R_KVfXLQPBpDREA-B7gzVnKJpOhnOeYdiH_m3PaY8LTiNypL6qCXftG7jofCkdqgjMtp4jLYyZjcTWa2PmnxTiqrDOZu3-hKR5ORWqUJHIcK0H8GfoJPGp6ZWCQeTnqRtBIFJvOdQ2nfCPPhx_GCPkX0qY0mj2yaeS5mOIQ-Ws3Cl-0)
---
|
---
_**MAKE AMERICA HEALTHY & LETHAL AGAIN**_ ** ****John caught up with Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth & Dr. Mehmet Oz**. His message: Make America Healthy and Lethal Again.
---
[](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=2f1312c158554b4f8dcbee571f168ac9&_e=a5Hbam2tksVwkUctaPdRN7GQJvzUUTLGQKm7r9l5y2DZwkp_4iS0TFvXlx4RALaMkOnie77-n3ma4tsDcAU5R2JzYlgC2OfMMsQVpD-lYR5zB_vm5bAzKgJgXDxSCobYUjxgnXLJOnyhCLskAwiE9UxboxD6b_37yWQ_xMKoISeEpFTbGJEstvP0spTMVVJp0XvgWqY0uaE4FCgQ2kiPPj0nHued8z_ULnKs0aPLlYCZspE1rVav4pBj9lIxXEL_Yo3uYdLyqxKAjMDQEo0sBA%3D%3D)
---
John believes that America is at her best when her people are healthy, and her military is strong. It’s his mission to make sure that Michiganders of all ages are _**SAFE**_ and _**HEALTHY.**_
---
|
---
_**ENDORSE JOHN’S CAMPAIGN**_ ** ** This campaign is gaining more and more momentum in Michigan, but we need your continued support to turn momentum into victory. If you haven’t gotten a chance to ENDORSE JOHN JAMES for Governor, please do so here:
---
[ **ENDORSE JOHN HERE** ](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=2f1312c158554b4f8dcbee571f168ac9&_e=a5Hbam2tksVwkUctaPdRN2c0hVM8_vTEH-PwpP5JCMBbvj65HkMmNKwIzhVVMw770YExXS_-JCPvaitBvphlJpkaU4YBsHuu4b5kY1hvn-o0Zo8CAQVWxQ5s-knRTSprDO68lWEq1SUneV8aNqwMq57yZerMB3JIo30j8tlozqEO5m4RYfQtkqikgwkJ-Jv0mtpcURVdMdaC9dd6VnTcjM3avlRlQNn2wISd-UdynHmQQfK6IVVktDiNgsjOlDOLj-HGKx-xK5S_wwaUv914Xg%3D%3D)
---
Thank you for standing with John James and being a major part of our mission. Team John JamesCo-Pilot Updates

name: Patriot Polls
subject: Only a handful of conservatives received this email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
We need an immediate answer. Please respond ASAP

| | | Only a handful of conservatives received this email, and you’re one of them!

Right now, Democrats are working overtime to eliminate voter ID laws nationwide. This is a direct assault on election integrity, and we must take a stand before it’s too late.

**If they succeed, the floodgates will open for fraud, illegal voting, and corrupt elections. They want illegals, even dead voters, tipping the scales in their favor.**

We CANNOT allow this to happen. America needs patriots like you to fight back—NOW.

Time is running out. **[**Will you step up and defend fair elections by answering five (5) key questions on election integrity?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._X7XOuBCyr8Z6sw-kOw)**
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
[ **CLICK TO BEGIN**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-ma-6xiw)
---
We’re counting on your response.

Thank you, Patriot Polls
---
---
|
---
| | Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
---

name: Sen. Chris Murphy (via Democrats.org)
subject: Trump and his allies are trying to hand over the government to the billionaires and destroy the rule of law:
body:
---
Derek, Since Trump’s inauguration, I’ve been calling out what’s happening: **He and his allies are trying to hand over the government to the billionaires and destroy the rule of law.** Now, I’m taking that message — and this fight — on the road. It’s clear that people are demanding leadership, answers, and direction in this moment. But Republicans are refusing to listen to the people who elected them. So a few weeks ago, I held a town hall in Michigan’s 10th District, where the incumbent Republican is hiding from constituents. Even better, my friend Rep. Maxwell Frost joined me. There wasn’t an empty seat in the room. In the last week, I’ve held two more standing room only town halls in Republican-held districts in North Carolina and Missouri. Showing up and mobilizing people is how we win. This is how we fight back against the corruption, the destruction of our democracy, and Trump and Musk’s illegal power grabs. We go everywhere. Take this debate to every corner of the nation — especially where Republicans are hiding from the people. We put pressure on them in their own backyard. **If a Republican refuses to talk to their constituents, then I want to hear about it. We’ll show up and host our own event in your community. Over the coming weeks and months, I’ll be organizing myself and some of my colleagues to do just that.** But we’re going to need your support, because taking on the billionaire and corporate class requires significant resources. [**If you can, please make a contribution to help support the DNC’s efforts to organize and mobilize people to stop Donald Trump and Elon Musk’s illegal power grab. Your support helps empower Democrats to hit the road and take this fight to every corner of our nation.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250504_3323_fr&refcode2=3323_22930333_PTW7xP&akid=3323%2E22930333%2EPTW7xP) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250504_3323_fr&refcode2=3323_22930333_PTW7xP&akid=3323%2E22930333%2EPTW7xP)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em_20250504_3323_fr&refcode2=3323_22930333_PTW7xP&akid=3323%2E22930333%2EPTW7xP)**

| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?refcode=em_20250504_3323_fr&refcode2=3323_22930333_PTW7xP&akid=3323%2E22930333%2EPTW7xP)**
---
****
This is a moment of peril for our democracy. We cannot be silent or sit back while Donald Trump and Elon Musk light our constitution on fire.
Every best wish,
Chris Murphy

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._
